title: Mjukvaruutvecklare till Gripen
description:
*Drivs du av att se dina idéer bli verklighet? Välkommen till vår spännande och teknikintensiva värld.*


Din roll


Vi på HMI & Display Systems CD inom Gripenprojektet söker nu en engagerad mjukvaruingenjör som vill bli en del av vårt kompetenta och prestigelösa team. Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta nära både användare och teknik i syfte att skapa verklig operativ effekt för Gripen C/D plattformens piloter och användare.


Om rollen  

Som mjukvaruutvecklare hos oss arbetar du tillsammans med kollegor och representanter för användarna med att förvalta och vidareutveckla Gripen C/D:s HMI (Human Machine Interface). Fokus ligger på att säkerställa att systemen stödjer användarnas behov i en föränderlig och krävande omvärld.

  

En stor del av arbetet utgår från användarnas operativa vardag. Vår uppgift är att långsiktigt se till att Gripen C/D kan lösa de uppgifter den ställs inför – från tidigt konceptarbete till verifierad och färdig funktion.


Dina arbetsuppgifter  

I rollen ingår bland annat att:

* I nära samarbete med systemingenjörer säkerställa att användargränssnittet blir ändamålsenligt, stabilt och realiserbart.
* Utveckla, programmera och dokumentera design och lösningar för att möjliggöra effektiv förvaltning och vidareutveckling över tid.
* Verifiera framtagna lösningar samt redovisa resultat för olika intressenter.
* Arbeta med dokumentation och testning, inklusive arbete i våra avancerade flygplanssimulatorer. Simulatorerna ger dig en unik inblick i våra produkters funktioner, förmågor och piloternas arbetsmiljö.


Din profil


Teamet består idag av cirka 15 personer med varierande bakgrund – från kognitionsvetenskap och systemvetenskap till olika civilingenjörsutbildningar. För att trivas hos oss ser vi att du är drivande, ansvarstagande, ha en god samarbetsförmåga samt en vilja av att dela med dig av kunskap och erfarenhet.

  

Du har, liksom vi, ett starkt användarfokus och vill bidra till att teamet tillsammans når sina mål.


Vi ser att du:

* Har goda kunskaper inom programmering, dokumentation och test.
* Kommunicerar väl i tal och skrift, både på svenska och engelska.
* Har en god förståelse för användarnas verksamhet och behov.
* Har dokumenterad erfarenhet av system- eller mjukvaruutveckling, alternativt relevant utbildning.


Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.


Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.


Vad du blir en del av


Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.  

  

Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.  

  

Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.


Om du är intresserad av vilka förmåner som du kan ta del av som anställd på Saab i Sverige, kan du läsa om dem här.
company_description: Saab serves the global market with world-leading products, services and solutions from military defense to civil security.

title: Software Engineer, Maps Developer Platform (Web Team Lead - Maps SDK)
description:
Embark on a new route in your career! Apple Maps offers a host of innovative features and rich data, powering experiences across apps and websites. Join the Maps Developer Platform team to build the services and APIs that make the revolutionary Apple Maps experience available to developers everywhere on the web.  

  

**Description**  

As a Maps SDK Engineer on the Maps Developer Platform team, you will work at the intersection of web technologies, developer tooling, and cartographic technology. In this role, you will lead a small team of engineers while also contributing directly as an individual contributor. We build the APIs and tools powering the Apple Maps Developer experience. On our team, you will help us take new features from conceptualization, through design and implementation, all the way to announcing them at Apple's Developer Conference! Furthermore, you will partner directly with a wide range of clients to build highly impactful mapping solutions, including 3rd party developers and websites powered by Apple Maps.","responsibilities":"Lead and mentor a small team of engineers, fostering a collaborative and high-performing team culture.

Elicit requirements from our clients and translate them into scalable, reliable code.

Collaborate cross-functionally with Human Interaction Design, Services, and other Engineering and Data teams.  

Develop, launch, and maintain cross-platform features that integrate Maps with the web ecosystem.  

  

**Preferred Qualifications**  

Passion to collaborate and iterate on ideas in a cross-functional team  

Experience collaborating across geographically distributed and international teams
  

Familiarity with Geographic Information Systems (GIS) or other spatial visualization systems Experience building or contributing to developer-facing SDKs or APIs  

Excellent verbal and written communication skills, ability to explain complex problems clearly and succinctly  

Experience with Continuous Integration and Delivery tools and processes  

Experience writing testable code and familiarity with unit testing frameworks  

Familiarity with modern web frameworks such as React, Vue, or similar  

Familiarity with system architecture and API design  

  

**Minimum Qualifications**  

Bachelor's in Computer Science and commercial software engineering experience in a production environment  

Proven track record of architecting, developing, releasing and supporting critically important software components  

Experience leading or mentoring a team of engineers  

Proficiency in JavaScript and/or TypeScript","internalDetails":null

title: Sr iOS/Cross-Platform Developer (FindMy/AirTag Team)
description:
Have you ever misplaced your phone, needed to locate your AirPods, or shared your location with family members? Apple Find My is a powerful and intuitive solution to locate and keep track of your Apple devices, your personal belongings, and the people in your life you care most about.  

  

The Find My team continues to drive innovation to expand our global product offerings while leveraging Apple’s growing ecosystem of devices and accessories. As an integral part of Apple’s hardware and software products, Find My is an early adopter of emerging technologies that enhance existing experiences and enable brand new capabilities across all supported platforms. We constantly seek to improve finding experiences and become a part of our user’s daily life while committing to Apple’s strict privacy promise.  

  

**Description**  

If you are a self-starter looking for an exciting career opportunity and dream of shipping software solutions that impact millions of Apple users around the world, then this is the job for you. The Find My team is looking for an experienced software engineer who is equally passionate about software development and software quality. This unique opportunity requires a balanced approach to delivering complex engineering projects with a team of highly skilled software engineers. As the engineer, your responsibilities will include working closely with multi-functional teams, act as the technical point of contact, take ownership of problems and deliverables, lead engineering efforts, and organize engineering tasks to deliver the next generation of Find My features. Creative thinking, strong problem solving, excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate with other multi-functional teams in a dynamic setting are meaningful attributes which will serve you well in this role.","responsibilities":"Be a strong advocate for the customer experience

Experience in C, C++  

Working knowledge of cryptography standards and protocols (e.g.. PKCS, KMIP, X.509, AES, KDF, CA)  

Experience in the AI/ML domain  

Very strong in leading others and hands-on in programming, system design, and problem solving  

Experience driving release decisions, scoping work, and driving bug convergence  

Experience in cross team collaboration and communication across multiple timezones  

Able to work in an ambiguous and highly interdependent work environment to get things done in an efficient and tactful way  

Ability to thrive in a multi-functional team on high-profile, critical projects  

  

**Minimum Qualifications**  

Ability to take ownership, identify requirements, prioritize and make progress in an environment with limited given input.  

Validated programming experience is required, 8+ years  

Strong Swift expertise - including but not limited to: Multithreading, non-blocking IO  

Excellent written and verbal communication skills","internalDetails":null

title: erfarna systemutvecklare till det brottsbekämpande område
description:
Tullverkets IT-avdelning i Luleå är norra Sveriges största arbetsgivare inom IT och vi växer ständigt. Våra agila team inom det brottsbekämpande området behöver förstärkas med skickliga, engagerade och erfarna systemutvecklare.
  

Är du en systemutvecklare som söker nya utmaningar i en teknisk avancerad och samhällsviktig miljö? Då är det hos oss du vill vara!


**Din roll**  

Som systemutvecklare på Tullverket kommer du arbeta i ett agilt team där ni ansvarar för krav, design, utveckling, lösningsarkitektur och test. Teamet arbetar med nyutveckling och vidareutveckling av systemen inom sitt verksamhetsområde. Förutom utveckling kopplat till verksamhetsbehov jobbar teamet med att ständigt förbättra sina leveranser. Hos oss får du möjlighet att använda dina befintliga kunskaper och samtidigt fördjupa dessa i en varm och stöttande miljö.  

Vår teknikstack inkluderar bland annat:


* Angular
* JavaEE
* Jboss
* OpenShift


**Det här är ditt uppdrag**


* Designa och utveckla robusta och skalbara system som bearbetar omfattande datamängder
* Bidra till att automatisera våra processer för att öka effektiviteten och minimera manuella insatser
* Leda och delta i tekniska diskussioner, bidra med din expertis i teamet och samarbeta med olika intressenter för att säkerställa att våra digitala tjänster möter verksamhetens behov


**Vi söker dig som har:**


**Vem är du?**


* Du har en akademisk utbildning inom IT alternativt erfarenhet vi bedömer likvärdig
* Du har flera års yrkeserfarenhet av objektorienterad systemutveckling
* Du har goda kunskaper inom olika programmeringsspråk
* Du kan uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* Möjlighet att arbeta på kontoret i Luleå minst en dag i veckan

  

  

**Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet**

  

**Det är meriterande om du har yrkeserfarenhet av**


* Att arbeta agilt
* Systemutveckling i Java och Angular
* Arbete med Jboss som applikationsplattform
* Git för versionshantering
* Containerlösningar som Docker och OpenShift
* Tekniska tester av IT-system


**Personliga egenskaper**


* Du är kommunikativ, prestigelös och en stark lagspelare
* Du har driv och nyfikenhet att ständigt lära sig nytt och förbättra arbetssätt
* Ett analytiskt sinne och en problemlösningsförmåga som gör skillnad
* För dig är Tullverkets värdegrund; Helhetssyn, Nytänkande, Ansvarstagande, något helt naturligt


**Vi erbjuder dig**


* Flexibel arbetsplats för att underlätta balans i livet. Flexibel arbetsplats ger dig möjlighet att arbeta både på kontoret i Luleå och hemifrån utifrån en nivå som passar ditt arbete, ditt team och dig. Minst en dag i veckan förväntar vi oss dock att du befinner dig på kontoret i Luleå
* Utvecklingsmöjligheter och kompetensutveckling genom utbildningar och konferenser
* Friskvårdsbidrag och en friskvårdstimme varje vecka för att främja hälsa och välmående. Tullverket har även en aktiv idrottsförening i Luleå som kontinuerligt arrangerar hälsofrämjande aktiviteter
* Goda semester- och pensionsvillkor
* En vänlig arbetsplats där vi värderar trivsel och kultur högt. Hos oss får du fördjupa dina kunskaper i en coachande och stöttande miljö

  


**Övrigt**



Referensnummer: 2026-10567



Placeringsort: Luleå



Anställningsform: Anställningen är en tillsvidareanställning och kan inledas med 6 månaders provanställning.



Individuell lönesättning tillämpas



Tillträdesdag: Efter överenskommelse



Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan beslut om anställning kommer du att få genomgå drogtest och bakgrundskontroll. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen genomförs före anställning, då tjänsten är placerad i säkerhetsklass. Tullverket är en totalförsvarsmyndighet och vid anställning kan du komma att krigsplaceras i Tullverket.



Tullverket värdesätter de kvaliteter som tillförs verksamheten genom att ha en jämn könsfördelning samt etnisk mångfald.



För mer information och ansökan  

Har du frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att ringa Erika Öhman 0920-25 98 93. För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen går det bra att ringa Tullverkets PA-support, tel. 060-67 25 85.  

Fackliga företrädare är för OFR-P/TULL-KUST, Anders Nilsson tel. 0920-25 96 31 och för Saco-S, Eva Rutberg, tel. 0920-25 96 39.



Din ansökan med ett medföljande personligt brev samt CV/Meritförteckning på svenska, ska ha inkommit till Tullverket senast den 31 maj 2026. Du ansöker via det elektroniska ansökningsformuläret här nedan.



Vi undanber oss all kontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt försäljare av platsannonser.



Tullverket är en statlig myndighet som kontrollerar flödet av varor över Sveriges gränser. Med visionen att bara godkända varor ska passera gränsen hindrar vi olagliga varor från att komma in i landet och bidrar till ett tryggare samhälle. Vi förenklar handeln med andra länder och lägger grunden till ökad tillväxt och konkurrens på lika villkor. Tullverket, som grundades 1636, har i dag cirka 2 700 anställda och leds av generaltulldirektör Johan Norrman.

title: Software Engineer - Graduate - Sweden
description:
Please note this posting is to advertise potential job opportunities. This exact role may not be open today but could open in the near future. When you apply, a Cisco representative may contact you directly if a relevant position opens.
   

  

**Meet the Team**
 Join Cisco's Webex Media engineering site in Stockholm, where we craft the meeting experience that connects people and businesses around the world. We are a highly motivated, startup‑like team within a global organization, combining the impact and resources of Cisco with the agility and camaraderie of a smaller group. Our work powers the shift to a hybrid workforce and aims to make people feel truly connected. You’ll find a friendly, supportive environment that celebrates creativity, growth, and a shared passion for building world‑class real‑time media experiences.
   

  

**Your Impact**
* Bring new real‑time media features to life based on product requirements.
* Perform peer code reviews and automate development workflows and quality gates.
* Participate in agile ceremonies including daily stand‑ups, planning, releases, and retrospectives.
* Collaborate across teams to broaden technical and soft skills through training and mentoring.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Proficiency in C/C++ with strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.
* A recent Graduate with relevant Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in STEM degrees.
* Fluent English Proficiency
* Ability to live and work in Sweden with no additional VISA or relocation sponsorship from Cisco.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with media streaming and relevant protocols for real‑time applications.
* Experience designing cross‑platform solutions using appropriate patterns and build tools.
* Experience with close‑to‑real‑time systems and performance‑sensitive code paths.
* Critically reviews AI-generated code before using it.
* Steers AI effectively via context and prompt design.
* Uses AI responsibly to accelerate development.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**ROLE:** 
 Forward Deployed Software Engineer
 



**LOCATION:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden + Operational Deployments
 



**COMPENSATION:** 
 Market Leading Salary + Equity
 



  





 TECHNE is supporting a leading defence technology startup in the search for a Forward Deployed Software Engineer to join their rapidly growing defence technology team, helping deploy sovereign European air defence systems operating in active operational environments globally.
 



  





 They are building next generation counter UAS interceptor platform designed to protect allied skies, borders, and infrastructure through high performance autonomous air defence systems.
 



  





 Their technology combines advanced software, radar integrations, autonomous guidance systems, and modern defence engineering to address one of Europe’s most urgent operational challenges: low cost drone warfare.
 



  





 This role sits at the intersection of software engineering, field integration, defence technology, radar systems, and customer deployment. You will become the first Forward Deployed Software Engineer within the business, helping define how they integrate with customer systems across operational deployments.
 



  





 You will work directly with engineering leadership, customers, and field teams to deploy integrations that operate in real world defence environments, including active deployments in Ukraine.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Lead customer side software integrations across radar and interceptor systems
* Develop production grade Python and C++ integrations against radar APIs and operational platforms
* Deploy into customer environments to support live integrations and operational deployment activities
* Own integrations end to end, from rapid field deployment through scalable production architecture
* Bridge field engineering activities with Stockholm based software and platform teams
* Support productionisation of customer integrations into reusable deployment frameworks
* Help define the Forward Deployed Engineering function, processes, and future hiring roadmap
* Collaborate across engineering, operational, and executive stakeholders within high tempo defence programmes



  





**Required Experience:** 



* Strong production software engineering experience using Python and/or C++
* Experience integrating hardware systems, sensors, APIs, or distributed operational systems
* Comfortable operating within fast paced, customer facing engineering environments
* Strong communication skills across technical and non technical stakeholder groups
* Ability to move between rapid deployment work and long term scalable architecture development
* Experience working within complex or mission critical engineering environments
* Willingness to travel and work onsite.



  





**Desirable Experience:** 



* Forward Deployed Engineering or Solutions Engineering backgrounds
* Experience from companies such as Palantir, Anduril, OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar high performance environments
* Radar, RF systems, MAVLink, ROS/ROS2, autopilot, or sensor fusion exposure
* Rust development experience alongside Python or C++
* Experience integrating classified, defence, or security sensitive systems
* Trading systems or other production software environments operating under high pressure
* Eligibility for NATO aligned security clearance processes



  





**The Why?** 



* Opportunity to become the first Forward Deployed Software Engineer within a rapidly scaling European defence technology company
* Direct operational impact within real world counter drone deployments
* Exposure to live field integration activities supporting allied defence programmes
* Opportunity to define the long term customer engineering and deployment models
* High ownership role operating across engineering, operational deployment, and customer strategy



  





 This is not a traditional software engineering role. It is an opportunity to deploy mission critical software systems operating at the forefront of modern European defence technology.
 



  





 If you would like to discuss the opportunity confidentially, please get in touch directly.

title: Java Developer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
****What you’ll be doing****
 As a
 **Senior Java Developer** 
 at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership of the service, the code, and the outcomes. Assignments are typically 6–24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your home base is backend Java, you’ll sometimes work across the full tech stack (e.g., frontend, integrations, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, data flows) to ship complete solutions. You’ll design and build scalable, robust applications in cloud environments, contribute to architecture and testing/automation, and play an active role in a high-trust, high-performing team.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 We are seeking a
 **Java Software Engineer with at least 5+ years of experience** 
 . You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:
   

  

* 5+ years of experience building backends with Java
* A cloud native background using Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS / GCP / Azure and Terraform - or such.
* Experience from additional languages such as TypeScript, JavaScript, Scala, Kotlin etc. is also appreciated.
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Based in Sweden: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Our client is one of Sweden’s fastest-growing companies.
 



  





 They are now entering a major growth phase and building a new team focused on trust & safety systems, user engagement features, and scalable digital experiences.
 



  





 The team optimises for
 **quality, rapid iteration, and short feedback loops** 
 and has full
 **end-to-end ownership** 
 , strong engineering autonomy, and a culture centred on experimentation, monitoring, and continuous improvement.
 



  





 You build it, you ship it!
 



  





**You will** 



* **Own products end-to-end:** 
 design, build, test, deploy, and monitor in production.
* Work with
 **large-scale, high-availability systems** 
 moving millions of events per minute.
* **Move fast:** 
 build, iterate, release
 **multiple times a day** 
 with automated deployment.
* Help shape team culture, engineering practices, and technical direction.
* Design and evolve system architecture with hands-on coding
* Mentor teammates and collaborate closely with stakeholders across the business.
* Learn fast through experimentation; success, failure, and everything in between.



  





**Team Culture** 



* Small, tight-knit team early in its journey
* Real ownership and autonomy
* Low process, so you can
 **keep building**
* A chance to shape culture, tooling, and ways of working
* A fast, sometimes messy, but always exciting environment with driven engineers



  





**We need** 



* Experience setting up infrastructure and applications to handle enormous amounts of data
* Strong experience with Node, React & TypeScript.
* Solid grounding in both
 **SQL**
* Experience with
 **high-throughput, high-transaction environments**
* A hands-on builder who loves solving real problems, not an architect who stopped coding



  





 If you are a senior engineer who thrives in autonomy, loves fast iteration, and wants to build new products from scratch with talented peers, this is the place to make a huge impact.

title: Fullstack Engineer - Commercial Tech
description:
As a Fullstack Engineer at Embark, you will be a Gamemaker in a technical team that builds and maintains internal tools that empower our game teams and improve the studio’s efficiency. Your role will directly support game development by creating solutions that automates and streamlines workflows, and provides valuable analytics. You will also be contributing to commercial projects like tools for monetization and customer support.
   

  

 The team’s goal is to deliver scalable, user-friendly, and cost-efficient solutions that help our teams create dynamic and engaging player experiences. You’ll collaborate closely with game teams, data teams, and the commercial team, reporting to the Tech Lead in Commercial Tech.
   

  

 As an integral part of a creative and autonomous team, you’ll contribute to high-quality tools and systems for both developers and players. For the frontend we use technologies like React, TypeScript and NextJS. For the backend we use Go, protobuf, Python, and OpenAPI.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Develop and improve internal tools for game teams and studio-wide use.
* Automate workflows to reduce manual effort and enhance efficiency.
* Build personalized store recommendation systems and tools.
* Continuously refine engineering practices to ensure services are easy to deploy, scale, and maintain.
* Collaborate with multiple teams to deliver tools and solutions that improve both developer and player experiences.


**We would love if you have**
* A creative and curious mind
* Solid experience with React, TypeScript, NextJS, Go, Python and the GCP stack.
* Proven ability to build internal data-driven tools and services.
* Experience deploying and maintaining services on cloud infrastructure.
* Strong background in analytics and data-driven tooling.
* Analytical mindset, self-driven and capable of taking projects from idea to implementation.
* Experience in the gaming industry or other consumer-facing products.
* Passion for games, interactive experiences and new technologies.
* Professional English communication skills.


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.
   

  

 Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!
