**Vänligen bifoga ett separat dokument (pdf eller word) med svar på urvalsfrågorna nedan som du skickar in i samband med din ansökan.** 




  





 Urvalsfrågor:
 


1. Har du svenskt medborgarskap?
2. Har du akademisk utbildning inom it, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande, alternativt annan erfarenhet som Säkerhetspolisen bedömer som likvärdig? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din utbildning och/eller erfarenhet
3. Har du flerårig erfarenhet som chef med personal-, budget- och verksamhetsansvar? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet.
4. Har du flerårig erfarenhet inom it-säkerhet? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet
5. Har du erfarenhet av att driva förändringsarbete och transformationer inom it? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet.
6. Har du erfarenhet av att arbeta skalat agilt? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet
7. Har du mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet.
8. Har du god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på engelska? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet.
9. Har du erfarenhet av att leda andra chefer? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet
10. Har du erfarenhet av arbete inom säkerhetskänslig verksamhet, exempelvis myndighet eller andra komplexa organisationer? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet.
11. Har du erfarenhet av kontinuerlig säkerhetsuppföljning eller modern ackrediteringsmodell? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet.
12. Har du kunskap om lagar och regler som styr informationshantering? Om ja, vänligen beskriv din erfarenhet.



  





 Urval och intervjuer kommer att ske löpande. Vi räknar med att intervjuer sker under vecka 24–25.
 



  





**Övrig information** 




 Du bör inte berätta att du sökt tjänst hos Säkerhetspolisen för andra personer än dina närmast berörda. Det beror på att vi har tjänster som omfattas av sekretess.
 



  





 I våra rekryteringar använder vi arbetspsykologiska tester.
 



  





 Vi har redan gjort våra val av annonskanaler. Vi undanber oss därför samtal från rekryteringsföretag och annonsförsäljare.

title: Operations Manager
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for an
 **Operations Manager** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 You will lead our Technical Operations Center (TOC) - the team that keeps Viaplay Group’s services running around the clock, every day of the year. The TOC is the nerve centre of our operations: monitoring, triaging, and coordinating the response to incidents that affect millions of viewers across the Nordics and the Netherlands.
   

  

 As Operations Manager you will manage a team of TOC Agents, ensuring seamless 24/7 operational presence across both in-house staff and external partners.
   

  

 Your role is equal parts people leader, operational owner, and continuous improvement driver. You will build a team that is calm under pressure, fast to act, and always learning — and you will make sure the processes, tooling, and culture are in place to support that.
   

  

**The journey ahead**
 Viaplay is a dynamic company with new challenges constantly emerging - from major live events and product launches to unexpected incidents. Our operations must be resilient, adaptive, and continuously improving. You will be at the centre of that work, shaping how we run our TOC today and what world-class operational management looks like for us tomorrow.
   

  

**Some Of Your Work Would Include**
* Lead, coach, and develop your team of TOC Agents - fostering a culture of operational excellence, psychological safety, and continuous learning
* Own staffing and recruitment for the team, including ongoing evaluation of the team’s long-term structure
* Manage the vendor relationship, ensuring quality, coverage, and alignment with Viaplay’s operational standards
* Drive incident management practices: from on-call processes and escalation paths to post-incident reviews and root cause analysis
* Own and continuously improve the operational runbooks, monitoring frameworks, and escalation procedures used by the TOC
* Collaborate closely with Engineering, Product, and other stakeholders to ensure operational readiness for new features, products, and events
* Ensure seamless 24/7 coverage through effective scheduling and handover practices across in-house and vendor teams
* Be responsible for employee well-being within a shift-based and on-call environment


**What We’re Looking For**
 To be our new Operations Manager, we believe you are an experienced leader who thrives in high-stakes, fast-moving environments. You understand what it takes to keep complex systems running 24/7 and you know how to build and support a team that does too. And if you, like us, enjoy having fun at work - we might be a match!
   

  

**Ideal Candidates Also Meet The Following Requirements**
* Proven experience in a people management role, preferably leading an operations, NOC, or TOC function
* Strong background in incident management, service reliability, and operational process design
* Experience managing vendor relationships and external staffing partners
* Comfortable working across technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Structured, calm, and solutions-oriented under pressure
* Ability to coach, develop, and build teams in a 24/7 shift-based environment


**It’s a Bonus If You Have**
* Experience from the media, streaming, or broadcast industry
* Familiarity with monitoring and observability tooling (e.g. NPAW, Splunk, or similar)
* Experience working in or alongside engineering organisations


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Project Manager- Charging Infrastructure France
description:
Are you passionate about making a sustainable impact in the world of electric transport? Do you thrive in an innovative and entrepreneurial environment? Then you might be the new Project Manager in France at Erinion!
   

  

**About Erinion**
 Erinion designs, builds and operates depot and destination charging solutions for heavy-duty vehicles. As part of the Scania Group, we combine the strength of a global transport leader with the agility of a fast-growing company. Our approach focuses on energy efficiency and optimal utilisation, ensuring that electrification is not only sustainable but also financially and commercially viable for our customers. We support different ways of financing, owning and operating charging sites, so that each customer can find the model that best fits their business. With operations across eight European markets and global expansion underway, we enable transport operators to electrify their fleets with confidence and long-term profitability.
   

  

 Your Role
   

  

 As a Project Manager, you will play a crucial role in turning ambitious electrification plans into reality. You’ll take end-to-end ownership of our charging Infrastructure projects — from early planning and technical assessments to execution and handover — ensuring that every solution is delivered on time, on budget, and to the highest standard. This is a delivery-focused role where you’ll take full responsibility for coordinating successful project rollout across internal teams and external partners. Whether it’s managing subcontractors, navigating permitting processes, or aligning with grid operators, you’ll be the key link that ensures seamless execution and satisfied customers.
   

  

 Your Responsibilities
   

  

  

* Lead the full deployment process of charging Infrastructure projects, from planning to completion. Projects will primarily be deployed in France, but you will also occasionally work on projects abroad.
* Conduct site assessments and advise on feasibility, timelines, and budgeting.
* Drive the selection, contracting, and coordination of subcontractors and vendors.
* Manage permitting processes and ensure design compliance.
* Oversee on-site construction activities and ensure safety, quality, and timeline adherence.
* Maintain ongoing communication with stakeholders, providing clear reporting on progress, cost, and performance.
* Liaise with grid operators when needed to secure power supply and capacity.
* Proactively identify risks or roadblocks and implement solutions to keep projects on track.
* Support the sales team with technical expertise and cost estimates during customer discussions.
* Manage the post-project handover to Service & Operations and Customer Success, with clear documentation handed over for future support.


 Your Profile
   

  

 We’re looking for a Project Manager with experience managing Infrastructure or construction projects from planning to delivery. You understand how to balance timelines, technical requirements, and stakeholder input to make sure each site is delivered successfully. The role suits someone who’s structured, customer-focused, and confident managing complex projects with many moving parts.
   

  

  

* 4+ years of experience managing end-to-end construction or Infrastructure projects
* Proven ability to coordinate subcontractors, budgets, schedules, and site activities
* Strong communication skills and the ability to manage multiple tasks in parallel
* Confident working independently and solving problems across planning and delivery
* Strong technical and commercial understanding, with a focus on delivering value.
* High level of proficiency in spoken and written English and French
* Open to regular travel, averaging around 40%
* Experience in energy, e-mobility, or transport is a strong plus


**Location:** 
 Preferably in the capital region in France.
   

  

 Our Offer
   

  

 Join our passionate team and be a driving force in the future of sustainable transportation. At Erinion, you won't just be a part of the change, you'll be pioneering it. We offer a competitive compensation package, alongside unparalleled professional growth opportunities. This is an early-stage company where your ideas are valued, your contributions have a significant impact, and you have the chance to develop and grow alongside Erinion.
   

  

 Further Information and Application
   

  

 We are driven by our belief that the power of diversity fuels innovation. We welcome individuals from all backgrounds, cultures, and perspectives to join our team. We are working with an ongoing selection; please apply as soon as possible if you are interested, but no later than 2026-05-30. Your application should include your CV and certificate of your highest finished degree. If you have any further questions contact Sebastian Glaas at sebastian.x.glaas@scania.com. Please note that we cannot accept applications over email. A background check might be conducted for this position.
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Lead Security Engineer – Core Technology Team
description:
**Tech Innovation at Apotea**
 Apotea is Sweden’s largest online pharmacy, committed to making healthcare products accessible and efficient for everyone. Our Tech department aims to redefine how AI and automation drive modern businesses — not by forcing AI into traditional workflows, but by creating AI-driven systems that give humans control, insight, and the ability to apply their expertise where it matters most.
   

  

 The Core Technology team builds the architectural foundation supporting e-commerce, logistics, data, AI/ML, and customer experience. We ensure all development aligns with our long-term vision and contributes to Apotea’s growth.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Lead Security Engineer to take full ownership of Apotea’s security strategy, ensure compliance, and enable teams to build and innovate securely at scale.
   

  

**The Role**
 As Lead Security Engineer, you will define, implement, and evolve security practices across AWS (serverless-first), e-commerce, logistics, and data platforms. The role combines strategic leadership with hands-on engineering — you will implement security yourself while empowering others to do so.
   

  

 You will act as the first-line technical security lead, defining guardrails, monitoring risks, and leading incident response. You will develop secure practices for coding with AI assistants, ensuring generated code meets security standards, avoids data leakage, and aligns with regulations. You will also communicate complex security concepts clearly across the organization.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Sveavägen 168, Stockholm, Sweden (On-site)
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Security Leadership
   

  

* Own and evolve Apotea’s security strategy across cloud, applications, and infrastructure.
* Translate business and regulatory requirements into sustainable security practices.
* Define guardrails, best practices, and reference implementations for teams.


 Hands-On Security Engineering
   

  

* Design and implement secure AWS serverless and data-driven systems.
* Lead IAM practices, enforcing least-privilege and zero-trust.
* Oversee vulnerability management, penetration testing, and patching.
* Ensure secure DevSecOps pipelines and IaC security.


 Monitoring & Incident Response
   

  

* Build and operate monitoring, detection, and alerting systems (SIEM, EDR, GuardDuty, Security Hub).
* Lead incident response: investigate, contain, and recover from security events.
* Maintain and test playbooks for emerging threats.


 Governance & Compliance
   

  

* Ensure GDPR, healthcare regulations, and industry standards compliance.
* Embed security and privacy by design across development.
* Partner with legal, compliance, and business units for regulatory readiness.
* Provide training and frameworks for safe AI usage without compromising security.


 Collaboration & Culture
   

  

* Work closely with engineers, architects, and product teams to integrate security early.
* Mentor engineers in secure coding and infrastructure practices.
* Advocate for a strong security culture.


**Qualifications**
* Extensive experience as a security engineer and organization’s main security expert.
* Proven expertise in securing AWS (IAM, networking, serverless, encryption, monitoring).
* Strong background in designing secure, scalable, cloud-native systems.
* Hands-on experience with SIEM, EDR, vulnerability scanners, secrets management.
* Deep knowledge in DevSecOps and IaC (CDK, Terraform, CloudFormation).
* Programming/scripting skills: Go, TypeScript, .NET, Python, or similar.


 Nice to Have: experience in regulated industries, compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, PCI-DSS), or red/blue team operations.
   

  

**Why Join Apotea?**
* Stable company with a meaningful mission: improving healthcare accessibility.
* Work on cutting-edge AI, ML, and automation impacting millions of customers.
* Modern cloud-native technologies (serverless, AI, event-driven).
* Flat, agile organization with minimal bureaucracy.
* Career growth through training, mentorship, and conferences.
* End-to-end project ownership from concept to deployment.
* Culture of experimentation, collaboration, and innovation.


**About Apotea**
 Apotea.se is Sweden’s largest online pharmacy, with the country’s broadest range of over 32,000 non-prescription items and nearly 19,000 prescription drugs for humans and animals. Recognized as Sweden’s most sustainable e-commerce company (Sustainable Brand Index 2021), we simplify everyday life for our customers with fast deliveries and expert advice. In 2024, Apotea reached a turnover of SEK 6.5 billion and currently employs about 1,000 people across Stockholm, Lidingö, and Morgongåva.
   

  

 Apotea is an inclusive employer that values diversity. We welcome all applicants and strive to create a work environment where people, regardless of background, gender, age, religion, or disability, can thrive and grow.
   

  

**Recruitment Process**
* Apply
* Interview: Screening
* Interview: Technical Capabilities
* Interview: Culture Fit
* Background Check: As a pharmacy, we always conduct a background check.
* Offer Presented


**Application**
 Do not hesitate to send in your application already today. For more information or questions, visit our career page or contact us at jobb@apotea.se. We do not accept applications via email.
   

  

 LinkedIn
   

  

 Instagram
   

  

**Join Us and Make a Difference - We hope you want to be a part of our team!**
 Submit your application today—interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis, and the position may be filled immediately. Start date by agreement.
   

  

 Welcome to Apotea – where technology meets health and creates magic!
   

  

 Apotea är Sveriges största nätapotek med fokus på hållbarhet och snabba leveranser. Vår logistik är hjärtat i verksamheten, och vi har som mål att bli Nordens största apotek och Sveriges mest hållbara företag. Tillsammans med våra kunder har vi samlat in över 100 miljoner kronor till välgörenhet, och vi fortsätter att växa varje år – med våra medarbetare som den drivande kraften bakom framgången.

title: Global Solutions Architect, Automotive & Manufacturing, Automotive&Manufacturing EMEA SA
description:
**Description**
 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is looking for experienced and motivated technologists who possess a unique balance of technical depth and strong interpersonal skills. You will partner some of the worlds largest Automotive and Manufacturing companies, to craft highly scalable, flexible and resilient cloud architectures that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of AWS services. In collaboration with account managers, you will assist in driving growth across a set of global customers in your defined country. As a trusted customer advocate, the solutions architect will help organizations understand best practices around advanced cloud-based solutions, and how to migrate existing workloads to the cloud. You will have the opportunity to help shape and execute a strategy to build mind share and broad use of AWS within enterprise customers. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, products, and technical challenges.
   

  

**Here Are Some Other Qualities We Are Looking For**
 Be great fun to work with.
   

  

 At AWS, we have a credo of “Work hard. Have fun. Make history”. In this role, you will love what you do, and instinctively know how to make work fun. You will be dynamic and creative, and willing to take on any challenge and make a big impact.
   

  

 Enjoy working with large, global customers. You will have a passion for educating, training, designing, and building cloud solutions for a diverse and challenging set of enterprise customers.
   

  

 Have a strong understanding of large scale computing solutions. The ideal candidate will have past experience working as a systems or support engineer. You will enjoy keeping your existing technical skills honed and developing new ones, so you can make strong contributions to deep architecture discussions. You will regularly take part in deep-dive education and design exercises to create world-class solutions built on AWS.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Serve as a trusted technical and AI advisor to customers, understanding their business needs and technology challenges to architect customized solutions
* Lead discussions to shape a customer's long-term technology and AI strategy and guide them on trade-offs between short-term fixes and extensible, scalable solutions
* Design end-to-end solutions leveraging both technical expertise and business acumen, driving consensus across multiple teams to deliver impactful solutions
* Proactively identify opportunities to accelerate implementation through reusable components, parallel workstreams, etc.
* Share knowledge by developing technical content like sample code, presentations, workshops to exemplify best practices and educate customers
* Drive product innovation by gathering customer feedback, translating needs into clear requirements, and partnering with product teams through development
* Resolve complex technical problems through root cause analysis, both for customers and internally
* Contribute strategic planning, recruiter/develop talent, build team consensus, and provide guidance to more junior solutions architects


 A day in the life
   

  

* Review customer requirements and technical challenges, focusing on opportunities to implement complex solutions architectures that can transform business outcomes also leveraging AI capabilities
* Develop proof-of-concepts that demonstrate how cloud solutions can transform business processes
* Influence service team leadership and product marketing on the future needs for customers, prioritizing roadmap features and GTM messaging
* Dedicate time to continuous learning about the latest advancements in AWS service capabilities
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities with colleagues, creating field enablement materials to help other SAs understand how to integrate cloud solutions into customer architectures


**About The Team**
 The AWS Industries team is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation journeys. Our primary goal is to meet customers in their cloud and AI journey and work backwards from their industry-specific needs to transform their businesses and industries. Our team focuses on business outcomes and industry use cases on behalf of our customers, whether that is how we build products and solutions, how we sell, how we deliver, or how we partner.
   

  

 The Automotive & Manufacturing Solutions Architecture team is dedicated to accelerating AWS cloud adoption across strategic automotive and manufacturing accounts. Our mission is to drive tangible business value through focused execution on strategic projects, while enabling scale by up-skilling broader field teams. We work at the intersection of technology and industry-specific transformation, partnering closely with account teams, technology specialists, and industry specialist teams to deliver comprehensive solutions.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent, or experience in a professional field or military
* Experience in IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries
* Experience within specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data & analytics).
* Experience in design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures
* Experience communicating across technical and non-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking
* Experience working with end user or developer communities
* Experience with presentations and speaking with executives, IT, management, and developers


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch) - G54
   

  

 Job ID: A3091672

title: Systemintegratör - gRPC
description:
**Techster Solutions** 
 befinner i dagsläget sig i en spännande tillväxtfas och söker nu fler kollegor, inledningsvis dig med minst
 **5+** 
 års erfarenhet och som kan stärka teamet.
   

  

 Du kan förvänta dig en omväxlande miljö, dagarna kan se väldigt olika ut - men en sak är säkert, här får du använda dina kompetenser och sätter själv gränsen för hur mycket du vill utvecklas. Som ett kunskapsbolag är det viktigt för oss att våra specialister delar med sig av sin kompetens och får kollegorna att växa.
   

  

 Rollbeskrivning:
   

  

**Till vår kund Polismyndigheten söker vi en Systemintegratör till uppdraget nedan:**
 Polismyndighetens Integrationsgrupp i Stockholm ansvarar för integrationsplattformen. Gruppen behöver förstärkas med en konsult som har stor erfarenhet av integrationsutveckling samt gRPC. Uppdraget kommer att pågå en längre tid. Integrationerna blir ofta komplexa och utmanande på grund av organisationens kontext. Du kommer att utföra integrationer samt föra dialog med olika intressenter för att tillsammans komma framåt. Över tid kommer du som konsult att få mer ansvar kring våra olika integrationer när du växer in i rollen i vår grupp.
   

  

**Kvalificeringskrav (Skallkrav):**
* Konsulten ska ha god förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska samt engelska.
* Konsulten ska ha minst 5 års erfarenhet av gRPC med HTTP/2
* Konsulten ska ha minst 5 års erfarenhet som Systemintegratör.


**Meriterande kompetens**
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av arbete inom den offentliga sektorn
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av gRPC-uppdrag inom större organisationer
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av gRPC med HTTP/3
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av arbete inom rättsväsendet
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av arkitekturfrågor inom gRPC


**Ansökan**
 Tror du att du är
 **Techster Solutions** 
 nästa stjärna? Tveka då inte att skicka in din ansökan redan nu. Urval sker löpande och tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Arbetsplats och kultur
   

  

 Vi är ett entreprenördrivet IT företag, med både produktkunskap och försäljning (Techster AB) och konsultativa tjänster (Techster Solutions AB). Det innebär att vi är mycket öppna för nya tekniska lösningar, kunskapsutbyte och ständigt lärande. Att ha roligt och samtidigt behålla den familjära andan utan hierarkier är lika viktigt.
   

  

 Vi vill skapa det konsultbolag som du alltid velat jobba för, men kanske inte hittat ännu. Redan idag har vi en blandning av seniora och yngre medarbetare, såväl som män och kvinnor. Det vill vi fortsätta att bygga på. Så välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Digital & AI Lead, Heating & Cooling Nordics
description:
**About The Role**
 In this role, you will be responsible for boosting the overall digitalisation level and hands on use of AI in the Heating & Cooling Nordics business, covering customers (sales and marketing), operations and maintenance, production and projects/product development. The role bridges business, data and IT and is accountable for turning use cases into real business solutions.
   

  

 This position can be located in Espoo, Finland or Solna, Sweden.
   

  

 You will:
   

  

* Drive and own the Heating & Cooling Nordics digital and AI roadmap, ensuring alignment with business strategy.
* Identify and prioritize digital and AI initiatives across the value chain, translating business needs into clear requirements for delivery teams.
* Deliver solutions hands-on by prototyping, configuring, and co-developing with IT, data teams and business stakeholders.
* Develop and operationalize AI use cases in close collaboration with production experts, ensuring readiness for real operations.
* Work closely with our data manager and data experts by ensuring data availability, quality, and governance as a foundation for AI, with understanding of key systems (e.g. OT/SCADA, CMMS, ERP).
* Act as the unifying link across business and enabling functions (IT, data, procurement, finance), supporting responsible managers and ensuring scalable and compliant solutions.
* Track and realize business value from initiatives by defining KPIs, building cases, and driving continuous improvement.
* Lead change and capability building by embedding tools into daily work and promoting a data-driven culture.
* Stay on top of digital and AI trends in the energy sector and drive pilots with clear paths to scale.


**About You**
 To succeed and thrive in this role, we see that you bring:
   

  

* A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Analytics, Industrial Engineering, or similar.
* Proven experience delivering end-to-end digital/AI initiatives in operational environments; product ownership or project leadership experience is a must.
* Solid hands-on skills in data and analytics (e.g. BI/dashboarding), with understanding of data integration (APIs, ETL/ELT) and industrial systems (e.g. OT/SCADA, CMMS, ERP).
* Experience deploying analytics/AI to production (e.g. MLOps, CI/CD, containerization) and familiarity with cloud data/AI services is a plus. Ability to prototype solutions with IT/data teams is highly valued.
* Fluent skills in English. Finnish or Swedish skills will be considered an advantage.


 As a person, you bring strong stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to bridge business, operations, data, and IT. You can translate needs into clear requirements, priorities, and KPIs, and collaborate effectively with experts, managers and central enabling functions. You are hands-on and possess strong change leadership capabilities - driving training, communication, and embedding tools into daily routines. Additionally, you apply a structured approach to business cases, value tracking, and benefits realization.
   

  

**We offer you**
 At Fortum, we believe in a better future and want to be involved in shaping it. Our workplace is a safe place, both physically and mentally. You will grow with professional colleagues, being trusted and free to challenge yourself. We offer comprehensive benefits, flexible working hours, and hybrid work model to support your productivity, development and wellbeing. We are committed to build diverse teams where everyone feels included and is treated equally. More information about our culture and benefits can be found here.
   

  

**Interested?**
 Submit your application latest on
 **25th of May** 
 . We start contacting suitable candidates already during the application period. If you have questions and would like to hear more about the position, please contact Ulla Leppä (Director, Customers) via email at ulla.leppa@fortum.com.
   

  

 To be selected for the position, the applicant must go through background clearance and a health examination including drug testing. Contact details to union representatives can be found on the bottom of
 **this page.**
**We are Fortum**
 Fortum is a Nordic energy company. We generate and deliver reliable energy to our customers and the Nordic energy system while at the same time helping industries decarbonise their processes and grow. Our core operations comprise efficient and best-in-class low-carbon power generation, customer services, and heating and cooling. Fortum’s power generation is already 99% from renewable or nuclear sources with one of the lowest specific CO2-emissions in Europe. We are guided by our ambitious SBTi-validated emission reduction targets on our way towards net-zero by 2040. For our :4,500 employees, we commit to be a safe and inspiring workplace. Fortum's share is listed on Nasdaq Helsinki. fortum.com

title: Sr. Digital Analyst
description:
**Job ID: 3224**
 The Nordic Asset Wealth Management Digital Sales and Engagement team is growing, and we are looking for a Senior Digital Analyst who enjoys working with data insights and building comprehensive analytics strategies that drive business decisions.
   

  

 In AWM Digital Sales & Engagement we believe in a proactive forward-thinking approach to drive growth, efficiency and success. As part of a dynamic organization in AWM COO, we’re committed to delivering exceptional services and solutions, and we rely on a team of skilled professionals to achieve our ambitious goals. If you thrive in a dynamic environment and have a proven track record in digital analytics, we want to hear from you!
   

  

 At Nordea, we see that the world is changing fast – and we want to be one step ahead of the curve. That’s why we’re deeply committed to providing the financial solutions of tomorrow to our customers. We’re creating an agile environment where we experiment and grow together – and we need your ideas and unique background. With us, you’ll be in good company with a chance to make your mark on something bigger.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 You will be part of a Nordic team working closely across Finland, Sweden, Norway, and Denmark, enabling cross-market collaboration, alignment, and shared best practices. Together, we work across digital journeys, analytics, marketing technology, and customer engagement—continuously improving how we create value for our customers and the business.
   

  

 As part of the AWM COO organization, you will join a strategic function focused on driving operational excellence, digital transformation, and scalable, insight-led ways of working across Asset & Wealth Management.
   

  

 We are looking for someone with a strong analytical mindset who thrives in a dynamic environment and can translate complex data into clear business value.
   

  

**What you’ll be doing:**
* Analyse web, app and campaign behaviour to identify actionable insights for targeting, content personalisation, and conversion optimisation.
* Analyze and visualize digital performance data across channels and translate findings into actionable business insights
* Develop comprehensive dashboards and reports to visualize key performance metrics and customer behavior through Adobe tools such as Adobe Analytics or Customer Journey Analytics.
* Provide clear and actionable performance insights across multiple marketing channels.
* Contribute in enhancing measurement framework development for digital channels to obtain better insights and to ensure validation and quality of data.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define KPIs and success metrics for digital initiatives
* Collaborate with other analysts and work cross-functionally with various business units.
* Deliver actionable insights to optimize flows, website performance, user experiences, content engagement and digital marketing campaigns
* Enable and contribute towards strategic initiatives, such as standardization and benchmarking of digital activities.
* Support A/B and multivariate testing across campaigns and digital experiences, from setup and measurement to insight and optimisation recommendations


 The role can be based in Stockholm, Sweden or Helsinki, Finland.
   

  

**Who You Are**
**This is the right role for you if you:**
* Analytically driven, with the ability to extract meaningful insights from complex digital data
* Enjoy working closely with marketers, content teams, and product owner to design and deliver personalised and test‑driven digital experiences
* Solution-oriented and creative when interpreting performance metrics
* Skilled at collaborating with stakeholders to define and track meaningful KPIs
* Proactive in identifying optimization opportunities through data analysis
* Able to translate technical analytics concepts into business language
* Someone who enjoys educating colleagues on the value of data-driven decision making
* Proactive and self-driven individual, able to work on a Nordic scale


**Your background and skills include:**
* 5+ years of experience in digital analytics or web analytics roles.
* Strong proficiency with web analytics platforms (Adobe Analytics preferred)
* Strong understanding of digital marketing channels and performance measurement
* Proven experience supporting A/B testing and personalization initiatives
* Strong written and verbal communication skills; ability to present findings and recommendations clearly
* Experience with other Adobe platform tools including Adobe Target and Adobe Experience Platform, leveraging their capabilities to drive actionable insights and optimize digital strategies is preferred.
* You have a relevant university degree, e.g. digital marketing, information technology, statistics, business analytics, or a related field
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English. Finnish or Swedish beneficial and dependent on location.


 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 24/05/2026.
   

  

 For more information, you’re welcome to contact Anders Nygaard Jensen at anders.n.jensen@nordea.com

title: Operativ Programledare
description:
**Techster Solutions** 
 befinner i dagsläget sig i en spännande tillväxtfas och söker nu fler kollegor, inledningsvis dig med minst
 **5+** 
 års erfarenhet och som kan stärka teamet.
   

  

 Du kan förvänta dig en omväxlande miljö, dagarna kan se väldigt olika ut - men en sak är säkert, här får du använda dina kompetenser och sätter själv gränsen för hur mycket du vill utvecklas. Som ett kunskapsbolag är det viktigt för oss att våra specialister delar med sig av sin kompetens och får kollegorna att växa.
   

  

 Rollbeskrivning:
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 Vi söker en Operativ Programledare.
   

  

 En av våra uppdragsgivare genomför sitt mest omfattande transformationsprogram, med syfte att etablera en framtidssäkrad och gemensam lösning för redovisning och rapportering.
   

  

 Programmet består av flera delar. Den övergripande programledningen samlar representanter från olika initiativ, processägare och stödfunktioner. Ett centralt implementationsprojekt syftar till att införa ett gemensamt affärssystem som stödjer redovisning, rapportering och harmoniserade arbetssätt. Projektet omfattar flera strömmar med fokus på information, teknik och affärsprocesser.
   

  

 Utöver detta ingår utveckling av en framtida operativ modell samt förändringsledning för att säkerställa ett effektivt införande, utbildning och nya arbetssätt i organisationen.
   

  

 Ansvarsområden
   

  

* Leda och samordna aktiviteter inom utvalda områden för att säkra framdrift, kvalitet och intressenthantering.
* Bidra till framtagning av styr- och beslutsmaterial för programledning och styrgrupp.
* Kommunicera status, framsteg och risker till relevanta intressenter.
* Säkerställa tydlig och korrekt uppföljning av aktiviteter, leveranser och tidplaner.
* Identifiera, följa upp och mitigera risker och hinder för framdrift.
* Säkerställa att leveranser möter programmets kvalitetskrav.
* Säkerställa att rätt resurser och kompetenser finns tillgängliga inom respektive ström.
* Initiera åtgärder vid resursbrister eller planeringsavvikelser.
* Initiera och driva förbättringsinitiativ för att effektivisera styrning, arbetssätt och leveransförmåga.


**Kvalifikationer:**
* Du har erfarenhet av att leda komplexa transformations-, förändrings- eller utvecklingsinitiativ inom ekonomi, redovisning eller rapportering.
* Du har dokumenterad förmåga att driva struktur, tempo och beslutsfattande i stora program.
* Du har stark kommunikativ förmåga och erfarenhet av att arbeta med både verksamhet och leverantörer.


 Meriterande
   

  

* Erfarenhet från organisation med federerad struktur.
* God förståelse för ERP-system, gärna Oracle Fusion.


 Du är strukturerad, målfokuserad och självgående, med en proaktiv och lösningsorienterad inställning. Du har lätt för att prioritera och trivs i samarbete med andra. Som relationsbyggare skapar du tillit även i komplexa miljöer, och du har förmågan att navigera i ofullständiga frågeställningar och skapa klarhet.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Tror du att du är
 **Techster Solutions** 
 nästa stjärna? Tveka då inte att skicka in din ansökan redan nu. Urval sker löpande och tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Arbetsplats och kultur
   

  

 Vi är ett entreprenördrivet IT företag, med både produktkunskap och försäljning (Techster AB) och konsultativa tjänster (Techster Solutions AB). Det innebär att vi är mycket öppna för nya tekniska lösningar, kunskapsutbyte och ständigt lärande. Att ha roligt och samtidigt behålla den familjära andan utan hierarkier är lika viktigt.
   

  

 Vi vill skapa det konsultbolag som du alltid velat jobba för, men kanske inte hittat ännu. Redan idag har vi en blandning av seniora och yngre medarbetare, såväl som män och kvinnor. Det vill vi fortsätta att bygga på. Så välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Senior Engineering Manager - Core Experience
description:
We design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. Our mission is to make listening feel effortless, personal, and joyful for billions of users around the world. That means turning complexity into clarity across hundreds of touchpoints—from our mobile and desktop apps to the smart speakers, TVs, cars, and integrations where Spotify shows up every day. If it touches a consumer, we shape it. We bring deep insight into human behavior, design, and technology to craft experiences that feel intuitive, expressive, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 You’ll join the Core Experience Studio, where we shape how millions of people interact with Spotify every day. Within this, the Core Value & Engagement (CV&E) product area focuses on making the core app more engaging and seamless across key user journeys.
   

  

 CV&E is a fast-growing area made up of multiple squads working on high-impact experiences like social features, personalized moments, and playlist capabilities. You’ll work closely with engineering, product, design, and insights leaders to scale both the technology and the teams behind these experiences.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Lead multiple engineering squads, supporting strong technical execution and creating clarity across teams.
* Manage and develop Engineering Managers and engineers, helping them grow and do their best work.
* Drive delivery of high-quality, reliable features that improve user engagement and overall app performance.
* Partner closely with Product to shape technical direction, strategy, and roadmaps.
* Balance discovery and delivery, helping teams explore the right solutions while delivering predictably.
* Collaborate with Design and Insights to turn user needs into scalable technical solutions.
* Contribute to broader studio alignment, sharing best practices and improving how we work across teams.
* Support a healthy engineering culture grounded in collaboration, inclusion, and continuous improvement.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have extensive experience leading engineering teams, including managing other managers.
* You have worked on consumer-facing mobile or web products where performance and user experience matter.
* You are comfortable contributing to system design and technical discussions.
* You know how to balance product ambition with quality and reliable delivery.
* You have experience working cross-functionally with Product, Design, and Insights partners.
* You care about building inclusive, supportive team environments where people can thrive.
* You bring a thoughtful approach to scaling teams and delivering large initiatives.
* You’re motivated by improving the end-user experience and raising the quality bar.


 Where You’ll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm or London.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Media Solutions Engineer (Paid Search/SEM)
description:
At Precis, we are a group of friendly experts in media buying, analytics & marketing science, creative and technology with a joint mission to help great companies thrive in the digital landscape.
   

  

 Are you curious to learn more about us? Read more about us here. For insights into what life is like at Precis and a peek at the perks of working with us, visit this page. In our Handbook, you can get a neat summary of who we are, our culture and our offices. In this document, we have summarised what our recruitment process looks like. Take a look!
   

  

*We are committed to building an inclusive and fair workplace that attracts talent and advances its people, regardless of their background, experiences or perspectives. We believe that a diverse set of minds will continue to contribute to our innovative culture and our ability to reinvent ourselves constantly.*
**Role Overview**
 The Media Solutions Engineer (MSE) is a critical hybrid role that operates at the intersection of media strategy, business acumen, and technical development. This position is responsible for designing, building, and deploying custom, robust technical solutions that directly enhance client media performance and secure long-term agency partnership ("stickiness"). The MSE transforms complex media challenges into scalable, code-based automations and integrations.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing 💼**
* Innovation-led Strategy: Lead the development of technical solutions that combine deep SEM expertise with programming to solve complex channel challenges and drive performance innovation.
* Advanced Tooling & Automation: Build and maintain high-impact tools that automate repetitive workflows and enable sophisticated search strategies at scale.
* Data Architecture & Integration: Architect and implement robust integrations between core platforms (Google Ads) and client data environments (BigQuery) to enable advanced functionality.
* Rapid Prototyping: Transition quickly from concept to code, developing working prototypes, such as a return-rate prediction model or inventory bidding strategies to address immediate client needs and test new SEM hypotheses.
* Technical Auditing & Performance: Conduct deep-dive audits of SEM account structures and data flows to identify technical inefficiencies, proposing scalable, code-based solutions that enhance delivery and account health.
* Strategic Workshops: Facilitate action-oriented consulting sessions with clients and internal teams to translate high-level search goals into tangible technical roadmaps and automated workflows.
* Technical Ownership & Reliability: Take full responsibility for the stability and performance of critical operational components, including feed management and custom scripts, ensuring they provide "technical insurance" for the client's media spend.
* Knowledge Scaling & Mentorship: Mentor specialists on technical SEM tactics and document best practices to build a repository of reusable solutions and foster a culture of continuous technical learning.


**What We Are Looking For ✔️**
* Experience: 4+ years of experience in the digital marketing ecosystem.
* SEM Technical Expertise: Comprehensive hands-on experience with SEM and feed management tools.
* Scripting & Automation: Ability to write and debug code (Python, JavaScript/Node.js, SQL) specifically for marketing automation and data manipulation.
* Platform Stack: Strong working knowledge of Google Ads Scripts, Google Cloud services (BigQuery, Cloud Run), and API integrations for marketing platforms.
* Analytical Mindset: Expertise in using GA4 and BigQuery to analyse large datasets and turn those insights into automated optimisation logic.
* Product Mindset: Ability to build solutions following internal standards, ensuring tools can be productized or integrated into internal platforms like Alvie.
* Strategic Communication: Excellent skills in presenting technical solutions to C-level stakeholders, turning complex data narratives into clear business initiatives.
* Self-Leadership: Highly self-driven, proactive, and able to manage complex technical projects independently.
* Emerging Tech Curiosity: A forward-leaning mindset regarding AI/Machine Learning applications within performance marketing.


**What We Offer 🌟**
*You can read our full offering in our* 
*handbook* 
*.*
* An intense learning environment where you will be able to grow and develop your skills and passions alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry.
* A culture that is built on collaboration, trust and innovation. We value having fun together - that’s why we also have regular afterworks, team events and a yearly festival.
* Transparent salary bands - check it out below on our site!
* 30 days paid leave, flexible public holidays, parental pay, a solid pension scheme and key insurance. Our different offices also offer different perks such as massage, health care contributions, free book orders, healthy snacks & great coffee, EAP programs and your choice of PC or Mac.
* A diverse environment with a high focus on inclusion and belonging. We speak 46 native languages around Precis, and our internal inclusion score is 4.5 out of 5.


 To make things as smooth as possible, please ensure your CV is in English.
   

  

**We update all candidates on their applications by email. If you don't receive an email from us, please check your spam folder.**

title: Account Executive
description:
*Love the thrill of closing — and the satisfaction of making it work in reality?*
*Join Airmee to build, win, and scale strategic e-commerce accounts.*
**Who we are** 
 🚚
   

  

 Airmee is a rapidly scaling last-mile logistics platform, backed by Bonnier Capital and other leading investors. We’re on a strong growth trajectory — from SEK 362M revenue in 2024 to +SEK 600M projected in 2025 (meaning an annual growth rate of approx. 70%), with a clear plan to reach profitability in 2026.
   

  

 You’ll join a high-ownership, fast-moving environment: large enough to operate at real scale, yet flexible and lean enough that you can make a visible impact quickly. 🚀
   

  

 We build the best delivery experience in the world by making logistics faster, smarter, and more sustainable. At Airmee, no task is beneath anyone — leaders lead through daily execution, high ownership, and clear accountability.
   

  

**What You’ll Do** 
 🎯
   

  

* Run strategic account growth: build senior relationships, drive business review-style conversations, and create joint growth plans.
* Own the sales journey end-to-end: build pipeline, run outbound, follow up, and close mid-market/enterprise e-commerce customers.
* Turn customer insight into commercial outcomes: pricing, margin thinking, forecasting, and strong business cases.
* Navigate operational complexity with structure and calm (SLA-demands, lead times, dependencies, cost drivers).
* Lead cross-functionally with Ops/Product/Data to solve root causes and scale what works.


**Who You Are ⚡**
* High ownership: you take initiative without waiting for perfect structure.
* Highly structured: you simplify complexity and build repeatable ways of working.
* Commercially sharp: confident in negotiation, pricing logic, and pushing for clear decisions.
* Relationship-strong but firm: you build trust and challenge when needed.
* Resilient: you keep momentum in peak periods and shifting priorities.
* Systems thinker + fast learner: you understand the full chain and learn the details quickly.


**Qualifications** 
 ✅
   

  

* 2–6 years in demanding commercial environments (scale-up/startup, consulting, IB/PE/TS, SaaS/logistics).
* Comfortable owning deals and stakeholder processes end-to-end.
* Strong academic foundation from a top Swedish or international university, ideally in analytical/technical fields.


**Practicalities** 
 📍
   

  

 Department: Commercial
   

  

 Reports to: CCO
   

  

 Location: Stockholm (Hybrid)

title: Förvaltningsansvarig Digital arbetsplats på SKR
description:
**Om arbetsplatsen**
 Kommuner och regioners verksamheter är välfärdens kärna. Det är verksamheter som berör miljontals människor, varje dag. Våra medlemmar har gett oss ett tydligt uppdrag: att Sverige ska ha världens mest innovativa och omtänksamma välfärd.
   

  

 De kommande åren står vi inför utmaningar som kräver mod, kreativitet, kompetens och förändringsvilja. Vi tar med det som är bra idag när vi skapar morgondagens välfärd. Vi möter förändring med utveckling. Vi tror på dig och på din förmåga.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 I rollen som Förvaltningsansvarig Digital arbetsplats ansvarar du för förvaltning och vidareutveckling av tjänsteområden inom Digital arbetsplats / Workplace M365. Du fungerar som bryggan mellan verksamhet, IT och leverantörer och säkerställer att tjänster och lösningar möter både operativa och strategiska behov.
   

  

 Du översätter verksamhetskrav till tydliga problemformuleringar och prioriterade backloggar samt ansvarar för planering, uppföljning och kommunikation av roadmap och leveranser. Rollen innefattar även att initiera och driva förbättrings- och förändringsinitiativ.
   

  

 Vidare samordnar du samarbetet med leverantörer, deltar i operativa och taktiska möten samt förvaltar avtal och SLA:er. Du ansvarar för kravspecifikationer vid upphandlingar, omvärldsbevakar och följer tekniska trender.
   

  

 I uppdraget ingår hantering av 2:a och 3:e linjens ärenden (incident, problem och change) mot leverantörer, samt att säkerställa informationssäkerhet och regelefterlevnad i samarbete med säkerhetsfunktionen. Vid behov stöttar du även kollegor inom angränsande områden.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av förvaltning och utveckling av digitala arbetsplatser, gärna med fokus på Microsoft 365. Vi ser att du har relevant akademisk utbildning. Du är van vid kravhantering, leverantörsstyrning och arbete i förändringsmiljöer.
   

  

 Du är strukturerad, analytisk och trygg i en koordinerande roll med många kontaktytor. Med god kommunikativ förmåga bygger du förtroende och driver frågor framåt, både operativt och strategiskt. Du har även en hög säkerhetsmedvetenhet och ett intresse för teknikutveckling och omvärldsbevakning.
   

  

 I denna rekrytering samarbetar vi med Human Capital. Ansökan till tjänsten via deras hemsida senast 25 maj 2026. För en inledande dialog kring rollen kontakta Henrik Granqvist, henrik.granqvist@humancapital.se, 070-762 08 18 eller Jennifer Englund, jennifer.englund@humancapital.se, 073-145 59 97.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Sveriges Kommuner och Regioner (SKR) är en medlems- och arbetsgivarorganisation för Sveriges kommuner och regioner. Genom kunskap, råd och service till våra medlemmar stärker vi dem i deras uppdrag att utveckla välfärden för alla invånare. Vi är en mötesplats för kommuner och regioner och tillsammans utvecklar vi demokrati och välfärd utifrån invånarnas behov i hela landet. Vi påverkar regering, riksdag och EU genom att ge förslag på hur vi bäst utvecklar demokrati och välfärd.
   

  

 SKR har ca 500 medarbetare och kontoret är placerat vid Slussen i Stockholm. Som medarbetare på SKR har du flexibilitet att arbeta delvis på kontoret och delvis från annan plats, med utgångspunkt i verksamhetens behov.

title: Packaging & Ancillary Sales Manager
description:
*We are Strawberry. With over 245 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. With urban Comfort Hotel®, warm Quality Hotel™, stylish Clarion Hotel® and cosy Home Hotel and more than 40 unique independent hotels, our guests can pick and choose. Our team of 20,000 passionate individuals from more than 120 countries is what makes us grow! Strawberry is built on our core values: energy, courage and enthusiasm.*



**The opportunity**

 Strawberry operates hotels across the Nordic region, each with its own character and guest. The commercial potential in how we package and sell experiences around those stays is largely untapped today.
   

  





 That's where you come in.
   

  





 You will own packaging and ancillary sales end-to-end: defining the strategy, building the structures, working with hotels to identify what's genuinely worth selling, and making sure the right offer reaches the right guest at the right moment in their booking journey. This is a role with real autonomy and real commercial impact, not a coordinator position.
   

  





 You'll report to the Head of E-Commerce and Content and be part of the Marketing and Digital Sales team, working closely with revenue, operations, product and digital sales colleagues across the business.
   

  





  

  

  





 What you'll be responsible for
   

  





 Packaging across the full portfolio. You develop, structure, and maintain packages for all Strawberry hotels and distribution channels. Packages should feel locally rooted and genuinely reflect each destination, not generic bolt-ons. You work with hotels to find what's actually worth packaging and make sure it's both sellable and profitable.
   

  





 Ancillary sales across all digital platforms. You own ancillary sales on all Strawberry markets and websites such as add-ons, parking, EV charging, gift cards, etc. That means building a more systematic, data-driven approach to upselling, making sure the right product is offered to the right guest at the right hotel, at the right moment. You manage third-party partner relationships where relevant.
   

  





 Product stakeholder for packaging and ancillary. You're the person closest to what guests actually want to buy, which makes you a key commercial voice in product development for this area. You translate guest and commercial insights into product priorities, and you make sure what gets built actually sells.
   

  





  

  

  





 Who we're looking for
 


* 3-5 years of experience with ancillary sales, packaging, upselling or cross-selling
* Solid understanding of digital distribution and the guest booking journey
* Comfortable building processes and structures from scratch, you've either done it before or you have a genuine appetite for it
* Comfortable in Excel and the Office suite
* Fluent in Norwegian or Swedish. Working proficiency in English
* Builds relationships easily and presents ideas and results clearly



 You'll stand out if you have:
 


* Background in hospitality or travel, in a commercial, operational, or revenue-related role
* A track record of working across departments
* Interest in product development and how commercial logic translates into what gets built
* Previous experience with hotel management systems, especially Mews
* Experience in, or a genuine interest in AI solutions to create more attractive products and increase sales



 This role suits a person that likes to set direction without waiting for a playbook. You're structured enough to keep many things moving, creative enough to spot non-obvious opportunities, and grounded enough to work well with both hotel teams and central functions. You make things happen.
   

  





  

  

  





 Why join Strawberry
 


* Room for great ideas. You’ll join one of the most exciting brands in the Nordics. We offer a fast-paced environment where your ideas actually get implemented. If you have the drive to push our tech stack forward, we have the platform to let you do it.
* We’re a social and friendly team, and you’ll have energetic and caring people all around you, and many opportunities to socialize throughout the year.
* We dream big and aim high - we have big ambitions and are not afraid of taking a bit of risk.
* We have great employee benefits - amazing discounts at our hotels and restaurants, and from external partners.
* You get 4 free hotel stays per year.
* Great offices in Stockholm and Oslo



 If you are ready to take on this exciting challenge and become a part of a great team with big ambitions, we encourage you to apply today!
 


**Practical details**
* Start date: By agreement, preferably as soon as possible
* Location: Solna/Stockholm or Frogner/Oslo
* Reports to: Head of E-Commerce and Content
* Team: Marketing and Digital Sales at Strawberry
* For questions regarding the position: daniel.bastin@strawberry.se

title: DevOps Engineer till utvecklingsteam
description:
Är du en skicklig DevOps Engineer som trivs i bryggpunkten mellan utveckling och drift? Hos oss får du en nyckelroll i att forma den tekniska basplattan för våra förmånståg. Vi söker dig som vill kombinera din tekniska expertis med ett starkt driv att stötta andra, där du genom automation och stabila CI/CD-flöden möjliggör smidig mjukvaruleverans i en verksamhet som gör skillnad på riktigt.
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 Som DevOps Engineer hos oss spelar du en avgörande roll i att forma och förvalta den tekniska basplattan för ditt team och tåg. Du tillhör ett tvärfunktionellt team men verkar också i en tät DevOps-kontext tillsammans med kollegor som delar din expertis. Här blir du länken som får utveckling och drift att smälta samman till en effektiv helhet.
   

  

 Dina ansvarsområden:
   

  

 Ditt fokus ligger på att bygga, underhålla och ständigt förbättra den infrastruktur och de arbetsflöden som krävs för en modern mjukvaruleverans. Du förväntas:
   

  

 Driva automation: I samarbete med plattformsteamen tar du fram innovativa lösningar för automation och releaseprocesser.
   

  

 Säkerställa kvalitet: Du ansvarar för systemuppgraderingar och ser till att våra riktlinjer för CI/CD inte bara efterlevs, utan också hålls uppdaterade mot branschstandard.
   

  

 Stötta utvecklingsteamet: En stor del av din vardag innebär att agera teknisk möjliggörare och hjälpa utvecklare att röja hinder i deras processer.
   

  

 Helhetsansvar: Vi arbetar efter principen "You build it, you run it". Det innebär att du är med hela vägen – från att bygga lösningen till att ansvara för dess drift och stabilitet. Beredskap ingår under ett antal kvällar och helger per år.
   

  

 Vem är du i teamet?
   

  

 Du trivs med att arbeta både självständigt och i nära samverkan med andra. Eftersom du besitter expertkunskaper som ofta saknas i andra delar av organisationen, blir din pedagogiska ådra och din vilja att dela med dig av din kompetens avgörande. Du är en nyckelperson för att vi ska kunna leverera smidigt, säkert och effektivt.
   

  

**Din profil**
 För att lyckas i rollen som DevOps Engineer ser vi att du är en självgående person som tar stort ägarskap för dina ansvarsområden. Du har förmågan att själv strukturera ditt arbete och driva komplexa processer framåt, även när förutsättningarna förändras. Du är proaktiv och nyfiken, med ett starkt fokus på att driva innovation. Genom att utforska nya tekniska lösningar och omsätta kreativa idéer i praktiken bidrar du aktivt till att höja vår effektivitet och utveckla våra arbetssätt.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har en god analytisk och problemlösande förmåga. Du trivs i en föränderlig teknisk miljö och har en naturlig fallenhet för att analysera problem och föreslå stabila, skalbara lösningar.
   

  

 Du är lyhörd, har god samarbets- och kommunikationsförmåga. Du drivs av en vilja att hjälpa andra och anstränger dig för att leverera lösningar som underlättar för dina kollegor och teamet.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Slutförd yh-utbildning inom DevOps eller likvärdigt.
* Flytande i svenska och i tal och skrift och goda kunskaper i engelska.
* Flerårig erfarenhet av att arbeta med Linux-baserade plattformar och infrastrukturmiljöer, gärna i DevOps- eller DevEx-team.
* Flerårig erfarenhet av teknisk felsökning och incidenthantering i komplexa, heterogena IT-miljöer.
* God teknisk förståelse och erfarenhet av att samarbeta med tekniskt inriktade team, arkitekter och andra intressenter.


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Arbetserfarenhet av systemadministration i en Linuxbaserad produktionsmiljö.
* Erfarenhet av att konfigurera/utveckla pipelines för CI/CD.
* Erfarenhet av Jenkins.
* Arbetserfarenhet av containerteknik med Docker och Kubernetes i produktionsmiljö.


**Vi erbjuder**
 Ett myndighetsuppdrag som är viktigt på riktigt! En arbetsplats där vi värnar om att våra medarbetare ska ha en god balans mellan arbete och fritid. Vi erbjuder flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet att jobba delvis hemifrån. Som statligt anställd har du även goda anställningsvillkor och ett förmånspaket med friskvård, lediga klämdagar samt goda semester- och pensionsvillkor.
   

  

 Du kan läsa mer om våra förmåner och hur det är att jobba hos oss här.
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid och vi tillämpar 6 månaders provanställning.
   

  

 Placeringsort är Stockholm eller Luleå.
   

  

 I tjänsten ingår viss beredskap, kvälls- och helgarbete. Några tillfällen per år som delas mellan kollegor med samma roll. Vid placering i Luleå förekommer vissa resor till Stockholm, 4-6 tillfällen per år.
   

  

 Anställningen kan komma att placeras i säkerhetsklass.
   

  

**Din ansökan**
 Vi jobbar kompetensbaserat i hela processen och är måna om en inkluderande, rättvis, objektiv och kandidatvänlig process. Därför ber vi dig att besvara ett antal urvalsfrågor istället för att be om personligt brev.
   

  

 Vi kommer att använda oss av arbetspsykologiska tester.
   

  

 Har du skyddade personuppgifter kontakta rekryterande chef som hjälper dig med din ansökan.
   

  

 Vi strävar efter en jämn könsfördelning och ser mångfald som en styrka och välkomnar därför sökande med olika bakgrund.
   

  

 Inför rekryteringsarbetet har vi tagit ställning till annonskanaler och marknadsföring. Vi undanber oss därför ytterligare kontakt med media-/annonsförsäljare, rekryteringssajter och liknande.
   

  

*Pensionsmyndigheten ansvarar för den allmänna pensionen och informerar om hela pensionen. Varje år betalar vi ut cirka 415 miljarder kronor till 2,3 miljoner pensionärer, genomför cirka 911 000 fondbyten och skickar ut 8 miljoner orange kuvert. Vi har ca 25 miljoner digitala kundkontakter per år. Vi är cirka 1700 medarbetare på åtta orter, från Luleå i norr till Halmstad i söder.*
*Vi gör pensionen enklare.*

title: Senior Product Data Analyst
description:
*We are looking for a Senior Product Data Analyst to join our Data & Analytics (D&A) team and be the D&A partner for our product teams. Bokadirekt is a company in rapid growth and we are looking for someone who has done a growth journey at another company before.*
**About The Role**
 This role is about strengthening the D&A awareness within our product organization by contributing to five product teams on how to work more efficiently with driving product insight, building a strong experimentation culture, and ensuring decisions are grounded in reliable data.
   

  

 Bokadirekt is a fast-paced scale-up where agility is key. You'll need to be comfortable delivering results amidst moving targets and quick turnarounds. You will be working closely with our Product Managers to define what to measure, how to test, and how to scale what works, with a dotted line from D&A to our Product & Tech team.
   

  

****AI as a natural part of product decision-making and analytics****
 At Bokadirekt, AI is not a side initiative – it is becoming an integral part of how we make product and business decisions. In this role, you will help shape how AI is used within the Data & Analytics team and across product teams to improve experimentation, analysis, and decision-making.
   

  

 This includes using AI to speed up analysis, improve insight generation, and support experimentation workflows – while ensuring that outputs remain grounded in statistical rigor and reliable data.
   

  

 We work in an iterative, data-driven environment where AI capabilities are continuously tested, evaluated, and improved. You will also help share learnings across teams, enabling us to become faster, more consistent, and more impactful in how we build product.
   

  

****What You’ll Do****
**Drive Product Insights:**
* Analyze user/merchants behavior across the product lifecycle
* Identify drop-offs, friction points, and growth opportunities
* Translate complex analyses into clear recommendations for product teams
* Promote a data-informed culture in the Product team


**Own Experimentation & A/B Testing:**
* Design, run, and evaluate A/B tests end-to-end
* Define guardrail metrics and success criteria
* Ensure statistical rigor (power analysis, test validity, bias control)
* Educate product teams on experimentation best practices
* Help prioritize experiments based on expected impact


**Establish a Strong Experimentation Culture:**
* Define experimentation framework and documentation standards
* Create clear playbooks for hypothesis → test → decision
* Coach PMs and engineers on experiment design


**Event Tracking & Data Foundations:**
* Collaborate with Product & Engineering to define tracking requirements
* Ensure events are consistent, reliable, and usable


****Who we're looking for****
 The ideal candidate will have a strong interest in Data Analysis and in ensuring that the organisation has access to a reliable source of truth and act based on decision intelligence.
   

  

 The candidate will also play an active role in product development: helping Product with ideation, business cases, opportunity backlog sizing, prioritisation, testing, experimentation, preparing & delivering during iterations and doing post mortems.
   

  

 This role requires someone who is comfortable operating in ambiguity, building structure where it does not yet exist, and raising the bar for analytical rigor across the organization.
   

  

**Requirements:**
* 5+ years in Product Analytics or Data Science
* Degree in Business, Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Physics or related field
* Strong hands-on experience with A/B testing in production environments
* Deep understanding of statistics (hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, power analysis)
* Experience working with product event data and imperfect tracking setups
* Strong SQL skills
* Experience with Python or R for advanced analysis
* Experience with Amplitude, Mixpanel, or similar tools
* Proven ability to influence product decisions with data
* Comfortable working in evolving environments where structure is still being built
* Able to challenge assumptions constructively
* English proficiency, Swedish is a plus


**Nice to Have:**
* Experience building experimentation frameworks from scratch
* Experience working in marketplace, SaaS, fintech, or consumer apps
* Knowledge of causal inference or advanced experimentation methods
* Familiarity with tools like Looker Studio, etc.
* Experience with Confidence by Spotify


**About Us**
 At Bokadirekt, you don’t just get to help develop a growing company – you also become part of a warm, down-to-earth, and inclusive team where we work together to make a difference. We believe in freedom with responsibility, open communication, and having fun at work.
   

  

* Location: Stockholm Office, Kungsgatan 38
* Start: As soon as possible
* Fulltime


**Benefits:**
* Wellness allowance
* Occupational pension
* Regular team activities with wonderful colleagues


**Does this sound like you?**
 Submit your application today – we interview candidates continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline.
   

  

**Welcome to Bokadirekt!**

title: IT-arkitekt till Almi AB i Stockholm
description:
Almi är mitt i en spännande digital resa där IT spelar en avgörande roll i att stärka verksamheten och skapa värde för Sveriges företagare. Vårt IT-team möjliggör effektivisering genom digitalisering och driver utvecklingen mot ett mer datadrivet arbetssätt. Samtidigt har vår AI-resa tagit fart, där vi på ett tryggt och säkert sätt vill öka användningen av AI som en naturlig del av våra processer. Nu söker vi en IT-arkitekt med fokus på molnarkitektur som vill ta en central roll i denna utveckling. Hos oss får du möjlighet att vara med och utveckla målbilden för Almis IT-miljö – och vara med och forma framtidens digitala landskap. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 I rollen som IT-arkitekt samarbetar du med kollegorna inom Almi IT och externa leverantörer för att säkerställa en hållbar och genomtänkt arkitektur. Du ansvarar för att Almi nyttjar Microsofts plattform och tjänster på bästa sätt och bidrar till att maximera värdet av gjorda investeringar. En viktig del av uppdraget är också att driva och möjliggöra användningen av AI-tekniker, såsom Copilot, på ett tryggt och värdeskapande sätt Du säkerställer att lösningar uppfyller krav på säkerhet, skalbarhet och efterlevnad, samtidigt som du koordinerar och leder dialogen med externa leverantörer i arkitektur- och teknikfrågor. I rollen ingår även att stötta och vägleda organisationen i arkitekturfrågor samt att dokumentera lösningar på ett strukturerat och tydligt sätt.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Som person är du samarbetsorienterad och trivs i dialog med både kollegor och externa parter, samtidigt som du är självgående och trygg i att driva ditt eget arbete framåt. Du tar ett naturligt ansvar och fungerar ofta som din egen projektledare, där du strukturerar, prioriterar och säkerställer framdrift i dina uppdrag. Med ett målinriktat arbetssätt har du förmågan att hålla fokus på helheten och leverera lösningar som skapar verkligt värde för verksamheten. Vidare tror vi att du har minst fem års erfarenhet inom IT och har utvecklat en bred teknisk förståelse med fokus på Microsoft-miljön.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* En utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant för tjänsten, alternativt motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
* God kunskap inom Microsoft infrastruktur inklusive Microsoft 365
* Erfarenhet av Azure och molnbaserade lösningar
* Erfarenhet av Copilot, AI-agenter och AI i en Microsoft-kontext
* Kunskap om säkerhetsaspekter inom cloud/miljöer
* Erfarenhet av systemarkitektur och integrationslösningar
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och ta ansvar för helheten
* God vana av att dokumentera och kommunicera arkitektur i relevanta verktyg och till olika målgrupper Vana av att samverka med flera leverantörer
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift


 Det är även meriterande om du har erfarenhet av Microsoft Fabric och API-management.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Din ansökan ska bestå utav CV och personligt brev. Denna rekrytering gör vi tillsammans med Jennifer Nilsson på Poolia. Sista ansökningsdag är 1 juni 2026. Urval kommer att ske löpande. Jennifer nås på jennifer.nilsson@poolia.se alternativt 0720-796988. Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid och vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning.
   

  

**Att arbeta på Almi**
 Almi stöttar små och medelstora företag i alla branscher och i hela Sverige att utvecklas och växa hållbart. Genom lån, riskkapital och affärsutveckling ger vi fler företag med potential möjlighet att förverkliga sina idéer – oavsett om de befinner sig i startupfas eller är etablerade bolag med tillväxtambitioner.
   

  

 På Almi är kompetens, samhällsengagemanget och affärsmässigheten en viktig drivkraft. Det finns ett starkt gemensamt intresse – att se fler växande och framgångsrika företag i Sverige. För att trivas hos Almi stimuleras du därför av att tillsammans med dina kollegor arbeta för andra människors framgång och för ett hållbart företagande. Arbetsmiljön präglas av glädje och stort engagemang där vi värdesätter modet att tänka nytt.
   

  

 På Almi värdesätter vi olikheter, varav vi driver ett aktivt mångfaldsarbete både internt och externt och tror på att medarbetarnas olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter, kunskaper och personligheter berikar verksamheten. I rekryteringssammanhang är fokus på mångfald utifrån exempelvis kön, ålder, funktionsnedsättning och utländsk bakgrund en självklarhet.
   

  

 Vill du ha ett uppdrag som påverkar, ett jobb som engagerar och allt detta på en arbetsplats som inspirerar - kom till Almi! En bakgrundskontroll genomförs på slutkandidat vid tillsättning.
   

  

 Anställningsform Tillsvidare med provanställning
   

  

 Anställningens omfattning Heltid
   

  

 Tillträde efter överenskommelse
   

  

 Löneform Månadslön
   

  

 Antal lediga befattningar 1
   

  

 Sysselsättningsgrad 100%
   

  

 Ort Stockholm
   

  

 Län Stockholms län
   

  

 Land Sverige
   

  

 Ref. nr. 2026/23
   

  

 Kontakt Jennifer Nilsson, rekryteringskonsult, +46720796988, jennifer.nilsson@poolia.se

title: Commercial Analyst
description:
