 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Katarina Persson katarina.persson@svt.se. Fackliga frågor besvaras av Jane Andersson (SJF), Maria Nassikas (Unionen), Fanny Lindhe (Saco) och Johan Lindén (Ledarna). Samtliga nås via växeln 08-784 00 00.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Behandlingsassistent Syrenen
description:
Arbetsplatsbeskrivning
   

  

 Syrenen är ett drogfritt, skyddat stödboende för kvinnor 18 år och uppåt som till följd av hemlöshet, våldsutsatthet, missbruk, psykisk ohälsa eller andra svårigheter behöver stöd från socialtjänsten. Syrenen har 26st platser. Personalen består av Enhetschef, gruppledare, administratör och 10st behandlingsassistenter. Verksamheten är bemannad dygnet runt.
   

  

 Syrenen är beläget centralt i city.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag och semesterväxling.
   

  

 Arbetsbeskrivning
   

  

 Tjänsten erbjuder varierande arbetsuppgifter och utgår från klientens behov och beställarens uppdrag samt andra förekommande sysslor på ett boende.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat att vara:
   

  

* Vara kontaktperson och hantera tillhörande uppgifter
* Genomföra in- och utskrivningar av klienter
* Stödja klienter med dagliga aktiviteter (ADL)
* Att dokumentera och journalföra insatser utifrån gällande regler och föreskrifter
* Kontakt med handläggare och myndigheter
* Delta i SIP-möten
* Utföra alkohol- och urinprovstagningar
* Att tillsammans med dina kollegor verka för att skapa goda förutsättningar och uppnå resultat enligt uppdraget för klienten
* Specifika arbetsuppgifter/rutiner finns för hantering av säkerhet/skydd för klienter på skyddat boende


 Du hjälper också till med praktiska sysslor som måltidshantering och städning.
   

  

 Metoder vi arbetar med:
   

  

* ESL (Ett självständigt liv)
* MI (Motiverande samtal)
* Lågaffektivt bemötande
* FREDA


 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Vi söker dig som som vill vara en del utav vårt team och som är behandlingsassistent eller har annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig.
   

  

 Annan nödvändig erfarenhet och kunskap:
   

  

* Vi söker dig som tidigare har arbetat med kvinnor med missbruk och/eller psykisk ohälsa samt med våld i nära relation och FREDA. Du behöver också ha erfarenhet av att ha arbetat med;
* MI
* Lågaffektivt bemötande
* Beroendekunskap
* Kunskap om psykisk ohälsa
* Grundläggande IT kunskap
* Svenska språket i både tal och skrift


 Vi behöver dig som är självgående, trygg och har en god samarbetsförmåga. Utöver det behöver du även vara:
   

  

* Professionell
* Flexibel
* Kommunikativ


 För att trivas och lyckas i tjänsten behöver du också ha förmågan att organisera, planera och prioritera dina arbetsuppgifter i det dagliga arbetet, både självständigt och tillsammans med dina kollegor. Provanställning kan komma att tillämpas.
   

  

 Övrigt
   

  

 Intervjuer kan ske fortlöpande.
   

  

 Arbetstiderna är rullande 6 veckors schema, dag kl. 7.30-16, kväll kl. 13.30-22, helg kl. 7.30-20.30. Du arbetar 2st helger på 6 veckor.

title: Senior Android Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

 Are you passionate about creating impactful
 **Mobile experiences on Android** 
 ? We’re looking for a talented and motivated
 **Senior Android Software Engineer** 
 to join our team and help shape the future of our mobile products.
   

  





 In this role, you’ll be at the heart of product development, collaborating closely with Product Managers, Engineering Managers, and cross-functional teams. You’ll play a key role in translating business needs into high-quality Android solutions, all while adhering to industry best practices and maintaining clean, scalable code.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
  

  




* Design, develop, and maintain high-quality Android applications using Kotlin and/or Java.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and deliver new features that enhance user experience.
* Write clean, efficient, and testable code following modern Android development best practices.
* Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and Agile ceremonies to ensure quality and alignment.
* Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize performance of existing applications to ensure reliability and responsiveness.
* Stay up to date with the latest Android trends, tools, and technologies, and apply them to improve development workflows.
* Ensure applications meet security standards and follow modern compliance practices.
* Contribute to improving internal development processes, tooling, and documentation for better team efficiency.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH** 
  

  





 Our product teams are dedicated to building advanced internal tools that support data-driven decision-making across product development. We focus on analyzing test variations, interpreting performance data, and delivering insights that help product teams optimize feature rollouts. By collaborating closely with cross-functional teams, we ensure that new features are launched efficiently and effectively. Through continuous learning and iteration, we contribute to innovation and excellence in user experience across the organization.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**




 We are looking for people with...
   

  




* Professional experience in
 **Android development** 
 . Proficiency in Kotlin (Java is a plus).
* Experience with
 **Jetpack Compose** 
 .
* Solid understanding of Android SDK, Material Design, and Jetpack components.
* Experience working with RESTful APIs, third-party libraries, and JSON.
* Familiarity with Android architectural patterns (e.g., MVVM, Clean Architecture).
* Experience with version control systems, especially Git.
* Knowledge of dependency injection frameworks (e.g., Hilt, Dagger).
* Understanding mobile app performance, memory management, and debugging tools.
* Familiarity with testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit, Espresso).
* Ability to work in an agile development environment.



 Nice to Have
   

  




* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines for Android.
* Exposure to mobile analytics tools (e.g., Firebase, Mixpanel).
* Published apps in the Google Play Store.



 And people who have:
   

  




* **Problem-Solving Skills** 
 : A logical and creative mindset to tackle challenges and deliver effective solutions, even under pressure.
* **Collaborative Spirit** 
 : The ability to work seamlessly with cross-functional teams including designers, product managers, and backend developers.
* **Interpersonal Communication** 
 : A clear and thoughtful approach to articulating ideas, technical concepts, and feedback, both in writing and verbally.
* **Adaptability** 
 : Comfort with navigating change, learning new tools, and adjusting to evolving project needs.
* **Growth Mindset** 
 : Openness to feedback and a drive to continuously improve and grow professionally.



**WHO WE ARE** 
  

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
  

  





 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* **Staff discount card** 
 : Usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online.
* **H&M Incentive Program (HIP)** 
 : Included in our HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
* **Competitive pensions** 
 : Collective Agreement and ITP pensions competitive to the Swedish market.
* **Generous vacation** 
 : 30 days' vacation, health care allowance, and good work-life balance.
* **Additional perks** 
 : Discounts from Benify.
* **Innovative Environment** 
 : Work with cutting-edge technology and innovative solutions.
* **Global Impact** 
 : Be part of a team that influences users worldwide.
* **Professional Growth** 
 : Endless opportunities to learn and develop your skills.
* **Collaborative Culture** 
 : Join a motivated team that values collaboration and excellence.



**JOIN US** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 This is a full-time permanent position, starting as soon as possible according to the agreement. The role is a hybrid position, based in our office in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  





 Apply by sending in your
 **CV in English** 
 as soon as possible. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through the career page.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here. We are eager to meet you!
   

  





 \*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.

title: Agentic Backend Engineer (Golang)
description:
**Job Details**
* Job Title: Agentic Backend Engineer (Golang)
* Location: Preferably in / near Vienna, or within a 2h time zone difference
* Languages: English (fluent), and any other european language is a plus
* Experience: Over 5 years of experience in backend development using Golang and other OOP languages, you will contribute to our SaaS platform, managing the full software lifecycle
* Contract: No freelancing, full time


**🚀 Who We Are**
 Millions of people interact with fiskaly every day, even if they don’t realize it. As a B2B company, we power the retail technology behind digital receipts and secure, legally compliant transactions.
   

  

 By making receipts tamper-proof through digital signatures, we help fight tax fraud. And with our paperless receipt solution, we offer consumers a modern alternative while helping merchants streamline their operations.
   

  

 Sure, our solutions sound complex but our mission is simple:
 **make receipts easy for everyone** 
 .
   

  

**🎯 The Role**
 In this role, you aren’t just a "Senior Dev." You are an
 **Agentic Architect** 
 . You will design the frameworks that allow AI agents to write, test, and deploy our microservices.
   

  

**The 90/10 Rule:** 
 We want you to spend 90% of your time designing the agents, the prompts, the feedback loops, and the system architecture. You should only be "hands-on-keyboard" for the final 10%, the precision tuning, the complex edge cases, and the creative perfection that AI cannot reach.
   

  

**🛠️ What You’ll Do**
* Agentic Orchestration: Design and implement multi-agent workflows to automate the full software development lifecycle.
* Build the "Machine": Create autonomous systems that take high-level requirements and output production-ready applications.
* Architect for Autonomy: Design system boundaries, clear separation of concerns, well designed API interfaces and find ways to provide context to agents.
* Reliability Engineering: Implement robust verification loops. You will build the "Judge" agents that audit the "Coder" agents to ensure our fiscal signatures remain tamper-proof and legally compliant.
* Human-in-the-Loop Design: Define the touchpoints where human expertise is most impactful, ensuring our transition to agentic engineering is seamless and safe.


**✨ What You Bring**
* The "Force-Multiplier" Mindset: You find writing boilerplate physically painful. You have a proven track record of using AI to do the work of five engineers.
* Golang Mastery (5+ Years): You know Go well enough to know exactly when an agent has produced "hallucinated garbage" vs. "idiomatic excellence."
* Systems Thinking: Deep experience in modern system architecture and API design. You understand how to manage service communication and wrap AI agents securely around complex infrastructure.
* Agentic Experience: You have experimented with or deployed multi-agent setups. You understand the difference between a simple "prompt" and a "recursive autonomous loop."
* Quality Focus: You know how an architecture or design will evolve and plan for evolvability. You write code that is readable and well maintainable without needing a single code comment.


**💡 What We Offer**
* A culture that encourages you to use the latest tech. If an AI tool helps you code 20% faster, we want you to use it
* A supportive environment where you can try new things, fail safely, and learn constantly
* Flexible working hours and a hybrid work arrangement (Office in Vienna/Berlin/Madrid/Milan or Remote)
* Work permit sponsorship for qualified candidates
* A dedicated budget for personal and professional development and regular 1:1 career planning
* Company hardware of your choice (Windows, Linux, or Mac)
* A vibrant, inclusive company culture that values your well-being and personal growth


**💡 Why fiskaly**
 Joining fiskaly means contributing to a mission-driven company that is redefining how compliance is done in Europe and beyond. Here, you’ll grow, innovate, and make a real impact on the finance operations of a scaling SaaS company.

title: Senior systemutvecklare med AI-kompetens
description:
**OM ROLLEN // MAKE IMPACT WHERE IT MATTERS**
 Wise IT söker för Region Stockholms räkning en senior systemutvecklare med djup kompetens inom AI och maskininlärning. Uppdraget genomförs inom
 **Hälso- och sjukvårdsförvaltningen** 
 , avdelningen Digitalisering och IT.
   

  

 Syftet är att utveckla ett AI‑baserat verktyg som automatiskt föreslår mappningar mellan medicinska termer och standardiserade kodverk såsom
 **SNOMED CT, ICD‑10 och KVÅ** 
 , för att effektivisera informatikarbete och stärka interoperabilitet i linje med EHDS.
   

  

 Du får en central teknisk roll med ansvar för design och utveckling av AI‑komponenter och arbetar nära informatiker, IT‑arkitekt, testare och Region Stockholms AI‑team.
   

  

**I Uppdraget Ingår Att**
* Utveckla AI‑baserad funktionalitet för automatisk begreppsmappning
* Implementera lösningar baserade på LLM‑ och RAG‑arkitektur
* Utveckla API:er och backend‑komponenter för AI‑tjänsten
* Integrera lösningen mot terminologiserver och medicinska kodverk
* Implementera loggning, spårbarhet och kvalitetsuppföljning
* Bidra till design av användargränssnitt för validering av AI‑förslag
* Samverka med informatiker i modellutvärdering och förbättring
* Dokumentera lösning samt bidra till kunskapsöverföring inom Region Stockholm


**DIN PROFIL // YOU BRING THE EDGE**
**Skallkrav**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av AI‑ och maskininlärningslösningar
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och driftsätta AI‑lösningar end‑to‑end
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av LLM‑baserade lösningar i produktion
* Erfarenhet av RAG (Retrieval‑Augmented Generation) och MCP
* Erfarenhet av vektordatabaser, embeddings och semantisk sökning
* Erfarenhet av integration av AI‑lösningar via API:er och backend
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla skalbara, säkra och förvaltningsbara lösningar
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Python och relevanta AI/ML‑ramverk
* God förståelse för NLP, särskilt i domänspecifika tillämpningar
* Erfarenhet av molnmiljöer samt containerteknik (Docker, Kubernetes)


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av SNOMED CT, ICD‑10 och KVÅ
* Erfarenhet av hälsoinformatikstandarder såsom FHIR och HL7
* Erfarenhet av datastyrning, terminologiförvaltning eller informationsmodellering
* Erfarenhet från offentlig verksamhet eller annan reglerad miljö


 Du är strukturerad, ansvarstagande och kommunikativ, med förmåga att driva komplexa tekniska uppdrag i samverkan med både IT och verksamhet.
   

  

**UPPDRAGETS OMFATTNING**
* Start: preliminärt 1 juni 2026
* Omfattning: 100 %
* Längd: ca 7 månader, med option på förlängning (upp till 9 månader)
* Plats: Stockholm, cirka 50 % på plats / 50 % distans


**DIN ANSÖKAN // TALENT SPEAKS LOUDER**
 För att söka rollen klicka på ”Ansök nu”, samt bifoga CV. Notera att vi ej kan ta emot ansökningar via mail. I konsultvärden går det ofta snabbt så tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum. Vänta därför inte med din ansökan.

title: Inside Sales Specialist Infrastructure
description:
Job Description
   

  

**Internal Sales Specialist Infrastructure Software.** 
  

  

 Är du en målmedveten person med intresse för vår moderna vardag, vill du bli en del av ett härligt team som arbetar tillsammans mot uppsatta mål? Då kan den här rollen vara helt rätt för dig!
   

  

 Plats: Frösunda/Solna, Stockholm
   

  

 Omfattning: Heltid, Tillsvidare
   

  

 Start: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 TD SYNNEX är den ledande IT-distributören både globalt och även på den svenska marknaden med nordiskt huvudkontor, norr om Stockholm samt lokalkontor i Danmark, Norge och Finland. Med unik kompetens, hög tillgänglighet, effektiv logistik och efterfrågade kringtjänster hjälper vi dagligen våra återförsäljare att på ett kostnadseffektivt sätt sälja och marknadsföra IT-produkter och lösningar. Läs gärna mer på https://se.tdsynnex.com/
   

  

**Om tjänsten** 
  

  

 I rollen som innesäljare för Software kommer du att driva försäljningen av produkter mot våra återförsäljare samt ha en nära kontakt med dem.
   

  

 Majoriteten av tiden arbetar du med redan inarbetade kunder, gör analyser utifrån kunds behov och verksamhet samt tar fram offerter åt dem. Du kommer även att arbeta för att öka omsättningen på redan befintliga återförsäljare. Nybearbetning av potentiella kunder är även en viktig del av rollen. Målet är att hitta nya återförsäljare och kanaler och få dem att inse fördelarna av att jobba med TD SYNNEX. I denna roll kommer du även samarbeta med Business Develop Manager med syftet att utveckla affären. Ett av målen är att nå flera återförsäljare.
   

  

 Teamet består av ett glatt och hjälpsamt gäng som är målmedvetna och strävar alltid efter att leverera utomordentligt resultat! Vi söker efter en lagspelare till vårt härliga team. Det är högt i tak och vi hjälper varandra att lyckas. Vi är även måna om att erbjuda den bästa servicen mot kunder och partners.
   

  

**Om dig** 
  

  

 Du är social individ som tycker att det är kul att arbeta med människor samtidigt som du är affärsmässig. För att lyckas i rollen behöver du vara målmedveten, strukturerad och drivas av att nå dina egna uppsatta mål. Du trivs med att ha många bollar i luften och många olika kontaktytor såväl externt som internt. Du känner dig trygg i att fatta beslut samt är kreativ i hur vi kan maximera vår försäljning.
   

  

**Vi söker dig:** 
  

  

 Som har erfarenhet av att ge god service.
   

  

 Som talar och skriver svenska och engelska obehindrat.
 **(Första intervjun kommer vara på engelska)**
**Meriterande:** 
  

  

 Erfarenhet försäljning
   

  

 Erfarenhet av IT-branschen,
   

  

 Erfarenhet av att jobba i affärssystem (som SAP), CRM-system och Excel är meriterande.
   

  

 Vi kan erbjuda dig, med rätt kvalifikationer och inställning, ett arbete i ett internationellt marknadsledande företag där ingen dag är den andra lik. Låter det spännande med ett företag som präglas av högt tempo och verkar på en utmanande och föränderlig marknad?
   

  

 Vi erbjuder även:
   

* 30 semesterdagar/år
* Friskvårdsbidrag 4000 kr/år
* Utökad Föräldralön (enl. Kollektivavtal)
* ITP 1 -Tjänstepension (enl. Kollektivavtal)
* Rabatter till olika gym, t.ex. Nordic Wellness som har verksamhet i vår byggnad.
* Snyggt, modernt och fräscht kontor med bra kommunikationer.
* Great Place to Work certifierad arbetsplats


**Ansökan** 
  

  

 Skicka in ditt CV via vår hemsida.
   

  

 Vi bearbetar ansökningar löpande och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!** 
  

  

**TD SYNNEX - Connecting the World with the Power of Technology™** 
  

  

 TD SYNNEX är den ledande globala distributören inom IT. Vi erbjuder lösningar, tjänster och produkter från marknadens ledande leverantörer. Vi är rankade som nr 60 på Fortune 500®-listan i USA, har 22 000 anställda globalt och är ett av de mest uppskattade företagen i världen för över tionde året i rad.
   

  

  

  

  

  

**Key Skills**
 At TD SYNNEX, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* **Elective Benefits:** 
 Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* **Grow Your Career:** 
 Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.
* **Elevate Your Personal Well-Being:** 
 Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* **Diversity, Equity & Inclusion:** 
 It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* **Make the Most of our Global Organization** 
 : Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* **Connect with Your Community:** 
 Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At TD SYNNEX, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!

title: Seniora experter sökes till Sveriges säkraste system
description:
**Vill du vara med och bidra till ett säkrare samhälle?** 




  





 För över femton år sedan startade Basalt med en enkel men avgörande idé att stärka Sveriges motståndskraft. Idag är vi ett av landets ledande produkt- och konsultbolag inom verksamhets och säkerhetsskydd och vi fortsätter växa. Samtidigt är vi ett stabilt och välmående bolag som värnar om vår familjära kultur och om medarbetarnas välbefinnande. Hos oss får du anställningstrygghet, respekt, konkurrenskraftig pension och förmåner samt en balans mellan arbete och fritid. Vi prioriterar lärande och utveckling och du får möjlighet att göra verklig skillnad och samtidigt må bra.
 



  





 "
 *Vi startade Basalt för att vi ville bidra till ett säkrare samhälle och den drivkraften är lika stark idag. Vi har aldrig kompromissat med vår mission, oavsett trender eller omvärld. Det är jag stolt över.* 
 " - Nicklas Haglund, vd Basalt
 



  





 På Basalt utvecklar vi marknadens säkraste it-plattform Craton och stöttar samhällsviktiga aktörer i att skydda sina mest värdefulla tillgångar mot både yttre och inre hot. Genom våra lösningar bidrar vi till att hålla igång de verksamheter som får samhället att fungera även vid stora störningar eller kriser. Här får du arbeta med teknik som gör konkret skillnad och ingå i ett team som drivs av innovation, kvalitet och ett tydligt syfte.
 



  





**Nu söker vi seniora experter som vill göra verklig skillnad** 




 Basalt fortsätter växa och går in i en fas där vi behöver förstärka vårt expertteam. Vi söker dig som vill ta Basalt till nästa nivå och trivs i roller där du verkar som senior teknisk expert.
 



  





 Hos oss får du utveckla teknik som påverkar Sveriges säkerhet på riktigt och du gör det tillsammans med kollegor som kombinerar hög teknisk nivå med ett genuint engagemang för samhällsviktig innovation.
 



  





 Du kan mest inom ditt område. Du är den go-to person andra vänder sig till när det behövs riktning, beslut eller teknisk tyngd. Du tar dig an komplexa utmaningar och du driver teknisk förändring med ett lugn. Du trivs med att vara mentor och vägleda dina kollegor.
 



  





**Vill du vara med och ta oss till nästa nivå** 




 Visa ditt intresse eller hör av dig till mig Kajsa Stina Åkerblom på 076 763 99 97 eller på kajsa stina.akerblom@basalt.se om du vill veta mer. Jag berättar gärna hur din erfarenhet kan stärka vårt expertteam.
 



  





**Placering och säkerhet** 




 Vi har kontor i centrala Stockholm och i Enköping och du utgår från det kontor som passar dig bäst.
 



  





 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetande. Eftersom våra kunders verksamhet kräver det och flera av våra anställda är placerade i säkerhetsklass, är svenskt medborgarskap ett villkor för att arbeta på Basalt.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 För att ge dig trygghet och stabilitet erbjuder vi ett förmånspaket som inkluderar en av marknadens bästa pensionslösningar, omfattande försäkringar, förstärkt föräldralön och ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kr/år. Du får även tillgång till Benifex, där du kan hitta extra förmåner och vi erbjuder kontinuerliga möjligheter till kompetensutveckling. Vi erbjuder också tjänstledighet med löneutfyllnad för medarbetare som tjänstgör inom Försvarsmakten, inklusive GSS/T, reservofficerare och hemvärnssoldater.
 



  





 Vi värnar om balansen mellan arbete och fritid. Med flexibla arbetstider, 5-timmars arbetsdag innan helgdagar och ledigt på klämdagar ser vi till att du har tid för både ditt jobb och ditt privatliv. Dessutom anordnar vi gemensamma aktiviteter, såsom skidresor, träningspass samt sociala luncher och frukostar, för att stärka sammanhållningen och göra arbetsplatsen ännu trevligare.
 



  





 Vi strävar efter att du ska känna stolthet och trivsel hos oss på Basalt. Du kan läsa mer om våra förmåner och om hur det är att arbeta på Basalt
 
 här!
 




  





**Om Craton** 




 Basalt Craton är en modern it-plattform framtagen specifikt för säkerhetskänslig verksamhet med syftet att uppfylla både Säkerhetspolisens föreskrifter om säkerhetsskydd samt Försvarsmaktens krav på it-säkerhetsfunktioner för att hantera information i säkerhetsskyddsklass upp till och med HEMLIG. Plattformen är även anpassad till en internationell kontext för Nato- och EU-Secret.
 



  





 Ett Cratonsystem är ett komplett fysiskt it-system som dimensioneras, byggs och installeras på standardiserad hård- och mjukvara för driftsättning med luftgap, dvs utan koppling till andra nätverk (inklusive internet). Basalt ansvarar för utveckling, produktion och förvaltning av Cratonsystemet enligt en metod helt baserad på IaC (Infrastructure as Code). Våra kunder ansvarar endast för driften av systemet på plats.
 



  





 Standardmässigt innehåller ett Cratonsystem ett antal inbyggda tjänster för att täcka grundläggande behov inom säkerhetskänslig verksamhet, men detta kompletteras ofta med kundspecifika verksamhetsapplikationer.
 



  





**Basalt i korthet:** 



* Grundat 2009, idag ca 130 medarbetare
* Kontor i Stockholm och Enköping
* En del av Omegapoint Group
* Ledande inom säkra it-lösningar och systematiskt säkerhetsarbete
* Vision: att vara det självklara valet för ett robust och säkert samhälle

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer - Messaging Platform
description:
Spotify’s Subscriptions Mission focuses on converting listeners into lifelong subscribers by delivering seamless, valuable experiences across pricing, packaging, and customer journeys. We build the systems and tools that power acquisition, retention, and overall subscription growth at scale.
   

  

 The Messaging Platform powers Spotify’s communications to over a billion users — from push notifications to emails and in-app messages that connect listeners to the content they love. Within this space, the Paloma squad focuses on message optimization: deciding which message reaches which user, through which channel, and at what moment.
   

  

 We’re evolving how messaging works at Spotify — moving from short-term optimization toward systems that understand long-term user journeys. By combining reinforcement learning approaches with deeper domain signals, we’re expanding how machine learning shapes the entire messaging funnel.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Design, build, and ship machine learning models that optimize messaging across push, email, and in-app channels
* Plan and run A/B experiments in a multi-objective environment, balancing conversion, engagement, retention, and reachability
* Contribute to reinforcement learning systems that optimize for long-term user outcomes rather than immediate interactions
* Partner with product managers, data scientists, and engineers to define what success looks like and how to measure it
* Own the full ML lifecycle, from data and modeling to deployment, monitoring, and iteration
* Integrate ML models with upstream systems, including domain value signals and opportunity generation frameworks
* Help shape the future of AI-assisted development within the team, exploring how tools can accelerate experimentation and delivery


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have strong experience building and deploying machine learning models in production environments at scale
* You are comfortable translating business problems into ML solutions and discussing trade-offs with cross-functional partners
* You have worked on complex optimization problems such as ranking systems or multi-objective decision-making
* You bring hands-on experience with PyTorch and distributed systems such as Ray or similar frameworks
* You understand experimentation deeply and can design reliable tests in environments with interacting metrics
* You are able to analyze results using approaches like causal inference or metric decomposition when needed
* You have experience with or curiosity about reinforcement learning and long-term optimization systems
* You enjoy working across disciplines and navigating ambiguity while shaping strategy and direction


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London and Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Expert IT Developer Mainframe, hourly employment, to Swedish Core Systems
description:
**Job ID: 3148**
 We are looking for an Expert IT Developer to join Local Systems Sweden – to service with expert knowledge on hourly basis 40% to 60% of a fulltime.
   

  

 Our vision is to be recognised as a world class technology organisation, delivering world class financial services solutions to our customers.
   

  

**The position we offer**
 Welcome to the Local Systems team. We add value by providing stable, efficient and innovative IT services in the core banking system areas such as Deposits, Payments, Customer data and Loans, serving nearly all other business areas of the bank. We are a team who loves to learn, collaborate, support each other and have fun at work.
   

  

 As an Expert IT Developer you will play a vital role in maintaining and developing Nordea’s fundamental banking applications. You will deliver advanced technical solutions using existing and emerging technology platforms. The team is in the middle of a generation shift and you will act as a mentor and advisor.
   

  

**Your responsibilities will include:**
* Act as an advisor in mainframe in cross functional projects.
* Act as a mentor for mainframe developers, in terms of code quality, code content and business knowledge.


 The position will be located in Stockholm.
   

  

**The Qualifications You Need**
**We are looking for you who:**
* You have many years of experience from working with development projects at a large Nordic bank, on core accounting systems
* Have extensive work experience with mainframe including programming language skills in IBM Mainframe z/OS, COBOL, DB2, DL/1
* Have extensive experience in software engineering.
* Have strong communication skills where you are able to communicate with both IT professionals and the business.


 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 20/05/2026. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Marina Hensman at (marina.hensman@nordea.com) if you want to know more about this opportunity.
   

  

 We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.
   

  

 We build relationships. We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

 We learn and develop. We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

 We lead change. We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

 We are Nordea. We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

 Studies show that members of underrepresented communities don’t apply for jobs unless they tick all the qualification boxes. If this is part of why you hesitate to apply, we would like you to reconsider and give it a chance. Maybe your profile fits our needs much better than you think.
   

  

 For union information, please contact Finansförbundet at finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACO at SacoNordea@nordea.com.

title: Central Pricing Specialist
description:
*Do you want to play a key role in shaping pricing decisions that drive profitability and sustainable growth? As Central Pricing Specialist, you will work at the heart of the commercial organization, transforming complex data into clear insights and supporting strategic pricing decisions across markets and categories. This is an opportunity to combine advanced analytics with real business impact in a collaborative, international environment.*
**This Is What You Will Do**
 You will develop and drive a structured price performance framework, analyzing key pricing KPIs such as price levels, discounts, mix effects, and margins. Your insights will support decision‑making across markets, categories, and functions.
   

  

 You will support fixed pricing cycles across countries as well as ad hoc pricing analyses, including new product launches and market changes. Working closely with Commercial Controllers and other finance stakeholders, you will contribute to forecasts, budgets, and business plans, translating commodity and procurement price changes into margin and profitability impact through simulations and scenarios.
   

  

 The role also includes developing pricing ways of working, supporting more standardized price structures, and contributing to the development of a pricing tool. Pricing is currently handled mainly in M3 and Excel, and you will help shape future solutions together with BI and finance teams.
   

  

 You will monitor macroeconomic and market developments, including inflation and FX, communicate their impact on pricing, and actively participate in commercial projects and pricing decision forums. The role is part of Central Finance Business Controlling at Lantmännen Cerealia Holding AB, based in Stockholm, with close collaboration across the Nordic organization.
   

  

**This Is What You Need To Succeed**
**You have:**
* An academic degree in Business, Finance, or Marketing.
* Around 5 years of experience working with pricing analytics and a strong understanding of profitability drivers.
* Advanced skills in Excel and PowerPoint, with experience handling large datasets using BI tools.
* Experience or familiarity with pricing software such as Zilliant, Syncron, or similar tools.
* Fluency in English and Swedish, in both speech and writing.


**You are:**
* Strong in analysis and problem-solving, with the ability to see patterns, understand drivers, and turn complex data into clear, practical conclusions.
* Conceptual and structured, able to step back, understand the bigger picture, and build frameworks and models that support consistent pricing decisions.
* Well‑organized and skilled at prioritization, managing fixed pricing cycles alongside ad hoc requests in a stakeholder‑dense environment.
* Highly self‑reliant, comfortable owning a unique specialist role and planning your work independently across multiple markets.
* Relationship‑oriented and communicative, able to build trust with stakeholders and explain insights in a way that enables alignment and action.


 You share our values - Openness, Holistic view, Drive - and our promise of taking responsibility from Field to Fork.
   

  

**What We Offer You**
 Lantmännen is a large international group with a uniquely broad scope across our operations. This allows us to offer diverse development opportunities for both specialists and generalists across different companies and industries in more than 20 countries.
   

  

 With business in mind and people at heart, we actively aim for a culture where our employees can grow, contribute, and feel truly engaged. We believe in internal mobility as a natural part of development and encourage our people to take the next step within the organization.
   

  

 Together, we drive business value, build sustainable solutions, and create a workplace where people are at the center.
   

  

**Sounds interesting?**
 We hope so! You apply for the position online, preferably as soon as possible but no later than 24/5. In your application, you have the opportunity to add your CV or LinkedIn profile.
   

  

 For a more objective and inclusive recruitment process, we do not accept personal letters but instead ask you to answer selection questions relevant to the position. The recruitment process includes both psychometric tests and competency-based interviews, with the aim of promoting a fair evaluation for all candidates. At Lantmännen, it is important that everyone has equal opportunities for employment and development within the group.
   

  

 As a final candidate, a background check will be conducted through our our external supplier. If you have any questions about the position or the recruitment process, you are warmly welcome to contact Talent Acquisition Specialist, Julia Labbart at julia.labbart@lantmannen.com. We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Sales Executive UK (Stockholm-based) to Evam
description:
***Are you motivated by owning a market and closing complex enterprise deals over time? At Evam, the role of Sales Executive focuses on building new business across the UK for mission-critical software used by police, ambulance, and fire & rescue services.***
**About The Job**
 This is a direct recruitment, which means that the recruitment process is handled by Bravura, and you will be employed directly by Evam.
   

  

**About The Company**
 Evam is a Swedish software company building mission-critical mobile data solutions for public safety organisations. Their platform is used by police, ambulance, fire & rescue services, and other emergency responders to manage complex, time-critical operations in the field.
   

  

 Evam operates across the Nordics and the United Kingdom and is currently in an expansive growth phase, with long-term contracts already signed and new markets being approached across Europe. The company has a clear ambition to challenge a traditionally conservative industry with modern, cloud-native technology.
   

  

 For more information about Evam, please visit their website: https://www.evam.life/
   

  

**Tasks And Responsibilities**
 As a Sales Executive – UK Market, your primary responsibility is to drive new enterprise sales across the UK, from first contact to signed contract. Sales processes are complex and long-term, typically running 6–24 months, and involve multiple senior stakeholders.
   

  

 The role is based in Stockholm but requires regular travel to the UK (typically 1–2 trips per month) for on-site meetings, relationship-building, and key sales activities. Customers should experience you as a local and credible partner with a strong understanding of UK business culture.
   

  

 Once a contract is signed, responsibility is handed over to Evam’s delivery organisation, allowing you to focus fully on sales.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Identify and pursue new customer opportunities across the UK public safety market
* Build and develop relationships with senior decision-makers
* Drive structured enterprise sales processes over long decision cycles
* Lead opportunities from first dialogue to signed contract
* Understand operational challenges and translate them into strong business cases


**Education, Experience And Personal Characteristics**
* 5+ years of experience in complex B2B or B2G enterprise sales
* Proven track record of closing large, complex enterprise deals
* Experience selling technically complex solutions (software, systems, or platforms)
* Higher education degree (Bachelor’s or Master’s required; engineering preferred)
* Native-level English with strong understanding of UK business culture, customer expectations, and decision-making processes
* Proven experience building relationships with UK-based stakeholders and driving sales processes in the UK


 This role suits you if you are driven by winning new business and closing complex deals, and if owning a market and leading long sales cycles with multiple stakeholders feels motivating rather than draining. You enjoy leading opportunities from first dialogue to signed contract and know how to maintain momentum over time.
   

  

 You work in a structured and analytical way, are genuinely curious about both the customer’s operations and the solution you sell, and feel comfortable challenging customers when needed. Building trust through preparation, credibility, and well-reasoned arguments is a natural part of how you approach sales.
   

  

**Other Information**
**Start** 
 : According to agreement
   

  

**Location** 
 : Stockholm, with regular travel to the UK
   

  

**Salary** 
 : According to agreement
   

  

 We use a competency-based method in all recruitment processes to ensure unbiased selection. We also work with ongoing selection, which means that we’ll take down the job ad when enough candidates have reached the final steps of the process.
   

  

 If you are considered for the position, we will contact you for an initial interview. Regardless of whether you proceed in the process or not, you will receive feedback on your application.
   

  

 If you have questions about the service or about your application, you are welcome to contact our support by emailing info@bravura.se or calling 010-171 47 10 and we will help you. Please indicate which service it applies to.
   

  

 We recommend that you submit your application immediately as we make a continuous selection.
   

  

 Welcome with your application!
   

  

*#Specialist*

title: [ITO] (GSD) Workday Specialist - Payroll Module (Bangkok/Indian/Malaysia-based, relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know our Team:**
 The Global Service Delivery (GSD) team is responsible for Agoda's office infrastructure and staff connectivity. We provide the hardware, software, and access to resources that allow staff to achieve their goals. We operate in 10 different countries, providing 24/7 support to all Agoda employees. Whether in the office, working remotely, or traveling, we enable everyone to stay connected. The GSD team uses state-of-the-art cloud management technologies combined with the best on-site services to manage the latest hardware running Windows, macOS, and Linux.
   

  

**Location: This role will be based in Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur or Gurgaon.**
* Bangkok: Full relocation support will be provided by Agoda.
* Kuala Lumpur & Gurgaon: Applicants must already be eligible to work locally (citizens or holders of valid work authorization).


**The Opportunity:**
 As a Workday Payroll Specialist, you will serve as the primary expert ensuring our core Payroll processes operate seamlessly, with a focus on scaling and enhancing the setup in alignment with organizational requirements. While Payroll will be your core area, you will also contribute across other domains and additional HRIS platforms to strengthen our overall People Technology foundation.
   

  

 You’ll partner closely with People and IT teams to deliver scalable solutions, optimize existing processes, and explore new ways Workday and other tools can bring value to the organization.
   

  

 If you’re someone who enjoys solving complex problems, thrives in a collaborative environment, and is eager to expand your skills beyond Workday, this role will give you the platform to do just that.
   

  

 This role will be based in Bangkok and relocation will be provided.
   

  

**In this Role, you'll get to:**
* Configure, maintain, and support Workday Payroll interfaces/outputs, including functional setup for PECI
* Partner closely with Payroll stakeholders and vendors to align on requirements, mapping, cutoffs, exception handling, and ongoing operational improvements
* Build and maintain Workday payroll reporting (Advanced Reports, Calculated Fields, dashboards)
* Support Workday-side troubleshooting during payroll cycles, including investigating data issues, supporting file generation/extract issues, and collaborating on root-cause analysis with integration/vendor teams
* Own documentation and enablement for Workday payroll processes, including control checklists, mapping notes, SOPs, and knowledge transfer to strengthen team resiliency.
* Stay current on Workday releases and recommend enhancements/automation to reduce payroll cycle time, defects, and manual effort on the Workday side


**What you'll Need to Succeed:**
* 4 - 6 years of hands-on Workday experience, with at least 2–3 years supporting payroll-related Workday delivery and third-party payroll providers
* Hands-on experience with Workday PECI and/or EPI (per your environment): managing extracts/outputs, effective-dated events, filters, timing, and operational support
* Strong proficiency in Workday reporting for payroll (Advanced Reporting, Calculated Fields), creating reliable outputs for readiness checks, reconciliation support, and audit needs
* Solid understanding of payroll input drivers in Workday (HCM/Comp/Time/Absence impacts), especially effective dating, retroactivity implications, and data integrity
* Working knowledge of Workday Security and handling sensitive payroll-related data with appropriate controls
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills: data tracing, root-cause analysis, and clear communication of findings/impacts to Payroll stakeholders
* Strong collaboration skills and stakeholder management; comfortable operating as the Workday owner while partnering tightly with Payroll and vendors


**It's Great if you have:**
* Understanding of how Workday data typically feeds into downstream systems (payroll providers like Cloudpay/ADP) and what validations/cutoffs are commonly required
* Familiarity with integration/support practices: monitoring, scheduling, secure file transfer coordination, incident management, and change control.
* Experience supporting multi-country payroll inputs from Workday (global complexity, localization considerations.
* Experience in payroll-related testing: UAT support, regression support for Workday changes, parallel run support (Workday outputs and validation reports)


**What you'll get:**
* Medical, dental, mental health support line, annual leave, travel discounts, sick days, and the AgodaChoice flexible spending benefit
* Provident fund benefits, and life insurance
* Flexibility to help you work in the way that's best for you with a work from home allowance, 30-day work from anywhere benefit, and hybrid working options.
* Unlimited online learning access, several in-person development programs for each stage of your career, and career paths for management and individual contributors
* The chance to live in Bangkok, one of the best cities in Southeast Asia and a central hub for travel. Within 3 hours you can hit any of the most popular countries like Vietnam, Singapore, Laos, Malaysia, and Hong Kong, just to name a few.
* A generous relocation package to help you get here comfortably.
