title: Hardware Lifecycle Management Architect-Gothenburg,Sweden
description:
Job Description – Hardware Lifecycle Management Architect
  
Location- Gothenburg, Sweden
  
  

Role Summary
  
Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management Architect
  
We are looking for an experienced Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management (HALM) Architect with 8–10 years of experience to join our team in an Onsite role. This position suits professionals who can architect, govern, and optimize enterprise scale hardware asset and configuration management ecosystems.
  
  

**Role:**  

Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management Architect
  
  

**Experience:**  

8–10 Years
  
  

**Work Mode:**  

✅ Onsite (Client Location)
  
  

**Core Skillsets Required:**  

Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management (HALM)
  
Asset Lifecycle Management Process Design & Governance
  
ServiceNow ITAM / HAM
  
CMDB Architecture, Design & Data Governance
  
  

**Additional Relevant Skillsets:**  

IT Asset Management (ITAM) & Configuration Management (SACM)
  
CMDB Health, Data Quality, Normalization & Reconciliation
  
Hardware Refresh, Capacity Planning & EOL/EOS Management
  
Vendor & OEM Lifecycle Management (Warranties, AMCs, SLAs)
  
Financial Asset Management (TCO, Depreciation, Chargeback/Showback)
  
ITIL-aligned Process Integration (Incident, Change, Request, Problem)
  
Discovery & Inventory Tools Integration
  
Hybrid Infrastructure Awareness (On Prem + Cloud Impact)
  
Audit, Compliance & Risk Management
  
Hardware Standardization & Platform Rationalization
  
  

**Responsibilities:**  

Architect and govern end to end hardware asset lifecycle (Plan → Procure → Deploy → Maintain → Refresh → Retire → Dispose)
  
Design and standardize asset lifecycle and CMDB processes aligned with ITIL best practices
  
Lead ServiceNow ITAM/HAM architecture, lifecycle workflows, asset classes, and integrations
  
Design and govern CMDB data models, CI relationships, and lifecycle states
  
Ensure CMDB health, data accuracy, and compliance readiness
  
Drive hardware refresh strategies, standardization, EOL planning, and cost optimization
  
Collaborate with Procurement, Finance, Security, Infrastructure, and Operations teams
  
Engage OEMs/vendors for lifecycle alignment and contractual inputs
  
Act as HALM & CMDB architecture SME for audits, reviews, and transformation initiatives
  
  

**Good to Have:**  

ServiceNow ITAM / CMDB Certification
  
ITIL or TOGAF Certification
  
Experience in large enterprise / global delivery environments
  
Exposure to sustainability or green IT initiatives
  
  

About Us
  
Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
  
  

All aspects of the hiring process and employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.
  
Öppen för alla
  
Vi fokuserar på din kompetens, inte dina övriga förutsättningar. Vi är öppna för att anpassa rollen eller arbetsplatsen efter dina behov.
company_description: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 59 countries to navigate their digital transformation.

title: Knowit Sydost söker Premiumkonsulter
description:
Vi letar inte efter vem som helst. Vi letar efter de bästa. Vi letar efter Premiumkonsulter.
  
Vem är du? Du vet vem du är. Du som redan är etablerad i konsultrollen. Du som både kunder och kollegor litar på när det är komplext. Du som inte bara levererar – utan lyfter hela uppdraget.
  
  

**Vi söker dig som:**  

Har flera års erfarenhet som IT-konsult
  
  

**Har minst 5 års erfarenhet som t.ex.:**  

Systemutvecklare
  
  

Lösningsarkitekt
  
  

AI engineer / ML engineer
  
  

Cloud engineer
  
  

Eller annan senior specialistroll
  
  

Du är trygg i kunddialog och kan ta ansvar i ditt uppdrag. Du har förmågan att se helheten, från teknik till affär samt förklara komplexa lösningar på ett begripligt sätt. Som person är du nyfiken, drivande och vågar utmana. Du behöver inte kunna allt. Men du behöver vara riktigt bra inom ditt område och vilja fortsätta utvecklas.
  
För denna roll behöver du kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska och engelska samt ha svenskt medborgarskap då vissa kunduppdrag kräver det.
  
Varför Knowit? Hos oss får du en kombination av tryggheten i ett etablerat bolag och energin i en lokal organisation nära kunderna. Vi arbetar med uppdrag i framkant, driver tekniska initiativ och uppmuntrar våra konsulter att växa – både tekniskt och professionellt.
  
  

Möjlighet att vara med och forma hur vi arbetar med AI – på riktigt
  
  

Uppdrag där du får göra skillnad, inte bara leverera kod
  
  

Frihet att påverka din roll och din utveckling
  
  

Kollegor som brinner för teknik, innovation och kunskapsdelning
  
  

Ansökan Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag, rekrytering sker löpande. Vi använder personlighetsanalyser i rekryteringsprocessen för att säkerställa en rättvis bedömning av dig som kandidat. Vi genomför även bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidat. Har du frågor? Kontakta rekryteringsansvarig Eleonora Cronholm eleonora.cronholm@knowit.se.

title: Digital Investigation Specialist
description:
**Digital Investigation Specialist**

Every day, we get opportunities to make a positive impact – on our colleagues, partners, customers and society. Together, we’re pioneering the solutions of the future and unlocking the full potential of precious resources. Trusted to act on initiative, we challenge conventional thinking to develop world-leading technologies that inspire progress in vital areas, including energy, food, water and shipping.


As we push forward, the innovative, open spirit that fuels our 140-year-old start-up culture and rapid growth also drives our personal growth. So, as we shape a more resourceful, less wasteful world, we build our careers too.

**About the job**


The Digital Investigation Specialist is responsible for providing support to the Alfa Laval Group in Digital Investigation/Security related activities.


You will assist the organization with digital investigation competence and tools, support managers in conducting internal investigations, in accordance with policies and procedures. Provide both knowledge and access to information from different digital Alfa Laval sources both structured, semi-structured and unstructured.


Together we will build the capability Alfa Laval need to detect non-compliance to the business principals, policies and other regulations, and to protect Alfa Laval’s brand and assets.

**Key responsibilities:**

**What You will Do**

* Develop and maintain digital forensics tools and methods
* Act as a bridge between Risk & Compliance and Information Security
* Acquire and analyze evidence from endpoints, email, cloud, and mobile devices
* Prepare clear reports and visual timelines for case teams
* Ensure strict evidence handling and support cross-border investigations
* Occasionally travel for meetings or onsite data collection

**What you know**

* 2–5 years’ experience in digital forensics, eDiscovery, or security investigations
* Strong knowledge of Windows/macOS artifacts, email/collaboration evidence, and identity/access concepts
* Skilled with forensic tools and Microsoft investigation sources


Bonus if you have:

  

Experience with fraud or compliance investigations, Microsoft Purview eDiscovery, scripting skills, or relevant certifications

**Who you are**

* Skilled at identifying patterns in large datasets
* Creative problem-solver
* Effective under pressure and tight deadlines
* Objective and impartial in analyzing evidence
* Clear and accurate report writing
* Able to explain complex ideas to non-technical audiences
* Eager to stay updated with new technologies
* Strong multitasking and project participation skills

**What's in it for you?**


We can offer you a challenging role in an international team, open and friendly work environment. We focus on performance and support personal and professional development through well-established people, process, and opportunities.


Location is in Lund

**For more information, pls contact:**


Rikard Egeriis, Vice President Group Risk & Compliance, Rikard.Egeriis@alfalaval.com


Divya Sharma, HR Sweden& Denmark Talent Acquisition, Divya.Sharma@alfalaval.com

**For union information, please contact:**


Monica Anderberg, Monica.Anderberg@alfalaval.com Unionen


Stefan Sandell, stefan.sandell@alfalaval.com Ledarna


Johan Ranhög, johan.ranhog@alfalaval.com Akademikerna


Please send your application and resume through the link below no later than 27th May 2026  

We are conducting a continuous review of received applications. We do not accept applications via email, due to General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).


We care about diversity, inclusion, and equity in our recruitment processes. We also believe behavioural traits can provide important insights into a candidate's fit to a role. To help us achieve this we apply Pymetrics assessments, and upon application you will be invited to play the assessment games. Playing games is mandatory.


As part of our commitment to maintaining a safe and secure workplace, we conduct background checks and alcohol and drug testing on final candidates for this role.

**We look forward to hearing from you soon!**


#L1-DS1
company_description: Alfa Laval is a leading global supplier of products and solutions for heat transfer, separation and fluid handling through our key products – heat exchangers, separators, pumps and valves.

title: Tech Strategy Manager
description:
**Lead with your expertise! Join us as a Tech Strategy Manager and drive impactful strategies in a forward-thinking team!**
===========================================================================================================================

We are expanding the team and searching for the next star to become the go-to person driving Technology Strategy initiatives for one of the largest financial services providers in the Nordics. The position as Tech Strategy Manager offers a unique opportunity to deliver meaningful change across If and our Nordic IT organization, while providing an outstanding development platform and opportunities for you at If.


**About the role**
------------------

We are determined to be the most caring insurance company in the market. We always make sure that every customer is correctly insured and that we are right by their side when they need us. To succeed in our important mission, we are looking for you who, with competence and commitment, wants to contribute to a safer life for every single person and a positive direction for the whole society.


In the role as a Tech Strategy Manager you will help shape and drive the strategic agenda for the Nordic IT organization, gaining broad visibility across the Nordics and direct exposure to senior management forums. You will work with topics such as enterprise-wide platform strategies, AI and data-driven capabilities, cloud modernization, and scaling agile and product-centric ways of working. Your main responsibilities in the role will include:


* Leading projects and initiatives, ranging from strategic technology assessments and pre-studies to implementation activities across different IT and business units across If
* Conduct, document, and present analysis for decision-making in key technology initiatives
* Partner with senior IT and business leaders in shaping strategic technology decisions and ensuring effective execution with clear business impact.
* Drive technology strategy process for If and our Business Areas through strategic analysis, definition, anchoring, communication, and execution. Addressing questions such as:



	+ What new technologies have a potential for If?
	+ How could we scale technology capabilities across If?
	+ What are the key areas where we can gain efficiency by using shared solutions?
	+ What technology-driven changes are needed to improve scalability, efficiency, and customer value creation?

**We offer**
------------

In the same way that we place high demands on you as an employee, we also expect you to place high demands on us as an employer. Here are some of the benefits of working at If:


* An including work environment where everyone is welcome
* Career and development opportunities in the biggest insurance company in the Nordics
* Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment
* Possibility of hybrid workplace
* Health promoting workplace with e.g., wellness allowance and various sports activities
* Great insurance benefits
* Lunch benefit
* High pension savings

**About the team**
------------------

As a part of the Tech Strategy team you will work across If with the mission of supporting If colleagues by delivering meaningful strategic problem solving with long lasting value. Together we drive selected strategic initiatives throughout the Nordics and Baltics ranging from development of technology strategies to transformation projects spanning across technology and business. Working at If is characterized as an informal but ambitious working environment, where we encourage personal development while keeping a good work-life balance.


**Who are you?**
----------------

We are looking for a person with experience in leading technology initiatives and transformations, who excels at structured problem solving, project management, communication, and stakeholder management. You are self-going, likely have prior experience from project management and facilitating roles, and have a solid background in consulting or technology strategy.


**You also have:**
------------------

* 3-8 years experience of IT/Technology management consultancy
* Experience from leading projects with a proven track record
* A problem solving and analytical mindset with ability to structure, analyse and address complex challenges, including analysing business needs and concluding recommendations on how these needs can be met with a strong financial sense
* An engaging and responsive social networking style
* A sense of forward-thinking, vision and drive
* Technical knowledge with a curious mindset and eagerness to continuously learn
* Ability to communicate and collaborate effectively (vocally and visually) towards business and IT colleagues, and write and speak English fluently
* Skills in working with multiple and diverse stakeholders to reconcile differing views into a common agenda, considering multiple perspectives and interests
* Dedication to build an inspiring work environment
* It is meritorious if you have experience from the insurance industry and are fluent in other Nordic languages

**Additional facts and the recruitment process**
------------------------------------------------

**Application deadline:** Screening and interviewing will start immediately. However, application deadline is 1 of June.


**To apply for the position:** Please attach your CV. Instead of a personal letter we kindly ask you to answer the questionnaires.


**Work location:** Bergshamra in Stockholm.


**Start:** As soon as possible or by agreement.


Final candidates will undergo a background check before employment.


We look forward to your application!

title: Cloud AI API Integrations – Fully Remote Subject Matter Expert - Sweden
description:
**Cloud AI API Integrations – Fully Remote Subject Matter Expert**
------------------------------------------------------------------


#### ***About Prolific***



Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are building the biggest pool of quality human data in the world.



Over 35,000 AI developers, researchers, and organizations use Prolific to gather data from paid study participants with a wide variety of experiences, knowledge, and skills.


#### ***The Opportunity***



We are inviting software developers, system administrators, and other technical professionals who work with AI models via cloud platforms to participate in an upcoming research project. We want to learn about your real-world experience integrating AI APIs into applications and workflows. Researchers looking for your skillset tend to pay up to **$60/hour** for projects completed.



This project is open to a broad range of practitioners, including:


* Developers and system administrators integrating Claude (Anthropic), OpenAI (GPT models) and Google Gemini via Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, or Microsoft Azure AI
* Developers and system administrators working with other leading AI APIs via cloud platforms or direct API access


**Please note:** This is a "bench" model. By verifying your credentials, you gain eligibility for high-level research tasks as they become available. Access is based on project demand and professional profile matching.


#### ***What You'll Bring***


* Active experience as a software developer or system administrator working with AI APIs in a professional context
* Hands-on integration of AI models via cloud platforms (e.g. Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, Microsoft Azure AI) or direct API access
* Practical knowledge of embedding AI capabilities (such as Claude, GPT, or Gemini models) into applications or automated workflows
* Comfort discussing technical implementation details, challenges, and decisions in your day-to-day work

#### ***What You'll Be Doing***


* Complete a paid screener to help us assess your background and suitability for specific research tasks
* Participate in AI-moderated interviews via Listen Labs (primary research method)
* Complete qualitative surveys via Qualtrics
* In some cases, take part in live interviews with the research team

#### ***Nice To Have***


* Familiarity with multiple AI providers or models in the same workflow or organisation
* Experience with RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, or AI agent frameworks
* Involvement in evaluating or selecting AI platforms for enterprise use

#### ***Why Prolific is a great platform to join as a Participant***



Joining our platform as a Prolific participant will give you the chance to influence the AI models of the future using your professional expertise. Once you pass our assessment, you can join Prolific in just 15 minutes, and start enjoying competitive pay rates, flexible hours, and the ability to work from home.



We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioural data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.



We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviours into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breadth and the best of humanity.


#### ***Links to more information on Prolific***



Website



Youtube


#### ***Privacy Statement***



By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning. Prolific's Candidate Privacy Notice explains what personal information Prolific may process, where Prolific may process your personal information, its purposes for processing your personal information, and the rights you can exercise over Prolific use of your personal personal information.

title: Cloud AI API Integrations – Fully Remote Subject Matter Expert - Sweden
description:
**Cloud AI API Integrations – Fully Remote Subject Matter Expert**
------------------------------------------------------------------


#### ***About Prolific***



Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are building the biggest pool of quality human data in the world.



Over 35,000 AI developers, researchers, and organizations use Prolific to gather data from paid study participants with a wide variety of experiences, knowledge, and skills.


#### ***The Opportunity***



We are inviting software developers, system administrators, and other technical professionals who work with AI models via cloud platforms to participate in an upcoming research project. We want to learn about your real-world experience integrating AI APIs into applications and workflows. Researchers looking for your skillset tend to pay up to **$60/hour** for projects completed.



This project is open to a broad range of practitioners, including:


* Developers and system administrators integrating Claude (Anthropic), OpenAI (GPT models) and Google Gemini via Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, or Microsoft Azure AI
* Developers and system administrators working with other leading AI APIs via cloud platforms or direct API access


**Please note:** This is a "bench" model. By verifying your credentials, you gain eligibility for high-level research tasks as they become available. Access is based on project demand and professional profile matching.


#### ***What You'll Bring***


* Active experience as a software developer or system administrator working with AI APIs in a professional context
* Hands-on integration of AI models via cloud platforms (e.g. Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, Microsoft Azure AI) or direct API access
* Practical knowledge of embedding AI capabilities (such as Claude, GPT, or Gemini models) into applications or automated workflows
* Comfort discussing technical implementation details, challenges, and decisions in your day-to-day work

#### ***What You'll Be Doing***


* Complete a paid screener to help us assess your background and suitability for specific research tasks
* Participate in AI-moderated interviews via Listen Labs (primary research method)
* Complete qualitative surveys via Qualtrics
* In some cases, take part in live interviews with the research team

#### ***Nice To Have***


* Familiarity with multiple AI providers or models in the same workflow or organisation
* Experience with RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, or AI agent frameworks
* Involvement in evaluating or selecting AI platforms for enterprise use

#### ***Why Prolific is a great platform to join as a Participant***



Joining our platform as a Prolific participant will give you the chance to influence the AI models of the future using your professional expertise. Once you pass our assessment, you can join Prolific in just 15 minutes, and start enjoying competitive pay rates, flexible hours, and the ability to work from home.



We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioural data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.



We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviours into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breadth and the best of humanity.


#### ***Links to more information on Prolific***



Website



Youtube


#### ***Privacy Statement***



By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning. Prolific's Candidate Privacy Notice explains what personal information Prolific may process, where Prolific may process your personal information, its purposes for processing your personal information, and the rights you can exercise over Prolific use of your personal personal information.

title: Technology Architect - Hardware Lifecycle Management Architect - Gothenburg,Sweden
description:
**Job Description** – **Hardware Lifecycle Management Architect****Location**- **Gothenburg**, **Sweden**
**Role Summary**  

Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management Architect
  

We are looking for an experienced Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management (HALM) Architect with 8–10 years of experience to join our team in an Onsite role. This position suits professionals who can architect, govern, and optimize enterprise scale hardware asset and configuration management ecosystems.  

  

**Role**:* Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management Architect


**Experience**:* 8–10 Years


**Work Mode**:* ✅ Onsite (Client Location)

  

**Core Skillsets Required:*** Hardware Asset Lifecycle Management (HALM)
* Asset Lifecycle Management Process Design & Governance
* ServiceNow ITAM / HAM
* CMDB Architecture, Design & Data Governance

  

**Additional Relevant Skillsets:*** IT Asset Management (ITAM) & Configuration Management (SACM)
* CMDB Health, Data Quality, Normalization & Reconciliation
* Hardware Refresh, Capacity Planning & EOL/EOS Management
* Vendor & OEM Lifecycle Management (Warranties, AMCs, SLAs)
* Financial Asset Management (TCO, Depreciation, Chargeback/Showback)
* ITIL-aligned Process Integration (Incident, Change, Request, Problem)
* Discovery & Inventory Tools Integration
* Hybrid Infrastructure Awareness (On Prem + Cloud Impact)
* Audit, Compliance & Risk Management
* Hardware Standardization & Platform Rationalization


**Responsibilities**:
Architect and govern end to end hardware asset lifecycle (Plan Procure Deploy Maintain Refresh Retire* Dispose)
* Design and standardize asset lifecycle and CMDB processes aligned with ITIL best practices
* Lead ServiceNow ITAM/HAM architecture, lifecycle workflows, asset classes, and integrations
* Design and govern CMDB data models, CI relationships, and lifecycle states
* Ensure CMDB health, data accuracy, and compliance readiness
* Drive hardware refresh strategies, standardization, EOL planning, and cost optimization
* Collaborate with Procurement, Finance, Security, Infrastructure, and Operations teams
* Engage OEMs/vendors for lifecycle alignment and contractual inputs
* Act as HALM & CMDB architecture SME for audits, reviews, and transformation initiatives

  

**Good to Have:*** ServiceNow ITAM / CMDB Certification
* ITIL or TOGAF Certification
* Experience in large enterprise / global delivery environments
* Exposure to sustainability or green IT initiatives

**About Us**  

Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.  

  

**All aspects of the hiring process and employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.**
company_description: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 59 countries to navigate their digital transformation.

title: Shift Leader Front Office Scandic Wallin, heltid
description:
Ansök nu
* Ansök senast: 11 juni 2026
* Stockholm
* Arbete på plats
**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

**Scandic Wallin ligger, precis som namnet indikerar, på Wallingatan som gränsar mellan City och Vasastan i Stockholm. Platsen är centralt belägen med allt ifrån kulturupplevelser, shoppingstråk och andra sevärdheter runt knuten. På insidan finns inredning som hyllar modern konst och design, färger som värmer och former som väcker nyfikenhet – interiören är en liten bugning till husets designer, Sven ”Mr Funkis” Markelius**.  

  

**Nu söker vi en Shift Leader till Scandic Wallin.**


Oavsett varför gästen kommer till oss är det få saker som är så uppskattade som ett vänligt ansikte som hälsar välkommen. Som Shift Leader agerar du värd tillsammans med övriga teamet på hotellet och skapar en gästupplevelse i världsklass.



Under din tid hos oss kan dessa områden variera i takt med att du och affären utvecklas. Hos oss får du ta ett stort eget ansvar för att ta de beslut som krävs för att göra gästen nöjd och teamen utvecklar och förbättrar arbetssätt och service i takt med att omvärlden förändras. Vi är nämligen övertygade om att det är när du får utvecklas och bidra med all din kompetens och erfarenhet som vi överträffar gästens förväntningar. På köpet får vi kul på jobbet!



Så ta med dig dina erfarenheter, ditt engagemang och ditt sätt att tänka till oss – och bidra till en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt: om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Välkommen till Scandic!


**Vad innebär rollen som Shift Leader Front Office?**



Du som arbetar inom Front Office är ansvarig för att våra gäster får service i världsklass. Du är spindeln i nätet som ser till att gästen alltid är i fokus. Du är den som går igenom ankomstlistan och lägger tid på detaljerna. Du löser det mesta och är en stjärna på att vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst. I ansvarsområdet ingår även administrativt arbete, säkerhetsarbete och arbete med försäljning. Arbetet i Front Office innebär att checka in och ut hotellets gäster, hälsa välkommen och ge gästen den information den behöver om sin vistelse. Du hanterar bokningar i systemet Opera Cloud och hanterar administrativa uppgifter runt gäster och säkerhet.



I rollen som Shift Leader har du, förutom att vara en del av driften, den övergripande överblicken över gästflödet och ser tillsammans med teamet till att prioritera arbetsuppgifter så att verksamheten flyter så att gästerna blir nöjda. Du leder och fördelar arbetet och hanterar bemanningen under ditt arbetspass. Vid behov får du utbilda nya medarbetare på hotellet och du avlastar också Front Office Manager med vissa administrativa arbetsuppgifter.



Hotellet har öppet dygnet runt och det är därför viktigt att du trivs med att arbeta i skift (förmiddagar, eftermiddagar och helger).


**Din kompetens**



För den här rollen krävs att du har både förmåga och vilja att arbeta med ett driftsnära ledarskap. Du är trygg i ditt ledarskap och har både integritet och säljdriv. För att passa i rollen tror vi också att du har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och är kapabel att hantera att det händer många olika saker samtidigt. Det är mycket viktigt att du kan förmedla ett gott värdskap till hotellets gäster. Du är en lyhörd och prestigelös lagspelare som tar ett stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet.



Du har också vana och kunskap i att arbeta med dator som arbetsredskap.



Eftersom arbetet till stor del består av att kommunicera med gäster är goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska en förutsättning. Talar du ytterligare ett språk är det meriterande.


**Information om tjänsten:**



Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid.


Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vår hemsida. Alla ansökningar kommer att behandlas löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, varför vi ber dig att ansöka så snart som möjligt. I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av ett enklare test om service vid urvalet.



Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss på Scandic!


Ps. på vår hemsida kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, vad tjänsten innebär och om våra förmåner!
company_description: Nordiskt hotellföretag i världsklass som skapar enastående upplevelser för de många människorna. 16 000 medarbetar, 280 hotell i 6 länder.

title: Sales Executive
description:
*“At Klipboard, we offer a hybrid policy, where employees work three days in the office and two days from home. This approach fosters a balanced work environment that combines in-office collaboration with the comfort and convenience of remote work.”*

**Join our team as a** **New Business Sales Executive**  

 **Location:** Malmö, Sweden  

**Work hours per week:** 40 hour  

  

 Would you like to work in an innovative environment where (international) collaboration is key? Then a position at Klipboard could be the next step in your career!


Klipboard is the market leader in cloud-based business management software for industry-specific organizations in distribution, automotive, field services, rental, retail, and more. With over 52,000 customers worldwide and more than 1,670+ employees, we are undergoing an exciting transformation: a new brand, new digital experiences, and a bold ambition to lead with design.


Working at Klipboard means being part of a personal, open, and informal work environment where every idea counts and everyone truly knows each other. Whether you're just starting your career or already have extensive experience, we give you the space to learn and grow in the way that suits you best: deepen your expertise, broaden your skills, or simply work from 9 to 5 — it’s all possible and perfectly acceptable.

* As a New Business Sales Executive, you will be responsible for promoting our suite of software solutions into the wholesale, manufacturing and distribution market place, with the aim to deliver new business sales against an agreed annual target.
* With a ‘can do’ attitude, the post holder will require the capability and desire to take a hands on approach with the Klipboard software based solutions (to include all of our layered applications) in order to be successful in this role.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* With the full backing of the business, you will take responsibility for driving and delivering lead generation and other marketing exercises for your market territory. This will be through your own effort as well as collaborating and utilising the capabilities of the sales focused Marketing Department and Business Development Representatives. Consultative sales is the approach for success.
* You will be responsible for leading the business discovery process and presentation of solution.
* You will be required to take a hands on approach with the product, such as initial demonstration capability
* Qualification of opportunities will be essential
* In time, accurate sales forecasting will be required
* Managing and maintaining the CRM system will be essential
* Attending and presenting when required at monthly sales meetings is required

**Skills, Knowledge and Experience:**

**Essential**

* Demonstrable record of achieving new business targets
* The highest capability of qualification / assessment of opportunities throughout the sales process will be essential and will be supported by methodology and management
* You must be a self-starter in order to be successful in this role
* The ability to deliver presentations in a professional and structured manner up to board level
* Comfortable with working in a team environment
* Commercially aware
* Excellent communication skills

**Desirable**

* Strong B2B New Business sales experience of garage/ tyre software
* Above experience gained within the distribution marketplace is desirable.

**Special Conditions:**


A valid driving licence and passport is essential as travel will be required as part of the role

**Equal Opportunities**


As a global company, we value and respect the diversity of our workforce, aiming to empower everyone to embrace each other's differences. We are committed to creating an inclusive workplace where diversity, equity, and inclusion are integral to our company and culture. We recognize the benefits of a diverse workforce, where creativity and valuing differences enable us all to thrive and sparks innovation.


If you require any help, adjustments and/or support during the interview and offer process then please advise our TA or HR team.


Research shows that women and other underrepresented groups are less likely to apply for a role unless they meet every listed requirement. However, we recognise that skills and experience come in many forms, and we encourage you to apply even if you don’t meet every criterion. If you are passionate about this role and believe you have the right mindset and transferrable skills, we would love to hear from you!

*To all recruitment agencies: Klipboard does not accept agency speculative resumes. At present we only accept CV’s from Agencies on our PSL who have been assigned specific position/s. Please do not forward resumes to our careers site or direct to Klipboard employee as this does not constitute an introduction and Klipboard retrospectively will not be liable for any candidate ownership or fees related to unsolicited resumes.*

 *#LI-Hybrid*
