title: Data Center Engineering Cluster Manager, Data Center InfraOps
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. We're the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on.  

You'll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, and operations managers. You'll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers.  

The Infrastructure Operations organization is seeking an exceptional leader to serve as a Data Center Engineering Operations (DCEO) Cluster Manager in Sweden. You will lead a large organization managing multiple data centers in the cluster, overseeing managers responsible for critical facility infrastructure.  

The pace, scale, and growth of Amazon's data center platform will challenge you. We seek experienced senior leaders who are highly strategic in managing their business unit, yet lead by example and roll up their sleeves when required.  

The ideal candidate will have strong knowledge of data center and mission-critical MEP infrastructure. You will be responsible for maintaining 100% service uptime in our cluster, maintaining a high-level view while diving deep into details as needed. You will interact daily with global teams, representing Sweden Data Center Engineering Operations.  

If you are passionate about customer experience, think and act globally, and want to contribute to the operational excellence of AWS data centers, this is the challenge you've been looking for.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

Team Leadership & Development: Hire, manage, and develop the operations management team including Facility Managers, Chief Engineers, and Facility Technicians. Mentor and develop employees at all levels, including managers.  

  

Operational Excellence: Ensure operation and maintenance of mechanical, electrical, and controls systems for AWS data centers, including preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, and change management. Maintain 100% service uptime across your cluster.  

  

Performance Management: Establish performance benchmarks, conduct analyses, and prepare reports on all aspects of critical facility operations and maintenance. Manage all facility-related repairs in a timely manner.  

  

Organizational Structure: Build and maintain a sustainable organizational structure. Develop hiring strategy and participate in recruiting events.  

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work with business development, engineering, and construction teams to forecast staffing needs and maintain appropriate resource levels.  

  

Vendor Management: Manage colocation data center service providers to meet or exceed contracted performance SLAs. Oversee on-site management of shift technicians, senior shift technicians, sub-contractors, and vendors, ensuring all work is performed in accordance with established practices and procedures.  

  

Incident Management: Lead safety, security, and availability incident response, incident management, incident resolution, and root cause analysis.  

  

Financial Management: Manage cost including OPEX and CAPEX associated with all data centers under your responsibility.  

  

Reporting & Communication: Conduct daily/weekly/monthly Data Center Engineering Operations meetings and reporting. Run weekly availability meetings and report outcomes.  

  

Global Integration: Liaise with global teams on initiatives, processes, and procedures; implement those initiatives locally in Sweden.  

  

Continuous Improvement: Drive continuous improvement of operational processes, procedures, methods, and tools. Lead and manage energy efficiency initiatives in your cluster.  

  

Capacity Planning: Support capacity planning and management activities.  

  

About the team  

You'll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You'll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you'll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Experience hiring, developing, and managing high-performing technical teams.
* 4+ years of experience operating as a manager of managers AND/OR 7+ years of relevant experience managing mission-critical facilities.
* In-depth knowledge of data center facilities such as generators, chillers, cooling towers, air handling units, UPS, electrical sub-distribution systems, fire detection and suppression systems, and cable reticulation systems.
* Fluency in English to communicate effectively with global teams.
* Driving license valid in EU.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering or related fields.
* Experience managing or implementing system health, performance monitoring, capacity planning, or process improvement and automation.
* Experience supporting procedures for production or mission-critical environments including ticketing, monitoring/metrics, and troubleshooting technical issues.
* Fluency in Swedish.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Global Solutions Architect, Automotive & Manufacturing, Automotive&Manufacturing EMEA SA
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon Web Services (AWS) is looking for experienced and motivated technologists who possess a unique balance of technical depth and strong interpersonal skills. You will partner some of the worlds largest Automotive and Manufacturing companies, to craft highly scalable, flexible and resilient cloud architectures that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of AWS services. In collaboration with account managers, you will assist in driving growth across a set of global customers in your defined country. As a trusted customer advocate, the solutions architect will help organizations understand best practices around advanced cloud-based solutions, and how to migrate existing workloads to the cloud. You will have the opportunity to help shape and execute a strategy to build mind share and broad use of AWS within enterprise customers. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, products, and technical challenges.  

  

Here are some other qualities we are looking for:  

  

Be great fun to work with.  

At AWS, we have a credo of “Work hard. Have fun. Make history”. In this role, you will love what you do, and instinctively know how to make work fun. You will be dynamic and creative, and willing to take on any challenge and make a big impact.  

  

Enjoy working with large, global customers. You will have a passion for educating, training, designing, and building cloud solutions for a diverse and challenging set of enterprise customers.  

  

Have a strong understanding of large scale computing solutions. The ideal candidate will have past experience working as a systems or support engineer. You will enjoy keeping your existing technical skills honed and developing new ones, so you can make strong contributions to deep architecture discussions. You will regularly take part in deep-dive education and design exercises to create world-class solutions built on AWS.
  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Serve as a trusted technical and AI advisor to customers, understanding their business needs and technology challenges to architect customized solutions

  

* Lead discussions to shape a customer's long-term technology and AI strategy and guide them on trade-offs between short-term fixes and extensible, scalable solutions

  

* Design end-to-end solutions leveraging both technical expertise and business acumen, driving consensus across multiple teams to deliver impactful solutions

  

* Proactively identify opportunities to accelerate implementation through reusable components, parallel workstreams, etc.

  

* Share knowledge by developing technical content like sample code, presentations, workshops to exemplify best practices and educate customers

  

* Drive product innovation by gathering customer feedback, translating needs into clear requirements, and partnering with product teams through development

  

* Resolve complex technical problems through root cause analysis, both for customers and internally

  

* Contribute strategic planning, recruiter/develop talent, build team consensus, and provide guidance to more junior solutions architects

  

A day in the life  

* Review customer requirements and technical challenges, focusing on opportunities to implement complex solutions architectures that can transform business outcomes also leveraging AI capabilities
* Develop proof-of-concepts that demonstrate how cloud solutions can transform business processes
* Influence service team leadership and product marketing on the future needs for customers, prioritizing roadmap features and GTM messaging
* Dedicate time to continuous learning about the latest advancements in AWS service capabilities
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities with colleagues, creating field enablement materials to help other SAs understand how to integrate cloud solutions into customer architectures

  

About the team  

The AWS Industries team is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation journeys. Our primary goal is to meet customers in their cloud and AI journey and work backwards from their industry-specific needs to transform their businesses and industries. Our team focuses on business outcomes and industry use cases on behalf of our customers, whether that is how we build products and solutions, how we sell, how we deliver, or how we partner.  

  

The Automotive & Manufacturing Solutions Architecture team is dedicated to accelerating AWS cloud adoption across strategic automotive and manufacturing accounts. Our mission is to drive tangible business value through focused execution on strategic projects, while enabling scale by up-skilling broader field teams. We work at the intersection of technology and industry-specific transformation, partnering closely with account teams, technology specialists, and industry specialist teams to deliver comprehensive solutions.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent, or experience in a professional field or military
* Experience in IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries
* Experience within specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data & analytics).
* Experience in design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures
* Experience communicating across technical and non-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in infrastructure architecture, database architecture and networking
* Experience working with end user or developer communities
* Experience with presentations and speaking with executives, IT, management, and developers

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect AWS
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens molnlösningar?
   

  

 Du blir en del av Capgeminis Cloud & Infrastructure Services (CIS)-enhet med fokus på projekt- och konsulttjänster i Norden. Vårt mål är att erbjuda kunder helhetslösningar inom Cloud och vi erbjuder en mängd olika tjänster till våra kunder, från strategisk rådgivning till projektgenomförande.
   

  

*I denna roll kommer du ha en nyckelroll i att:*
* Designa och implementera komplexa, skalbara och säkra AWS-lösningar anpassade efter kundens behov
* Ge teknisk vägledning och support vid felsökning under en hel projektleverans
* Samarbeta med intressenter för att samla in krav och föreslå effektiva migrationsstrategier
* Agera som en betrodd rådgivare till kunder gällande branschtrender och ny teknik
* Dela kunskap inom organisationen genom mentorskap, utbildning och skapande av återanvändbara artefakter


**Din Profil**
* Minst 7 års erfarenhet av praktisk design av molnbaserad företagsarkitektur, lagrings- och nätverkslösningar
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av att bygga, migrera och modernisera företagsapplikationer på enterprisenivå
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av molntransformation
* AWS-certifieringar på professionell nivå (t.ex. Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) samt erfarenhet av automatisering och skriptning (t.ex. Terraform, Python, CDK, shell, Ruby, Powershell)
* Kunskap om säkerhets- och efterlevnadsstandarder (t.ex. HIPAA, GDPR)
* Flytande i Svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Önskvärda kvalifikationer:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av AWS-tjänster (t.ex. AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cloud Migration Factory, Portfolio analysis tooling) samt hantering av storskaliga migreringar från datacenter till datacenter och/eller från datacenter till molnet; drift av datacenter (t.ex. datasäkring, övervakning, larm och notifieringar)
* Erfarenhet av att integrera AWS AI/ML-tjänster (SageMaker, Bedrock, Amazon Q); förståelse för styrning inom AI/ML och ansvarsfulla AI-praktiker


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:**
* Konkurrenskraftig lön, förmånliga tjänstepensioner och kollektivavtal som ger trygghet
* Fokus på din hälsa och ditt välmående, med initiativ för att skapa balans mellan jobb och fritid
* En arbetsmiljö med kollegor som stöttar och inspirerar varandra, och chefer som har ditt bästa i fokus
* Brett utbud av karriärmöjligheter och tillgång till Capgeminis stora utbildningskatalog, särskilt inom den senaste teknologin för t.ex. cloud och generativ AI
* En företagskultur där mångfald och inkludering värdesätts högt


**Ansökan**
*I denna rekrytering hanterar vi ansökningar löpande. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov. Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Jessica Fogelsjöö, Jessica.fogelsjoo@capgemini.com.*
 Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.
   

  

 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: CTO
description:
Chief Technology & Product Officer
 



  





 AI-Powered E-Commerce SaaS Platform
 



  





 A high-growth AI SaaS company transforming the future of e-commerce is seeking an exceptional technology and product leader to join its executive team in a combined CTO/CPO capacity.
 



 Backed by globally recognised investors and operating at significant scale, the business delivers advanced AI-driven solutions that enhance product discovery, merchandising, and digital shopping experiences for leading international retail brands. The platform already processes hundreds of millions of requests monthly and is entering an ambitious new phase of growth and market expansion.
 



  





 This is a rare opportunity to take ownership of both product and technology strategy within a company aiming to redefine the global retail technology landscape.
 



  





 The Opportunity
 



 Our client is looking for a commercially minded, highly technical executive who combines deep product instincts with strong engineering leadership.
 



 This is not a purely strategic leadership role. The successful candidate will be hands-on, execution-focused, and comfortable operating close to both customers and technology teams. You will lead the full product and technology lifecycle — from long-term vision and AI strategy through to operational delivery and measurable commercial impact.
 



 The role requires someone capable of bridging advanced applied AI capabilities with practical, revenue-generating outcomes for enterprise SaaS customers.
 



  





 Core Leadership Responsibilities
 


* Own and evolve the overall product vision and technology strategy
* lead pl—
* Ensure product and technical decisions directly support revenue growth and customer success
* Build, mentor, and scale high-performing product and engineering teams
* Operate as a hands-on leader capable of contributing strategically and technically when required



  





 Candidate Profile
 



  





 The successful candidate is likely to demonstrate:
 


* Significant experience in senior technology and/or product leadership roles within high-growth SaaS businesses
* Deep expertise across B2B SaaS, e-commerce technologies, and applied AI/ML environments
* Strong commercial acumen with a proven ability to align technology investment with business outcomes
* A highly strategic yet execution-oriented mindset
* Excellent leadership capability with experience building and scaling multidisciplinary teams
* Strong opinions on product, architecture, and operational excellence, balanced by a data-driven approach to decision-making



  





 Previous experience as a CTO, CPO, VP Engineering, or VP Product within a scaling technology business is highly desirable.
 



  





 If this is of interest, get in touch with harry@hjlconsulting.io.
 



  





 HJL Consulting is acting as a recruitment agency regarding this position.

title: Founding Backend Engineer
description:
Role summary
 
 Fluencify is hiring a
 **Founding Data Engineer** 
 to build the data infrastructure behind our creator marketing platform.
 



  





 This role is for someone who wants to own the systems that make Fluencify hard to copy: TikTok/Meta indexing, creator and campaign data models, competitor tracking, AI campaign recommendations, and the backend infrastructure that powers our product.
 



  





 You will work directly with the founders in Stockholm and have a lot of ownership from day one. We are not looking for someone who only wants well-defined tickets. We are looking for a hungry builder who can handle ambiguity, ship quickly, and turn messy creator/campaign data into reliable systems and useful product insights.
 



  





 Success in this role means that Fluencify has faster, cleaner, more reliable creator and campaign data, better AI-powered campaign recommendations, stronger competitor intelligence, and infrastructure that can scale as we grow.
 



  




 Responsibilities
 * Build and improve data pipelines for creator, video, campaign, TikTok and Meta data
* Design clean data models for creators, campaigns, videos, brands, performance and payouts
* Improve the reliability, speed and quality of Fluencify’s data infrastructure
* Build internal tools and endpoints that help the team understand creator/campaign performance
* Work on AI campaign recommendation infrastructure together with the founders
* Build competitor tracking systems for creator marketing platforms and agencies
* Help improve scraping, indexing, deduplication, enrichment and data quality workflows
* Identify bottlenecks in our backend systems and fix them quickly
* Make practical technical decisions in an early-stage startup environment
* Work closely with Isaac and Erik to decide what to build, what to ignore and what should be automated



  




 Qualifications
 * Has built real software projects outside school, work or tutorials
* Strong backend fundamentals
* Comfortable working with APIs, databases, data models and backend services
* Understands or is excited to learn data pipelines, queues, scraping/indexing and data quality
* Can ship fast without needing perfect requirements
* Comfortable with ambiguity and changing priorities
* Good judgment around security, reliability and production systems
* Able to explain technical decisions clearly
* Fluent in English
* Based in Stockholm or willing to relocate
* Excited to work in-person with the team



  




 Nice to have
 * Experience with TikTok, Meta, social media data, scraping, indexing or creator platforms
* Experience with AI/ML infrastructure, recommendation systems or data enrichment
* Experience building dashboards, internal tools or analytics products
* Experience with startups, hackathons, open-source projects or side projects
* Experience with TypeScript, Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL, queues, cloud infrastructure or similar tools
* Interest in creator economy, influencer marketing, UGC or social platforms



  




 What we are looking for
 
 We care less about years of experience and more about what you have built.
 



  





 You might be a student, recent graduate or early-career engineer. What matters is that you are technical, fast, curious and want ownership. You should be the kind of person who has built things on your own because you could not help yourself.

title: Data & AI Practice Lead - Sweden
description:
**Summary**
 The Sweden Data & Artificial Intelligence Practice Lead is responsible for driving the practices growth and solidifying Avanade’s position as a leading strategic partner. Reporting to the Sweden Practices Lead and aligning with the global practice, this role ensures Azure Data, Analytics services and Artificial Intelligence technical solution excellence and delivery integrity. The Sweden Data & Artificial Intelligence Lead will oversee technical execution, cultivate team skills in current and emerging Microsoft technologies, and implement a comprehensive talent strategy to support business needs.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Implement the global Data & Artificial Intelligence practices strategy within Sweden.
* Set and communicate Sweden practice priorities.
* Lead Swedens Data & Artificial Intelligence Practice in line with agreed plans and KPIs.
* Provide feedback loop upwards to drive continuous improvement.
* Identify opportunities for inorganic growth.
* Own and extend client relationships, becoming a client advisor with tangible contributions within Sweden and clients, helping broaden the the client network, identify opportunities for growth, and deliver an exceptional client experience.
* Cultivate and sustain a close working relationship with local Microsoft Product Engineering Groups and relevant Accenture leaders; and with on-, near, and offshore delivery centers positioning us as the partner of choice and important source of product feature feedback.
* Establish and maintain close relationships with key ecosystem partners in Sweden to facilitate collaboration in solutioning and delivery.
* Stay informed of client feedback, emerging trends, and innovations, providing ideas to global for new opportunities for practice-relevant solutions to maintain competitive edge.
* Foster and incubate innovations locally. Help establish and support innovative strategies to lower our cost to serve based on market demands.
* Collaborate with Swedens client teams to customize GTM motions and develop technical solutions for clients. Harvest best-in-class local solutioning assets and best practices and provide to global.
* Hold local accountability for shaping practice-specific technical solutions, providing oversight on all deals to maintain solution integrity. Address delivery quality escalations and ensure delivery best practices are being solutioned and delivered.
* Provide thought leadership relevant to the practice, enhancing our impact in the market.
* Ensure Swedens Data & Artificial Intelligence practice has sufficient capacity to support client teams from pre-sales assets, to solutioning, to delivery of practice-related solutions.
* Contribute to and execute the global growth program within the practice for critical skills, including certifications, to keep employees in all sourcing options (on-, near-, & offshore) at the forefront of current and emerging Microsoft technologies.
* Leverage global job families, skills, & project roles to deliver consistent practice solutions.
* In alignment with the global practice and Swedish client teams, define a holistic country‑level talent strategy for Sweden that includes skills, headcount, and location across all sourcing options to meet client demand, support the I&D agenda, and develop a future-ready workforce.
* Own accountability for Swedens practice market utilization and chargeability, ensuring targets are met or exceeded. Collaborate to address any staffing challenges that arise.
* Execute local programs to drive employee engagement, retention, and well-being, cultivating a highly skilled and motivated workforce within the practice.
* Communicate career pathways, support leadership development, and own succession planning for the practice. Drive employees to broaden their skill sets, secure promotions, and encourage experience in diverse roles.
* Own talent and performance management processes for assigned practice members in Sweden. Includes accountability for leading Talent Discussions, understanding talent pipeline, and making pay and promotion decisions in collaboration with HR to ensure consistent standards and reward structures are used.


**Qualifications**
**Skills and experiences**
* Proven experience leading teams with a focus on delivering results, growing skills, fostering culture, and EVP.
* Strong understanding of Analytics Services, Azure Data and AI, ensuring technical excellence and solution integrity.
* Ability to build and maintain strong client relationships, ensuring the delivery of high-quality solutions that meet regional client needs.
* Experience working within a matrix, aligning regional goals with global strategies while addressing local market needs.
* Demonstrated ability to capitalize on growth opportunities, ensuring the practice remains competitive and responsive to market trends.
* Strong delivery skills and experience delivering complex projects.
* Significant relevant consulting experience designing, selling, and leading client engagements with Azure Data Solutions, Artificial Intelligence adoption and integration, containerization techniques and automation deployment.


**Characteristics That Demonstrate Success For This Role**
* Mature decision maker, strong leader.
* Master negotiator and relationship builder.
* Able to see, evaluate and master unique skillset in each practice member.
* Act as a brick wall between business and client teams.
* Great communicator of priorities and expectations.

title: IT Service Manager på SKR
description:
**Om arbetsplatsen**
 Kommuner och regioners verksamheter är välfärdens kärna. Det är verksamheter som berör miljontals människor, varje dag. Våra medlemmar har gett oss ett tydligt uppdrag: att Sverige ska ha världens mest innovativa och omtänksamma välfärd.
   

  

 De kommande åren står vi inför utmaningar som kräver mod, kreativitet, kompetens och förändringsvilja. Vi tar med det som är bra idag när vi skapar morgondagens välfärd. Vi möter förändring med utveckling. Vi tror på dig och på din förmåga.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 I rollen som IT Service Manager får du en central position i vår IT-organisation. Du fungerar som den naturliga länken mellan ITdrift och applikationsförvaltning och säkerställer att applikationer är driftsäkra, långsiktigt förvaltningsbara och tekniskt ändamålsenliga över hela sin livscykel.
   

  

 Rollen har ett tydligt samordnande och kvalitetssäkrande ansvar i gränslandet mellan interna ITfunktioner, verksamheten och en outsourcad applikationsleverans. Du bidrar med helhetsperspektiv, struktur och tydlig kommunikation och skapar stabila förutsättningar för både daglig drift och framtida utveckling.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden omfattar bland annat att:
   

  

 Säkerställa effektiv samverkan mellan ITdrift och applikationsförvaltning
   

  

 Vara primär kontaktpunkt gentemot outsourcad applikationsförvaltare och följa upp avtalade leveranser, åtaganden och tekniska beroenden
   

  

 Ansvara för samordning och kommunikation kopplat till applikationslivscykeln, såsom uppgraderingar, avvecklingar och tekniska förändringar
   

  

 Säkerställa att applikationer uppfyller krav på driftbarhet, säkerhet och förvaltning
   

  

 Identifiera tekniska risker och teknisk skuld samt initiera dialog kring nödvändiga åtgärder
   

  

 Du deltar i organisationens ITråd där du bidrar med drift, arkitektur och förvaltningsperspektiv vid nya initiativ. En viktig del av uppdraget är att säkerställa att nya lösningar är realistiska att drifta och förvalta över tid.
   

  

 Rollen innebär även ett tydligt kommunikativt ansvar där du koordinerar dialogen mellan verksamhet, ITdrift, leverantörer och applikationsförvaltning, samt stödjer verksamheten med rådgivning i tekniska och förvaltningsnära frågor.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Du har en god förståelse för ITdrift, applikationsförvaltning och ITarkitektur samt erfarenhet av samverkan med outsourcade leverantörer. Du är trygg i en samordnande roll och har lätt för att omsätta tekniska frågor till tydlig och relevant kommunikation. Vi ser att du har relevant akademisk utbildning.
   

  

 Som person är du strukturerad, lösningsorienterad och förtroendeingivande och du trivs i gränsöverskridande roller. Du identifierar risker och förbättringsbehov och bidrar till hållbara ITlösningar ur både drift och förvaltningsperspektiv.
   

  

 I denna rekrytering samarbetar vi med Human Capital. Ansökan till tjänsten via deras hemsida senast 25 maj 2026. För en inledande dialog kring rollen kontakta Henrik Granqvist, henrik.granqvist@humancapital.se, 070-762 08 18 eller Jennifer Englund, jennifer.englund@humancapital.se, 073-145 59 97.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Sveriges Kommuner och Regioner (SKR) är en medlems- och arbetsgivarorganisation för Sveriges kommuner och regioner. Genom kunskap, råd och service till våra medlemmar stärker vi dem i deras uppdrag att utveckla välfärden för alla invånare. Vi är en mötesplats för kommuner och regioner och tillsammans utvecklar vi demokrati och välfärd utifrån invånarnas behov i hela landet. Vi påverkar regering, riksdag och EU genom att ge förslag på hur vi bäst utvecklar demokrati och välfärd.
   

  

 SKR har ca 500 medarbetare och kontoret är placerat vid Slussen i Stockholm. Som medarbetare på SKR har du flexibilitet att arbeta delvis på kontoret och delvis från annan plats, med utgångspunkt i verksamhetens behov.

title: Enterprise Account Executive (Insurance)
description:
**About Braive**
 Braive is the AI-powered mental health care platform that supports clinicians and patients through the full treatment journey, from first assessment to measurable outcomes. We are MDR Class IIA certified, clinically validated, and built in the Nordics. Insurers and healthcare providers trust us because we bring clinical depth and one continuous experience together in a way point solutions cannot. Our mission is to scale access and improve outcomes for the people who need them, and the proof points back it up: around 50% average symptom reduction and 80% patient improvement within six weeks.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 Mental health is now one of the largest cost and outcome drivers across Swedish health insurance, and one of the biggest opportunities for insurers willing to act early. This role shapes how Braive shows up in that conversation. You design partnerships that move insurers from reactive claims handling to genuine prevention and early intervention, and your work directly determines how quickly mental health support reaches policyholders. Insurers want a clinically validated, MDR-certified product their customers will actually use, alongside a partner who can prove its value. That is the case you build.
   

  

**The role**
 You drive growth and strategic partnerships with Swedish insurance companies, underwriters, and insurance brokers by identifying needs, shaping opportunities, and tailoring Braive's mental health offering to specific insurance products and claims journeys. You map insurer, underwriter, and broker needs, decision-makers, product gaps, and commercial opportunities, and you identify where Braive can create measurable value across claims, prevention, and early intervention. You build trusted relationships with senior product owners, claims and benefits teams, network managers, underwriters, brokers, and innovation leaders, translating their priorities into clear value cases around access, quality, prevention, cost, and outcomes. You lead discovery, proposals, pilots, procurement, and long-term partnership processes, and you use pilots as structured proof points that convert into signed, scaling agreements.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like**
 Since you'll already have the Swedish insurance landscape mapped with precision and an established network across insurers, underwriters, and brokers, your first six months will be spent deepening and expanding those relationships with senior stakeholders across the major players, with at least three structured pilot or partnership in motion. Within a year, Braive has won new, meaningful insurance partnerships in Sweden, and pilots under your ownership are converting into long-term agreements with measurable ROI for the insurer.
   

  

**About You**
* Deep, current understanding of the Swedish insurance market, including its products, players, and how decisions actually get made
* Track record selling into or partnering with insurance, employee benefits, or other complex enterprise environments where decisions involve multiple senior stakeholders
* Able to identify customer needs and translate them into credible value cases that combine clinical, operational, and financial logic
* Comfortable navigating complex, multi-stakeholder buying processes and steady when they run long
* Credible with senior medical, operational, and commercial stakeholders alike
* Commercially driven, structured, persistent, and relationship-oriented


**What We Offer**
 🏝️ 25 days vacation
   

  

 🧘🏻‍♀️ Mental health days off (every last Friday of the month, we take a day to recharge)
   

  

 🚴‍♀️ Annual Friskvård allowance
   

  

 🫱🏼‍🫲🏾 Shareholder options program
   

  

 💸 Additional pension
   

  

 🌱 An environment built for growth. We're tackling one of the most complex challenges of our time, and we want you to evolve alongside it. Stretch projects, real ownership, and space to develop.

title: Senior Engineer
description:
**Senior Machine Learning Engineer**
**Shape the Future of AI & Data with Us**
 At Datatonic, we are Google Cloud's premier partner in AI, driving transformation for world-class businesses. We push the boundaries of technology with expertise in machine learning, data engineering, and analytics on Google Cloud Platform.
   

  

 By partnering with us, clients future-proof their operations, unlock actionable insights, and stay ahead of the curve in a rapidly evolving world.
   

  

**Your Mission**
 As a
 **Senior** 
**Machine Learning Engineer,** 
 you'll know how to engineer beautiful code in Python and take pride in what you produce.
   

  

 You'll be an advocate of high-quality engineering and best-practice in production software as well as rapid prototypes.
   

  

 Whilst the position is a hands-on technical role, we'd be particularly interested to find candidates with a desire to lead projects and take an active role in leading client discussions.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will involve building trusted relationships with prospects, finding creative ways to use machine learning to solve problems, scoping projects, and overseeing the delivery of these engagements.
   

  

 To be successful, you will need strong ML & Data Science fundamentals and will know the right tools and approach for each ML use case. You'll be comfortable with model optimisation and deployment tools and practices.
   

  

 Furthermore, you'll also need excellent communication and consulting skills, with the desire to meet real business needs and deliver innovative solutions using AI & Cloud.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Translating Requirements: Interpret vague requirements and develop models to solve real-world problems.
* Data Science: Conduct ML experiments using programming languages with machine learning libraries.
* GenAI: Leverage generative AI to develop innovative solutions.
* Optimisation: Optimise machine learning solutions for performance and scalability.
* Custom Code: Implement tailored machine learning code to meet specific needs.
* Data Engineering: Ensure efficient data flow between databases and backend systems.
* MLOps: Automate ML workflows, focusing on testing, reproducibility, and feature/metadata storage.
* ML Architecture Design: Create machine learning architectures using Google Cloud tools and services.
* Engineering Software for Production: Build and deploy production-grade software for machine learning and data-driven solutions.


**What You’ll Bring**
* Experience: Multiple years experience as a Machine Learning Engineer, preferably with a consulting background.
* Programming Skills: Proficiency in Python as a backend language, capable of delivering production-ready code in well-tested CI/CD pipelines.
* Cloud Expertise: Familiarity with cloud platforms such as Google Cloud, AWS, or Azure.
* Software Engineering: Hands-on experience with foundational software engineering practices.
* Database Proficiency: Strong knowledge of SQL for querying and managing data.
* Scalability: Experience scaling computations using GPUs or distributed computing systems.
* ML Integration: Familiarity with exposing machine learning components through web services or wrappers (e.g., Flask in Python).
* Soft Skills: Strong communication and presentation skills to effectively convey technical concepts.


**Bonus Points If You Have**
* Scale-up experience.
* Cloud certifications (Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer, AWS Solution Architect, etc.).


**What’s in It for You?**
 We believe in empowering our team to thrive, with benefits including:
   

  

* Holiday: 30 days plus bank holidays (obviously!)
* Health Perks: 4500 kr per year Healthcare Allowance (paid monthly, after probation)
* Fitness & Wellbeing: Up to 5000 kr per year Wellness Allowance (payable on receipt of invoice)
* Hybrid Model: 1200 kr WFH Equipment Allowance (after probation)
* Learning & Growth: Access to platforms like Udemy to fuel your curiosity.
* Pension: Private Salary Sacrifice Pension available


**Why Datatonic?**
 Join us to work alongside
 **AI enthusiasts** 
 and
 **data experts** 
 who are shaping tomorrow. At Datatonic, innovation isn’t just encouraged - it’s embedded in everything we do. If you’re ready to inspire change and deliver value at the forefront of data and AI, we’d love to hear from you!
   

  

 Are you ready to make an impact?
   

  

**Apply now and take your career to the next level.**

title: Platform Engineer
description:
Kivra isn't just an app, it's a critical national infrastructure. Our Infrastructure team is the heart of Kivra, building and operating a large-scale, highly reliable platform that securely handles data for more than half of Sweden's population.
 



 We're looking for a skilled Platform Engineer with a deep interest in Systems Networking. You are someone who views the network as code and enjoys the challenge of running high-availability Kubernetes environments directly on bare metal.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




 You'll play a key role in Kivra's Platform Engineering Team, working alongside experienced and supportive colleagues. Together, you'll build, operate, and continuously improve a platform where security, stability, and reliability always come first.
 



  





**Your work will include:** 



* Bare-Metal Kubernetes Orchestration: Architecting and operating multiple Kubernetes clusters running directly on HP and Supermicro hardware.
* Low-Level Networking & SDN: Managing complex on-prem networking using Cilium (eBPF), BGP, Envoy.
* Traffic Engineering: Designing and maintaining robust load-balancing strategies and ingress patterns for high-traffic microservices.
* Infrastructure as Code: Driving automation and lifecycle management of physical and virtual assets using Terraform and Ansible.
* Developer Enablement: Building internal tooling and deployment pipelines that empower developers (YAML, Python, Go, Erlang, Cuelang) to ship to the platform safely and efficiently.
* Distributed Systems Reliability: Ensuring data integrity across systems such as Riak, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Strimzi Kafka.
* Hardened Security: Maintaining a strong security posture across Linux systems, IAM, and physical network segmentation.
* Operating and improving monitoring, logging, and alerting using Grafana, Mimir and PagerDuty.



  





**Our technical landscape** 




 Our platform is built on:
 


* Platform: Kubernetes running on self-hosted bare metal (HP and Supermicro).
* Networking: Cilium (eBPF), BGP, Envoy, Cisco, and high-performance Load Balancing.
* Automation: Ansible, Terraform, and GitOps-driven workflows.
* OS: Linux-based environments throughout.
* Observability: Grafana, Mimir, and PagerDuty.
* Data Layer: Strimzi Kafka, Riak, PostgreSQL, and Redis.



  





**Who you are** 




 Who you are, and how you contribute to the team, matters a lot to us. We thrive on being nice, helpful, and collaborative, both within the team and across the company.
 



  





**We believe that you are someone who:** 



* Has strong skills in Linux kernel internals and enterprise-level networking.
* Has worked with Platform Engineering or SRE for several years, ideally in environments where you've managed the full stack down to the hardware.
* Treats physical servers with the same automation-first mindset as virtualized resources.
* Possesses a deep understanding of L3/L4/L7 networking and container-native networking challenges.
* Cares deeply about security, stability, and service quality.
* Takes initiative, values teamwork, and enjoys fact-based technical discussions.
* Enjoys understanding distributed systems deeply and digging into the why behind failures.
* Experience with networking, firewall management, databases, web applications, and container orchestration is a strong plus. The role also offers opportunities to specialize further within one or several areas of the platform.



  





**About us** 




 At Kivra we run large-scale Kubernetes clusters on our own hardware, combining bare metal with cloud in a way that gives us performance, control, and flexibility. If you enjoy solving hard infrastructure problems and understanding systems all the way down to the metal, you'll feel right at home here.
 



 Your work will have a real impact. Kivra is trusted by millions of people across Sweden to deliver important and sensitive digital information, and the reliability and security of our platform truly matter. What you build and operate every day helps keep a critical piece of national infrastructure running.
 



 We believe great engineering happens when people are trusted. You'll have a high degree of autonomy, real influence over architectural decisions, and the opportunity to shape how our platform evolves. We value strong opinions based on facts, healthy technical discussions, and people who take initiative.
 



  





**We offer** 




 Kivra offers a place in a committed team with the opportunity for a high degree of innovation. You will be involved in influencing Kivra's exciting business and product development of a service that is currently used by more than half of Sweden's population. We offer the flexibility that life sometimes requires, but we believe that collaboration and value creation happens best when we sit and work together from our office in central Stockholm.
 



 We offer competitive remuneration and great benefits. Read more about our core values and benefits here: https://jobs.kivra.dev/!
 



  





**How to apply** 




 Easy peasy, just send in your CV and cover letter as soon as possible. If you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don't hesitate to contact Sarah Ohlsson, Talent Acquisition Lead at sarah.ohlsson@kivra.com.

title: RVP, Enterprise Sales Sweden (2nd line)
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

 An opportunity exists in our Core Sales organisation in Sweden for an experienced sales leader looking to further their career in a high-growth, fast-paced, and dynamic environment!
   

  

 We are seeking an exceptional and ambitious 2nd line Sales Manager who will play a key role in driving strategic sales initiatives across our different industry-based sales teams covering Enterprise accounts for Sweden.
   

  

**Role Description**
 As a 2nd line leader and sales executive, you will lead a team of highly visible and motivated Managers and Account Executives in our expanding Sweden sales operation, generating revenue and achieving individual, team, and organisational quotas.
   

  

 Our culture is a pivotal element of our success at Salesforce. Your leadership will encompass being close to the business, taking part in sales efforts both strategically and operatively, and managing team members to perform strongly. An interest in, and depth of knowledge regarding, our offerings portfolio are success characteristics of Salesforce Sweden’s sales culture.
   

  

 Your network in the marketplace is broad and strong. Your mind revolves around customers’ business outcomes, and your business acumen—including numerics (selling to the CFO or similar)—is evident. Energy, passion, and the ability to lead are key. Ideal candidates should possess solid B2B sales and extensive sales management experience. Candidates with a demonstrated history of driving revenue through Data and AI solutions will be given a strong preference.
   

  

**Your Impact**
* Team Development: You lead in developing a growing and diverse team who are seen as trusted advisors to our customers. Continuous learning resonates with you, and you support and manage high-performance teams, including recruiting, hiring, and training. You are an enabler of an inclusive and winning team spirit.
* Strategy: Execution of the existing Go-To-Market (GTM) strategy for the team, plus the evolution and development of the same over time, to further improve our relevance and fuel the expansion of our Industry-based GTM for the Enterprise segment in Sweden.
* Leadership: Decisiveness, trustworthiness, empowerment of others, and resilience are strong traits of yours. You lead from the front by leaning into our business, participating, and demonstrating "what good looks like." Substantial time in customer and partner-facing settings is expected.
* Networking: Involving corporate resources as required and using our ecosystem as a strong growth lever and success factor.
* Business Management: Excellent forecasting and performance management skills are essential to this role.
* Pipeline Generation: Driving initiatives to improve revenue-generating opportunities, including key account management as well as new logo efforts.
* Mentorship: Mentor and professionally develop Account Executives regarding strategies to ensure a high level of closure rates and opportunity identification.
* C-Suite Engagement: Engaging at the C-level in customer organisations.


**Required Skills**
* Consistent track record in building and managing successful sales teams and achieving quarterly and yearly targets.
* 2nd-line Management experience (Managing Managers) preferred.
* Previous experience in solution sales (ideally SaaS / Cloud technologies).
* Strong background in Data and AI sales.
* Experience leading teams selling transformational technology solutions to Enterprise customers.
* A level of interest in, and/or experience positioning/selling to customers based on industry-specific offerings.
* Strong demonstrated sales experience working with complex customers.
* People management experience (directly or via matrix).
* Able to operate and navigate successfully in a matrix/multi-product sales environment.
* A passion for building a growing and diverse team.
* Proven ability to create and inspire impactful teams.
* Excellent interpersonal skills; able to inspire and build trusted relationships.
* Passion for supporting team development as well as your own self-improvement.
* Excellent negotiation skills.
* A self-starter that can excel in a fast-paced environment.
* Fluency in English and Swedish.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: M365 Platform Specialist på SKR
description:
**Om arbetsplatsen**
 Kommuner och regioners verksamheter är välfärdens kärna. Det är verksamheter som berör miljontals människor, varje dag. Våra medlemmar har gett oss ett tydligt uppdrag: att Sverige ska ha världens mest innovativa och omtänksamma välfärd.
   

  

 De kommande åren står vi inför utmaningar som kräver mod, kreativitet, kompetens och förändringsvilja. Vi tar med det som är bra idag när vi skapar morgondagens välfärd. Vi möter förändring med utveckling. Vi tror på dig och på din förmåga.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Som M365 Platform Specialist hos oss på SKR får du ett helhetsansvar för utveckling, förvaltning och kvalitetssäkring av en modern och säker Microsoft 365-plattform som används av SKR och våra fem dotterbolag. Du är plattformens främsta expert och arbetar i gränslandet mellan strategi, teknik och verksamhet.
   

  

 I rollen ansvarar du för att driva vidareutvecklingen av M365, säkerställa efterlevnad av säkerhets- och arkitekturprinciper samt bidra vid större införanden och förändringsinitiativ. Du samarbetar nära CISO, arkitekter, infrastrukturteam och verksamheten, och fungerar ofta som teknisk kravställare gentemot leverantörer. Rollen kombinerar strategiskt ansvar med hands-on arbete i en samhällsviktig organisation där IT verkligen gör skillnad.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig som har gedigen och dokumenterad erfarenhet av Microsoft 365 i större och komplexa miljöer. Vi ser att du har relevant akademisk utbildning. Du har arbetat med utrullning, förvaltning och governance av M365-tjänster och besitter djup teknisk kompetens inom exempelvis Teams, SharePoint, Exchange Online, Entra ID, Intune samt compliance- och säkerhetsfunktioner.
   

  

 Du är trygg i dialogen med både teknik- och verksamhetssidan, van att samarbeta med roller som CISO och arkitekter, och har förmågan att driva frågor från analys till genomförande. Som person är du analytisk, strukturerad och prestigelös, och du motiveras av att ta ansvar för helheten och bygga långsiktigt hållbara lösningar.
   

  

 Hos SKR erbjuds du stort mandat, ett kompetent team och möjligheten att påverka utvecklingen av en modern digital arbetsplats i en organisation med ett tydligt samhällsuppdrag.
   

  

 I denna rekrytering samarbetar vi med Human Capital. Ansökan till tjänsten via deras hemsida senast 25 maj 2026. För en inledande dialog kring rollen kontakta Henrik Granqvist, henrik.granqvist@humancapital.se, 070-762 08 18 eller Jennifer Englund, jennifer.englund@humancapital.se, 073-145 59 97.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Sveriges Kommuner och Regioner (SKR) är en medlems- och arbetsgivarorganisation för Sveriges kommuner och regioner. Genom kunskap, råd och service till våra medlemmar stärker vi dem i deras uppdrag att utveckla välfärden för alla invånare. Vi är en mötesplats för kommuner och regioner och tillsammans utvecklar vi demokrati och välfärd utifrån invånarnas behov i hela landet. Vi påverkar regering, riksdag och EU genom att ge förslag på hur vi bäst utvecklar demokrati och välfärd.
   

  

 SKR har ca 500 medarbetare och kontoret är placerat vid Slussen i Stockholm. Som medarbetare på SKR har du flexibilitet att arbeta delvis på kontoret och delvis från annan plats, med utgångspunkt i verksamhetens behov.

title: Tech Strategy Manager
description:
Lead with your expertise! Join us as a Tech Strategy Manager and drive impactful strategies in a forward-thinking team!
   

  

 We are expanding the team and searching for the next star to become the go-to person driving Technology Strategy initiatives for one of the largest financial services providers in the Nordics. The position as Tech Strategy Manager offers a unique opportunity to deliver meaningful change across If and our Nordic IT organization, while providing an outstanding development platform and opportunities for you at If.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are determined to be the most caring insurance company in the market. We always make sure that every customer is correctly insured and that we are right by their side when they need us. To succeed in our important mission, we are looking for you who, with competence and commitment, wants to contribute to a safer life for every single person and a positive direction for the whole society.
   

  

 In the role as a Tech Strategy Manager you will help shape and drive the strategic agenda for the Nordic IT organization, gaining broad visibility across the Nordics and direct exposure to senior management forums. You will work with topics such as enterprise-wide platform strategies, AI and data-driven capabilities, cloud modernization, and scaling agile and product-centric ways of working. Your main responsibilities in the role will include:
   

  

* Leading projects and initiatives, ranging from strategic technology assessments and pre-studies to implementation activities across different IT and business units across If
* Conduct, document, and present analysis for decision-making in key technology initiatives
* Partner with senior IT and business leaders in shaping strategic technology decisions and ensuring effective execution with clear business impact.
* Drive technology strategy process for If and our Business Areas through strategic analysis, definition, anchoring, communication, and execution. Addressing questions such as:
+ What new technologies have a potential for If?
+ How could we scale technology capabilities across If?
+ What are the key areas where we can gain efficiency by using shared solutions?
+ What technology-driven changes are needed to improve scalability, efficiency, and customer value creation?


 We offer
   

  

 In the same way that we place high demands on you as an employee, we also expect you to place high demands on us as an employer. Here are some of the benefits of working at If:
   

  

* An including work environment where everyone is welcome
* Career and development opportunities in the biggest insurance company in the Nordics
* Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment
* Possibility of hybrid workplace
* Health promoting workplace with e.g., wellness allowance and various sports activities
* Great insurance benefits
* Lunch benefit
* High pension savings


**About The Team**
 As a part of the Tech Strategy team you will work across If with the mission of supporting If colleagues by delivering meaningful strategic problem solving with long lasting value. Together we drive selected strategic initiatives throughout the Nordics and Baltics ranging from development of technology strategies to transformation projects spanning across technology and business. Working at If is characterized as an informal but ambitious working environment, where we encourage personal development while keeping a good work-life balance.
   

  

 Who are you?
   

  

 We are looking for a person with experience in leading technology initiatives and transformations, who excels at structured problem solving, project management, communication, and stakeholder management. You are self-going, likely have prior experience from project management and facilitating roles, and have a solid background in consulting or technology strategy.
   

  

 You also have:
   

  

* 3-8 years experience of IT/Technology management consultancy
* Experience from leading projects with a proven track record
* A problem solving and analytical mindset with ability to structure, analyse and address complex challenges, including analysing business needs and concluding recommendations on how these needs can be met with a strong financial sense
* An engaging and responsive social networking style
* A sense of forward-thinking, vision and drive
* Technical knowledge with a curious mindset and eagerness to continuously learn
* Ability to communicate and collaborate effectively (vocally and visually) towards business and IT colleagues, and write and speak English fluently
* Skills in working with multiple and diverse stakeholders to reconcile differing views into a common agenda, considering multiple perspectives and interests
* Dedication to build an inspiring work environment
* It is meritorious if you have experience from the insurance industry and are fluent in other Nordic languages


 Additional facts and the recruitment process
   

  

**Application deadline:** 
 Screening and interviewing will start immediately. However, application deadline is 1 of June.
   

**To apply for the position:** 
 Please attach your CV. Instead of a personal letter we kindly ask you to answer the questionnaires.
   

**Work location:** 
 Bergshamra in Stockholm.
   

  

**Start:** 
 As soon as possible or by agreement.
   

  

 Final candidates will undergo a background check before employment.
   

  

 We look forward to your application!

title: Enterprise Architect
description:
**Vi på B3 Visab Consulting fokuserar på att stödja finansindustrin med sin affärsutveckling i den digitala ekonomin. Därför söker vi efter engagerade Enterprisearkitekter som vill utforma, utveckla och förfina den övergripande arkitekturen hos bolag i en samhällskritisk bransch.**
 Med över 40 års erfarenhet från området har vi skapat djupa relationer med branschledande aktörer inom bank- och försäkringsindustrin. Vår gedigna erfarenhet och våra seniora konsulter gör oss även till en attraktiv partner för nya, snabbfotade uppstickare. Just nu söker vi fler etablerade enterprisearkitekter med erfarenhet från bank och försäkring.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som vill arbeta i ett företag med sympatiska värderingar, erfarna kollegor och en attraktiv ersättningsmodell. Om du, liksom vi, värnar om en arbetsmiljö där samarbete, prestigelös kunskapsdelning och utveckling frodas, är detta en unik chans för dig att vara med och bidra till vår starka kultur samtidigt som du ges möjlighet att växa i din yrkesroll.
   

  

**Om rollen:**
 Som konsult hos oss ges du möjligheter till intressanta uppdrag hos spännande kunder. Att du har förmågan att skapa relationer och på ett prestigelöst sätt samarbeta i team tror vi är avgörande för att du ska lyckas i dina uppdrag. Uppdragen hos kund varierar men kan bl.a innebära att du kommer att vara ansvarig för att utforma, utveckla och förfina den övergripande arkitekturen, inklusive IT-system, processer och resurser. Detta inkluderar arkitektursstrategi, målarkitektur och lösningsarkitektur som går i linje med den övergripande affärsstrategin samtidigt som prestanda, säkerhet, lagkravsefterlevnad och liknande måste tillgodoses.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har följande kvalifikationer:**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet från enterprisearkitektrollen.
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet från bank- eller försäkringsområdet.
* Erfarenhet från konsultrollen.
* Certifieringar och erfarenheter inom relevanta områden.
* Arbetar obehindrat på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.
* Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet som verksamhetsarkitekt.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv lönemodell.
* Goda förutsättningar för flexibla arbetstider.
* Möjligheter att gå relevanta utbildningar och ta attraktiva certifikat.
* En fantastisk wellness- och medarbetarsatsning. Läs mer här


**Varför B3 Visab Consulting:**
 B3 Visab Consulting är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande företag inom IT och management. Således kan vi erbjuda det bästa av två världar. Styrkan hos ett stort börsnoterat bolag i kombination med den härliga samhörigheten som ett mindre bolag erbjuder.
   

  

 Vi är även stolta över att vi nominerats till och vunnit fler olika priser som "Årets Karriärföretag" och som Sveriges bästa bolag enligt ”Great Place to Work”. Vi tror att det beror på vår energi, vårt sätt att välkomna olikheter och våra erfarenheter som vi gärna delar med oss av. En central del av energiskapandet är vår unika wellness-satsning Team B3. Vi tror att medarbetare som mår bra, presterar bra och vill vara engagerade kollegor och goda medmänniskor.
   

  

 De som jobbar kvar hos oss efter många år pratar om friheten att påverka sina uppdrag, arbetstider och utveckling. De talar även om stoltheten över att vara en del av ett bolag som inte bara levererar förstklassigt resultat till sina kunder utan även tar ansvar för samhället i stort bl.a. genom att vara partner till fina initiativ som Women in Tech, Changers Hub, Pink Programming m.fl.
   

  

**Kontakt:**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig, så ansök nu! Vi tar inte emot ansökningar vi mail men du är mer än välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Lidia på lidia.hagos@b3.se eller konsultchef Hanna Skoog på +4670-260 12 65 eller VD Susanne Nordvall: +4670-823 57 55.

title: Named Account Executive - Sweden
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**Overview Of The Role**
 As an Enterprise Account Executive at Salesforce in Sweden, you will work with strategic accounts in the Media and Retail sector — organisations with 3,000+ employees. Partnering with customers across the full Salesforce AI CRM and Agentforce platform, you will act as a trusted advisor, developing deep insight into complex enterprise business dynamics and helping shape customers' transformation agendas. You will be part of a high-performing Enterprise team with dedicated onboarding, coaching, and career development.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and manage senior stakeholder relationships across a defined portfolio of Media and Retail enterprise accounts in Sweden, driving customer satisfaction and long-term growth
* Build and execute long-term account strategies aligned to customer business objectives, coordinating with Prime and Cloud sales resources to ensure strategic alignment
* Identify and develop new opportunities across existing accounts and whitespace prospects, using the full Salesforce Customer 360 and Agentforce portfolio
* Perform structured account planning and coordinate internal Salesforce resources to meet customer business needs and drive expansion


**Required Qualifications**
* 10+ years of full-cycle enterprise sales experience in the Swedish market, including managing complex deal structures and commercial proposals for large organisations
* Proven ability to develop sophisticated, value-based propositions and engage credibly with both operational stakeholders and C-suite decision-makers
* Strong analytical, problem-solving, and influencing skills, with a demonstrated appetite for strategic selling environments
* Fluent in Swedish and English, with the right to work in Sweden


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Prior experience selling into the Media and/or Retail sector in Sweden
* Familiarity with Agentforce, AI-driven CRM, or multi-cloud Salesforce selling motions
* Ability to coordinate and strategise effectively within a large, extended internal team


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.
