title: Data Architect - EE Analytics
description:
TRATON is a group of strong brands with a shared mission: transforming transportation together to create the future of sustainable transport solutions. Within TRATON, we include MAN, Scania, Volkswagen Truck & Bus, and International. As part of a global team of industry experts, you get to think bigger, experience more, and reach further. Together, we have the power to transform transportation - Let´s make a difference together. Find out more: www.traton.com
   

  

 Our values – customer first, respect, team spirit, responsibility, and elimination of waste – are at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

**Role Summary**
*This role is a part of TRATON Group R&D, located in Södertälje, Sweden*
 TRATON Group R&D is driving the transformation toward smarter, safer, and more sustainable transport systems. Within the Systems Engineering organization, the EE & Software Process team plays a central role in enabling effective and efficient development of electrical and embedded systems across our brands.
   

  

 As part of this journey, our agile team EE Analytics, operating within the Vehicle Software Factory Definition (VCT), is growing. We are now looking for a senior Data Architect to shape and drive the architecture of Embedded Software development data across the vehicle lifecycle.
   

  

 Today, the team mainly works with Power BI and analytics. We are now evolving towards a more scalable data platform where backend architecture, integration across systems, and long-term technical direction become key. In this role, you will take a strategic architectural perspective - helping define how development data is structured, governed, and reused to support performance, traceability, compliance, and continuous improvement across R&D.
   

  

 This is a great opportunity if you currently work as a senior data engineer or technical specialist and enjoy seeing the “bigger picture” - and want to influence the architectural direction and platform strategy.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
 As a Data Architect, you will:
   

  

  

* Define and guide the architectural vision and standards for Embedded Software development data across the vehicle lifecycle
* Design scalable data models and integration patterns that connect multiple development systems into a coherent foundation
* Enable structured and decision ready insights related to development speed, quality, compliance, and process adherence
* Establish clear principles for data ownership, traceability, and single source of truth
* Act as the technical reference point and mentor within the team, raising architectural maturity and engineering discipline
* Collaborate closely with data engineers, analysts, product owners, and stakeholders across VCT and VCF
* Contribute hands-on when needed to validate architectural decisions and strengthen engineering practices
* Support the transition of EE Analytics into a mature data platform organization


**Who You Are**
 You are a seasoned data professional with strong architectural thinking and a solid technical foundation. You enjoy diving deep into modeling trade-offs and refining structures until they are robust, scalable, and semantically clear. You are comfortable operating at both strategic and technical levels, bringing depth in one or more areas while maintaining a broad understanding across the data and software landscape. In short, a true T-shaped profile.
   

  

 We believe you have:
   

  

  

* Strong experience working in data engineering, analytics, or modern data platforms, including architectural or technical lead responsibility
* Strong knowledge of data modeling, semantic layers, and integration patterns
* Experience with cloud-based environments such as AWS, Snowflake, or similar platforms
* Experience working in software development or engineering driven environments
* A structured approach to defining data ownership, governance, and architectural principles


 It is a strong plus if you bring:
   

  

  

* Experience with federated data models or data product thinking
* Knowledge of embedded systems, automotive, or systems engineering contexts
* Experience discussing technical strategy and architectural choices, while working in cross organizational or multi domain environments
* A collaborative and supportive way of working with a structured and pragmatic approach
* Curiosity to challenge ideas and explore new ways of working while collaborating closely with others


 You do not need to tick every box - if this role feels like a natural next step, we encourage you to apply.
   

  

 Experience in the automotive industry is a plus but not required. Fluency in English is necessary; Swedish is not a must.
   

  

*We welcome applicants from all backgrounds – your unique experience and perspectives is valuable to us.*
**This Is Us**
 EE Analytics is a collaborative and international team working with modern data platforms, tools, and frameworks. We collaborate across brands and disciplines to support the digital evolution of vehicle software and systems development across TRATON Group R&D.
   

  

 We value openness, curiosity, and continuous learning. The team combines strong technical expertise with a supportive and pragmatic mindset, and we believe learning and improvement should be part of everyday work.
   

  

**TRATON Offers**
 We offer a dynamic, flexible workplace with hybrid work options, including Scania Sergel and Midway hubs. With a structured development plan and courses, TRATON Group R&D supports your career growth both locally and internationally.
   

  

 Benefits include wellness allowance, bonus, flexible hours, and company car leasing. We also host events for employees and their families, and Stockholm residents enjoy direct access to Södertälje via Scania Job express buses for an easy commute to Södertälje.
   

  

**Application**
 We look forward to receiving your application, consisting of your CV and kindly ask you not to share a cover letter to ensure an efficient and unbiased recruitment process for all parties.
   

  

 Apply as soon as possible, no later than
 **2026-05-25** 
 . Screening will take place on an ongoing basis during the application period. Logical and personality tests may be used as part of the selection process, and a background check may be required for this role.
   

  

**If you have questions or would like more information, please contact:**
 Pedro Sanches, Hiring Manager, pedro.sanches.junior@scania.com
   

  

**We look forward to your application!**
***This recruitment process is handled by Scania for TRATON Group R&D***

title: .NET Developer/Platform Engineer | SEB Liv & Pension, Solna
description:
Var med och forma framtidens liv- och pensionssystem genom att bygga plattformen som möjliggör säker och modern mjukvaruleverans på SEB Life & Pension.
   

  

 SEB grundades 1856 och har sedan dess haft kundfokus och långsiktiga relationer som kärnan i sin framgång. Genom att tillhandahålla kapital vill vi möjliggöra människors mål och bidra till en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 SEB Life & Pension är en av Sveriges största aktörer inom pension och försäkring och erbjuder tjänster för både privatpersoner och företag. Vi fokuserar på att skapa trygghet vid livets viktiga händelser. Som dotterbolag inom SEB får du som medarbetare både möjlighet att påverka och utvecklas, med fördelarna av både ett mindre bolag och en stor organisation.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Som .NET Developer/Platform Engineer hos oss arbetar du med moderna utvecklingsmiljöer i ett högt kompetent team inom Platform Engineering. Tillsammans bygger och underhåller vi gemensam mjukvara och infrastruktur som används av våra ca. 25 utvecklingsteam på SEB Life & Pension.
   

  

 Rollen passar dig som är i början av din karriär eller har några års erfarenhet och vill utvecklas inom Platform Engineering, DevOps och modern systemutveckling. Du kommer att jobba nära erfarna kollegor, få handledning och successivt ta mer ansvar i takt med att du växer i rollen.
   

  

**Exempel på vad du kommer att arbeta med:**
* Vidareutveckla, äga och förvalta vår interna utvecklingsplattform
* Utveckla pipelines, säkerhetsscanning och annan infrastruktur som används av utvecklingsteamen
* Utveckla gemensamma .NET lösningar
* Skapa self-service-lösningar och verktyg som förenklar vardagen för utvecklingsteamen
* Sätta standarder och utforska verktyg som teamen ska använda
* Stötta utvecklingsteamen i att implementera utvecklingsmetoder som SSDLC.
* Utforska och införa användningen av AI för att effektivisera daglig utveckling och stärka säkerheten i organisationens mjukvaruleverans.


 Du förväntas inte kunna allt från start - vi värdesätter nyfikenhet, vilja att lära och förmåga att samarbeta högt.
   

  

 Vem är du?
   

  

**För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du har:**
* Har grundläggande kunskap eller intresse för säker mjukvaruutveckling (SSDLC)
* God kommunikationsförmåga i svenska och engelska
* Intresse av att dela kunskap och erfarenheter
* Proaktivt arbetssätt och vilja att lära nytt
* God teknisk förståelse för andra utvecklares behov - gärna med ingenjörs- eller systemutvecklingsbakgrund
* Relevant akademisk utbildning inom datavetenskap, systemutveckling eller motsvarande


**Teknikstack och verktyg**
 Du behöver inte ha erfarenhet av allt nedan, men gärna av några - och ett intresse av att lära resten:
   

  

* Programmering: C#(.NET), Python, Bash
* Containers och orkestrering: Kubernetes, Helm, Docker
* Plattformar / on-prem: OpenShift
* CI/CD & säkerhet: GitHub Actions, CodeQL, Dependabot, secret scanning
* Operativsystem: Linux
* Moln: GCP eller annan större molnleverantörer
* Infrastructure as Code: Terraform
* GitOps: ArgoCD


 Vad vi erbjuder
   

  

* Stora möjligheter till lärande och kompetensutveckling
* En välkomnande och inkluderande kultur
* En innovativ arbetsmiljö med modern teknik
* Möjlighet att vara med och förändra en hel bransch
* Intern mobilitet inom SEB:s globala organisation
* Agila arbetsmetoder
* En miljö där du får stort ansvar och förtroende
* Ett gemensamt mål att leverera världsklass till våra kunder


**Redo att ansöka?**
 Vi är övertygade om att mångfald och inkludering är avgörande för vår framgång. Vi strävar efter en inkluderande och värderingsdriven kultur där alla medarbetare känner sig uppskattade, respekterade och engagerade - oavsett vilka de är, vad de tror på eller var de kommer ifrån.
   

  

 Du är välkommen att skicka din ansökan redan idag, men senast den
 **24th of May** 
**2026** 
 . Om du har frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta Laban Bondesson (rekryterande chef) via laban.bondesson@seb.se eller Olga Wohlfahrt, Talent Acquisition Partner via olga.wohlfahrt@seb.se
   

  

 Observera att våra slutkandidater genomgår bakgrundskontroller. Denna process inkluderar exempelvis identitetskontroll, verifiering av kvalifikationer, kreditkontroller, företagsengagemang och kontroll av brottsregister. Vi utför även slumpmässiga drogtester. Under anställningen kan medarbetare inom SEB även förvänta sig att genomgå återkommande bakgrundskontroller.
   

  

 SEB Sverige har en omplaceringsskyldighet, varför denna tjänst kan komma att tillsätts genom intern omplacering.

title: Lead Design/Team Architect
description:
Lead Designer – Job DescriptionPosition Summary
 
 The Lead Designer serves as the technical leader and key design authority within the Agile team. This role works closely with the Agile Product Owner (APO), Scrum Master, architects, and development teams to ensure scalable, feasible, and high-quality technical solutions aligned with business objectives and architectural standards.
 



 The Lead Designer drives solution design activities, supports technical decision-making, and helps improve overall team effectiveness through mentoring, coaching, and collaboration.
 



  




 Key ResponsibilitiesTechnical Leadership & Solution Design
 * Act as the primary technical spokesperson for the Agile team.
* Drive and coordinate end-to-end solution design activities across initiatives and features.
* Collaborate closely with the APO to ensure proposed solutions are technically feasible, scalable, and aligned with business requirements.
* Guide the team in defining architecture, integrations, technical workflows, and design best practices.
* Promote maintainable, reusable, and high-quality technical solutions.


 Team Collaboration & Agile Support
 * Work closely with Scrum Masters, APOs, architects, and stakeholders to support successful delivery.
* Function as a protective technical “shield” for the development team by managing interruptions and allowing developers to remain focused on delivery priorities.
* Facilitate technical discussions, design reviews, and decision-making sessions within the team.
* Support Agile ceremonies and contribute to sprint planning, backlog refinement, and release activities.


 Continuous Improvement & Technical Excellence
 * Advocate for prioritization of bug fixes, technical debt reduction, automation, infrastructure improvements, and architectural roadmap initiatives.
* Drive continuous improvement in system stability, scalability, performance, and development efficiency.
* Encourage engineering best practices, knowledge sharing, and innovation within the team.


 Coaching & Mentorship
 * Take a leadership role alongside the Scrum Master and APO in improving team effectiveness.
* Mentor and coach team members on technical design, architecture principles, and development standards.
* Foster collaboration, ownership, and continuous learning within the Agile team.



  




 Required Skills & Experience
 * Strong experience in solution design, system architecture, and Agile delivery environments.
* Solid understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC) and modern engineering practices.
* Experience working with cross-functional Agile teams and stakeholders.
* Strong problem-solving, communication, and leadership skills.
* Ability to balance technical strategy with delivery priorities.



  




 Preferred Qualifications
 * Experience in enterprise-scale systems and distributed architectures.
* Knowledge of cloud technologies, APIs, integrations, and automation practices.
* Experience mentoring technical teams and driving architectural improvements.

title: Senior IAM Architect - SailPoint
description:
Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior IAM Architect with a focus on SailPoint to join our Identity & Access Management domain and team up with some of the most dedicated cyber specialists in the industry.
   

  

**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ more than 400 employees – and as the demand for cybersecurity grows, we need to grow too. We are looking for a Senior IAM Architect – Sailpoint to join our Identity & Access Management (IAM) team operating in Denmark.
   

  

**The IAM team**
 Identity & Access Management (IAM) is a strategically important service area at Truesec, where we help our customers design, implement, and operate secure and scalable identity solutions across complex hybrid and cloud environments.
   

  

 We work closely with our customers’ security, IT, and business teams, delivering IAM services spanning Identity Governance & Administration (IGA), Privileged Access Management (PAM), and Zero Trust architectures.
   

  

**The Role**
 You act as a trusted advisor to customers, support delivery teams with architectural guidance, and contribute to the continuous evolution of Truesecs IAM services.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Own and design end-to-end IAM architectures across cloud, hybrid, and on-prem environments
* Define architecture principles, standards, and best practices within IAM
* Lead and support implementations within Identity Governance & Administration (IGA), Privileged Access Management (PAM), and modern authentication/authorization and federation
* Translate business and security requirements into practical, secure technical designs
* Facilitate customer dialogue, workshops, and architectural decision-making
* Mentor and coach IAM engineers through knowledge sharing, reviews, and hands-on guidance
* Contribute to presales activities, solution scoping, and architectural input in proposals
* Collaborate with Information Security on risk assessments, controls, and compliance
* Stay on top of IAM trends, vendors, and emerging technologies to evolve our services


**Your Potential Background**
* Extensive experience in IAM engineering and architecture (typically 7-10+ years)
* Proven experience designing complex IAM solutions in enterprise environments
* Strong expertise in IGA platforms such as SailPoint, Omada, or similar
* Experience with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) and related identity services
* Strong understanding of authentication and authorization (OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, SAML)
* Knowledge of role and access models (RBAC/ABAC) and identity lifecycle (joiner/mover/leaver)
* Experience working with compliance and regulatory requirements (e.g., GDPR, ISO 27001, NIS2)
* Ability to balance hands-on technical work with architectural and strategic responsibilities
* Strong communication skills and confidence working with both technical teams and senior stakeholders
* Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CCSP, CISM) are a plus, but not required


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Enterprise Business Development Manager
description:
****Job Req ID: 27999****
**About Supermicro**
 Supermicro® is a Top Tier provider of advanced server, storage, and networking solutions for Data Center, Cloud Computing, Enterprise IT, Hadoop/ Big Data, Hyperscale, HPC and IoT/Embedded customers worldwide. We are amongst the fastest growing company among the Silicon Valley Top 50 technology firms. Our unprecedented global expansion has provided us with the opportunity to offer many new positions to the technology community. We seek talented, passionate, and committed engineers, technologists, and business leaders to join us to drive accelerated growth and technology-led innovation in the global marketplace.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Supermicro is seeking an experienced Business Development Manager to join our EMEA team. This role is focused on winning new enterprise customers and expanding our footprint within existing accounts. You will drive revenue growth by promoting Supermicro’s broad solutions portfolio, building multi-level executive relationships, and orchestrating cross-functional alignment to close high-value opportunities. The ideal candidate brings a proven track record in business development, a customer-first mindset, and the ability to translate strategy into measurable results across the EMEA region.
   

  

**Essential Duties And Responsibilities**
* Identify, win and expand enterprise customer accounts across AI training/inference, HPC, data platforms, cloud, IoT and edge.
* Build multi-threaded relationships and executive sponsorship in large complex customers.
* Drive joint pursuits with key industry alliances and technology partners.
* Maintain and grow relationships with existing customers by identifying cross-sell/upsell paths to increase share of wallet.
* Research trends and market signals to open new sales areas and craft vertical plays (Finance, Public Sector, Telco/Media, Manufacturing, Retail, Energy).
* Operate with discipline: keep pipeline accurate and current, progress deals with clear next actions, and forecast credibly.
* Collaborate cross-functionally with commercial, technical and operations teams to ensure customer experience excellence.


**Qualifications**
* 5-10+ years in enterprise business development / strategic sales for infrastructure (servers, storage, AI/HPC, cloud/edge) with a record of new-logo wins and design-in selling.
* Proven ability to originate pipeline and manage complex, multi-stakeholder pursuits (IT, LoB, procurement, partners).
* Proven track record of driving enterprise business development and sales across the EMEA region.
* Ability to translate technical concepts into vertical-aligned value propositions, linking workload/architecture decisions to measurable outcomes in executive discussions.
* Strong process rigour with excellent pipeline hygiene, crisp written/oral communications and executive presence.


****EEO Statement****
 Supermicro is an Equal Opportunity Employer and embraces diversity in our employee population. It is the policy of Supermicro to provide equal opportunity to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status or special disabled veteran, marital status, pregnancy, genetic information, or any other legally protected status.

title: Senior Analytics Consultant SAP
description:
***Implema är en av Sveriges ledande specialister på snabb implementering av affärssystem som SAP och Microsoft Dynamics. Med över 20 års erfarenhet hjälper vi svenska och internationella företag att skapa effektiva och hållbara affärsprocesser. Vi har kontor på 10 orter i Sverige, 300 medarbetare, och omsätter 500 MSEK.***
 Implema växer och söker fler erfarna konsulter inom SAP Analytics! Vill du jobba i kundnära team med digitalisering och modern teknik? Då kan den här rollen vara rätt för dig! Vi söker nya kollegor till samtliga kontor från Umeå till Malmö och anpassar rollen efter dina unika färdigheter och kompetenser.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som konsult inom SAP Analytics hjälper du våra kunder att förstå och utveckla sin verksamhet med stöd av modern teknik för planering, analys och beslutsstöd. Du arbetar nära både kunder och kollegor, både juniora och seniora inom ett eller flera områden;
   

  

* Implementering av SAP Analytics-lösningar
* Workshopfacilitering för kunder och kollegor
* Support och rådgivning till befintliga kunder vid frågor, fel och vidareutveckling
* Guida kunderna i BW moderniseringsresan
* Aktivt följa SAP:s utveckling av Analytics-produkter


 Hos oss kan du välja om du vill fokusera på specialistrollen eller kombinera den med ansvar som t.ex. projektledning, mentorskap eller presales – beroende på vad som motiverar dig mest just nu i karriären.
   

  

**Är du vår nya kollega?**
 Vi letar efter dig som
   

  

* Du har flera års erfarenhet av SAP Analytics och har arbetat med lösningar som klassisk BW, BW/4HANA, planeringsverktyg, SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), Data Warehouse Cloud (DWC) eller Datasphere
* Du har arbetat som konsult eller på verksamhetssidan och har därmed skaffat dig gedigen, praktisk erfarenhet av att arbeta med SAP Analytics i en affärskritisk kontext
* Är flytande i svenska och engelska (tal och skrift)


 Vi ser det som meriterande om du dessutom har erfarenhet inom andra plattformar, såsom Qlik.
   

  

 För att trivas i rollen har du stort intresse för området och hur detta kan bidra till att stärka våra kunders konkurrenskraft. Du uppskattar att jobba nära beslutsfattare och har förmåga att få saker att hända. Du är också en dedikerad lagspelare som värnar om högkvalitativa leveranser.
   

  

****Vad vi erbjuder?****
 Vi tror på ett arbetsklimat där kunskap delas, initiativ uppmuntras och varje medarbetare får utvecklas – både professionellt och personligt. Med höga ambitioner och högt i tak skapar vi en miljö där det är lätt att trivas. För oss är det viktigt med work-life-balance, och vi värnar om en trygg arbetsmiljö där du mår bra och känner dig sedd.
   

  

**Marknadsmässiga villkor och förmåner som stödjer dig**
 Utöver konkurrenskraftig lön erbjuder vi en flexibel hybridarbetsmodell, trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar samt friskvårdsbidrag. Dessutom bjuder vi in på sociala aktiviteter som after work, kickoff och konferensresor
   

  

 Implema är en av Sveriges ledande specialister på att snabbt implementera affärssystem baserat på marknadens ledande affärssystem SAP och Microsoft Dynamics. Med mer än 20 års erfarenhet av affärskritiska projekt guidar Implema svenska och internationella företag till effektiva och hållbara affärsprocesser och den snabbaste vägen till framtidens affärssystem. Vi vill finnas nära våra kunder och har kontor på 10 orter runt om i Sverige och omsätter 500 MSEK. Vi växer och vill bli fler!

title: Account Executive
description:
**We’ve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us!**
 As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.
   

  

**The Role**
 It is an exciting time to join our B2B Sales team in Stockholm as an Account Executive. In this role, you will be on the front line of the company's growth, responsible for expanding an existing customer portfolio and introducing our business solutions to new prospects. Operating within an inside sales environment, you will lead the end-to-end process of selling, negotiating, and quoting our Corporate SaaS solutions. You will have a direct impact on our commercial success while benefiting from a clear career development plan and structured training programs.
   

  

**How To Make An Impact**
* Actively sell, negotiate, and quote EasyPark B2B solutions while providing comprehensive account support.
* Establish and nurture relationships with customers and new prospects to drive sales and increase brand awareness for our business solutions.
* Execute an effective sales targeting approach to consistently meet and exceed all sales and activity KPIs.
* Maintain high data quality and accuracy within the CRM system to ensure seamless operations.
* Take full commercial responsibility for customer deals, ensuring the delivery of qualitative sales and long-term value.


**About You**
 You are a solution-oriented professional with a proactive mindset and a passion for growth. You thrive in environments that require active listening and the ability to adapt quickly to different personalities and situations. With excellent time-management skills, you know how to prioritize effectively in a fast-paced setting. You are positive, self-motivated, and eager to contribute both socially and professionally to a strong, collaborative team culture. You value being coachable and are committed to constantly developing your skills as an expert in the sales field.
   

  

**Your background**
* 3+ years of sales experience within a B2B environment.
* Proven determination to strive for and exceed ambitious goals and targets.
* Strong communication skills with a genuine enjoyment for interacting with people and building rapport.
* An innovative thinker who is self-motivated and comfortable working both independently and as a collaborative team player.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English is required for this role.


**This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.**
 Arrive, including brands like EasyPark, Flowbird, RingGo, ParkMobile and Parkopedia, is a leading global mobility platform. Present in over 90 countries and 20,000 cities, the company helps people and decision-makers make smarter decisions about urban mobility and ease the experience of travel worldwide. Arrive delivers a unique combination of the core ingredients to make cities more livable: from smart payments and optimized car parks to data-driven traffic reduction and support for reinvestment in public transport and green space. It’s about more than function, it’s about saving time and simplifying the experience of travel for everyone. Travel is more than a journey, it’s how you Arrive.

title: Tech Customer Support Administrator II
description:
At Sinch, we are a global leader in providing cutting-edge communication platforms, enabling businesses to connect with any mobile phone on the planet in seconds, or less. Our platform supports mobile SMS, rich messaging, voice, and video communication solutions for some of the biggest companies in the world. We are expanding our support team in Asia and looking for a passionate and driven **Tech Customer Support Administrator II** to join us in the Sweden.


**What We Do:**

Our support team plays a crucial role in ensuring our customers receive the best possible experience while using our products. Operating 24/7, we tackle challenges and resolve customer issues from around the globe, helping customers across industries. As we expand, we are building a follow-the-sun support structure to address customer tickets efficiently and effectively.


**Key Responsibilities**

As **Support Engineer** , you will:


* Provide high-quality technical support to operators and enterprises worldwide.
* Analyze customer messaging traffic trends and patterns in our production environment.
* Perform deep triage and troubleshooting of technical issues across both software application and network layers.
* Support Sinch colleagues, including the sales team, during customer integration, onboarding, and post-deployment phases.
* Collaborate directly with customers in various technical areas, while working with state-of-the-art communication technologies, including rich messaging and collaborations with leading suppliers like Google, Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta.

**Who Are You?**

This is a challenging and dynamic role that requires a strong desire for learning and self-improvement. You should thrive in a fast-paced, ever-evolving environment and view each problem as an opportunity to learn and grow. You will be part of a global team where your ideas will be heard and valued!


To be successful in this role, you should possess:


* **Experience** working directly with global enterprise customers in a technical capacity.
* **Strong understanding** of TCP/IP protocol suite and web protocols.
* **Proficiency** in using service ticketing systems such as Zendesk, Atlassian Jira Service Management, etc.
* **Fluency in English** (both written and spoken) for effective communication with global teams and customers.

**Big Plus!** To stand out, you should ideally have:


* A **degree** in Computer Science or a relevant technical field, or other formal IT/technical qualifications.
* Basic knowledge of **UNIX/Linux systems** , **HTTP** , **SMPP** , **Rest** , **SQL** , **Postman** .
* Background in **telecommunications** or **wireless communication** .
* Familiarity with mobile communications standards like **GSM** and **4G** .
* Knowledge of the **SS7 protocol suite** and **SIGTRAN** .

**The role requires flexibility to work on rotating shifts covering EMEA and US regions.**

**Why Sinch?** At Sinch, you'll have the chance to work with some of the most advanced communication technologies in the world. This role will give you a chance to grow technically and professionally as you interact with both customers and cutting-edge technologies. You will have the support of a collaborative, forward-thinking team that values innovation, continuous learning, and personal development.


**Our Commitment**

We strive to cultivate a motivated and hardworking team in a welcoming and diverse workplace. Our core values—Dream Big, Win Together, Keep It Simple, and Make It Happen—form the basis for a culture that encourages innovative thinking and drives improved business outcomes through diverse perspectives and skills.


The path to success is always upward, and opportunities are closer than you think. It’s time to chase answers, tackle challenges, and follow your dreams.


Ready to join us on this journey? Apply now!


If this role isn’t what you’re looking for, please consider other open roles on our career page: Sinch Careers
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: Embedded Software Engineer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Tobii, SJ, Volvo Cars, Flightradar24, TopGolf, Echandia, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
****What you’ll be doing****
 As a
 **Senior Embedded Software Engineer** 
 at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership within embedded and/or firmware. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. You will design and code, build prototypes, set up testing/automation & perform debugging on hardware. Also collaborate with teams of various sizes around product and tech strategy, engineering best practices, and contribute to a strong team spirit.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 We are seeking a
 **Senior Embedded Software Engineer** 
 with 5+ years of experience and a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:
   

  

* 5+ years experience developing firmware/embedded software in C/C++.
* Skills in Linux (Yocto/Buildroot, cross-compiling, device tree) with preferably Linux kernel experience (drivers/modules, debugging).
* Proven work with device drivers and common buses: SPI, I²C, UART, CAN.
* Expertise in real-time systems (bare-metal or RTOS): deterministic timing, interrupts, watchdogs.
* Proficient with build/tooling: CMake/Make, cross-toolchains, reproducible/CI builds.
* Based in Sweden - You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency, to apply.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: IT Software Engineer
description:
We’re looking for an
 **IT Software Engineer** 
 to join us at Telia.
   

  

 I’m
 **Anneli** 
**Joelsson,** 
**Transactional Documents & Mediation** 
**in Tech Billing and Charging,** 
 and I’m searching for someone ready to grow with us. We’re a supportive, forward-thinking team focused on

 .

* Deliver and maintain functional demands that support Telia’s billing processes
* Develop and maintain mediation applications used across multiple Telia markets
* Create tools and processes to ensure application lifecycle management and security compliance
* Consult stakeholders in IT and Networks on best practices and technical solutions

**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet!**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a

 &
 **Climate Leader** 
 , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can

 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.

 We look forward to receiving your application by

 Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Security clearance and reference check will be part of the process.
   

  

 Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to
 **Anneli** 
**Joelsson** 
 at

 At Telia, we recognize talent by

 We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where
 **your uniqueness is our strength.**
**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Senior Software Engineer (Java) - Remote Work
description:
At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley.
 



 Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.
 



 When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success.
 



  





 Senior Software Engineer (Java) at BairesDev
 



  





 We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer with a strong Java background and real experience building distributed systems. You understand concurrent programming at a deep level, you’ve worked on data flow or streaming infrastructure, and you know how systems behave when the load is real and the data keeps moving. You’ll be working on a platform used by thousands of organizations worldwide to move and manage critical data — the kind of work where your engineering foundations genuinely matter.
 



  





  





 What You’ll Do:
 



  





 - Design and develop backend components in Java for a large-scale distributed data flow platform.
 



 - Write concurrent, high-throughput code that performs reliably under production conditions.
 



 - Contribute to the design and improvement of stream processing and data ingestion pipelines.
 



 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand requirements and deliver scalable solutions.
 



 - Participate in code reviews and help maintain high standards of engineering quality across the codebase.
 



 - Investigate and resolve performance, reliability, and correctness issues in distributed system components.
 



  





 What We Are Looking For:
 



  





 - 5+ years of experience in IT roles.
 



 - 3+ years of experience with Java as a primary programming language.
 



 - Solid background in distributed systems design and operation.
 



 - Strong understanding of concurrent programming concepts and patterns.
 



 - Experience with data flow, stream processing, or data pipeline infrastructure.
 



 - Open source contribution experience is a plus.
 



 - Advanced proficiency in English.
 



  





  





  





 How we do make your work (and your life) easier:
 



  





 - Remote Work.
 



 - Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred
 



 - Hardware and software setup for you to work from home.
 



 - Flexible hours: create your own schedule.
 



 - Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays.
 



 - Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent.
 



 - Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities.
 



  





 Join a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive and make a significant impact!
 



  





 Apply now!

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Bannerflow is a fast-growing global SaaS company building a Creative Intelligence Platform that enables enterprise brands to predict, create, and optimize advertising across channels.
   

  

 We’re on a company-wide AI transformation journey, where AI and agentic workflows are becoming a core part of how we build and innovate, with high expectations on adoption across all teams.
   

  

 Our teams are highly autonomous, collaborative, and we are now looking for another passionate engineer to join us!
   

  

**⭐ Ready for a new challenge? Here is what we offer:**
 At Bannerflow, we build flexible and autonomous teams based on trust. We believe that when people are given the freedom to take ownership and work closely together, great things happen. Our engineering culture is shaped by openness, respect, and a shared drive to keep improving.
   

  

 We are passionate about solving real problems and making a meaningful impact, and we are always open to exploring new ideas. With us, you will be part of a growing tech company where ideas are valued, feedback is encouraged, and personal development is supported. We bring the energy of a fast-moving company together with the stability of a proven product and a strong customer base.
   

  

 You will join a team where motivation is high, knowledge is shared openly, and having fun is part of everyday life, whether it’s through hackathons, board game nights, or spontaneous team activities.
   

  

**Our Ever Evolving Tech Stack Currently Consists Of**
* TypeScript / Angular
* C# / .NET
* MongoDB
* Azure & Kubernetes
* …and some more stuff


**🦋 Are you + Bannerflow = true?**
 We are seeking an experienced and ambitious engineer to join our team and help us continue to deliver the best possible products to our customers. This role is a critical part of our development team and will play a key role in shaping the direction of our technology and ensuring that our products are robust, scalable and secure.
   

  

**So, what are we looking for?**
* >5 years of experience as a software engineer delivering high-quality products
* Strong sense of ownership and personal drive
* Ability to write clean, efficient, and well-documented code
* You are deeply invested in AI and how it can drive value and enable more efficient ways of working.
* Excellent communication, collaboration and leadership skills - paring or mobbing fellow developer is just a natural way of working for you
* Passion for mentoring and coaching team members to help them reach their full potential
* You are deeply invested in AI and how it can drive value and enable more efficient ways of working.


 At Bannerflow, we live our values of passion, collaboration and challenge in everything we do, from how we build software to how we celebrate success together. As a Software Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping the future of Ad Tech through innovative technology and product excellence. We offer a hybrid work setup, competitive compensation including ITP1 pension, health allowance, parental leave top-up and private health care insurance. We are also deeply committed to building a diverse and inclusive team, welcoming applicants from all backgrounds, experiences and abilities. If you are ready to grow, learn and make a real impact, we would love to hear from you.
